docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: 习题2.3
docs.text:
\subsection{习题2.3解答}

\paragraph{第1题} 证明本节的性质1与性质2.

\paragraph{解}

\paragraph{第2题} 证明定理2.3.1.

\paragraph{解}

\paragraph{第3题} 设 \(\lim\limits_{x \to x_0}f(x) = A\), 证明:

(1) \(\lim\limits_{x \to x_0}f^2(x) = A^2\);

(2) \(\lim\limits_{x \to x_0}\sqrt{f(x)} = \sqrt{A}(A > 0)\);

(3) \(\lim\limits_{x \to x_0}\sqrt[3]{f(x)} = \sqrt[3]{A}\)

\paragraph{解}

\paragraph{第4题} 若 \(\lim\limits_{x \to x_0}f(x) = A > B\), 则 \(\exists \delta > 0\), 当 \(x \in U(x_0, \delta)\) 时, \(f(x) > B\).

\paragraph{解}

\paragraph{第5题} 证明定理2.3.2.

\paragraph{解}

\paragraph{第6题} 求下列极限(其中各题中的 \(m\) 与 \(n\) 均为正整数).

(1) \(\lim\limits_{x \to 2}(5-3x)(3x-1)\);

(2) \(\lim\limits_{x \to \frac{\pi}{2}}\frac{\sin x}{x}\);

(3) \(\lim\limits_{x \to 2}\frac{x^2 - 2x}{x^2 - 3x + 2}\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(\lim\limits_{x \to 2}(5-3x)(3x-1) = (5 - 3 \times 2)(3\times 2 - 1) = -5\)

(2) \(\lim\limits_{x \to \frac{\pi}{2}}\frac{\sin x}{x} = \frac{\sin \frac{\pi}{2}}{\frac{\pi}{2}} = \frac{2}{\pi}\)

(3) \(\lim\limits_{x \to 2}\frac{x^2 - 2x}{x^2 - 3x + 2} = \lim\limits_{x \to 2}\frac{x(x - 2)}{(x - 1)(x - 2)} = \lim\limits_{x \to 2}\frac{x}{x - 1} = \frac{2}{2 - 1} = 2\)

docs.title: 习题2.6
docs.text:
\subsection{习题2.6解答}

\paragraph{第4题} 设 \(f \in C[0, 2a], f(0) = f(2a)\). 求证：\(\exists \xi \in[0, a]\) 使得 \(f(\xi) = f(\xi + a)\).

\paragraph{证明} 设 \(F(x) = f(x) - f(x + a)\). 由 \(f \in C[0, 2a]\) 知 \(F \in C[0, a]\). 注意到 \(F(0) = f(0) - f(a)\), \(F(a) = f(a) - f(2a) = f(a) - f(0) = -F(0)\), 不妨设 \(F(0) \le 0 \le F(a)\). 由介值定理知 \(\exists \xi \in[0, a]\) 使得 \(F(\xi) = 0\). 即得 \(f(\xi) = f(\xi + a)\).

\subsection{习题7.5解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

\paragraph{解}

\paragraph{第2题}

\paragraph{解}

\paragraph{第3题}

\paragraph{解}

\paragraph{第4题}

\paragraph{解}

\paragraph{第5题}

设曲线 \(y = y(x)\) 满足 \(4x^2y''-4xy' - y = 0\), 过点 \((1, 4)\), 且在点 \((1, 4)\) 处与 \(x\) 轴夹角为 \(\frac{\pi}{4}\), 求 \(y = y(x)\).

\paragraph{解}

设 \(y = x^\lambda\), 则 \(4\lambda(\lambda - 1) + 4\lambda - 1 = 0\). 解得 \(\lambda_1 = \frac{1}{2}, \lambda_2 = -\frac{1}{2}\). 故通解为 \(y = C_1\sqrt{x} + \frac{C_2}{\sqrt{x}}\). 求导得 \(y' = \frac{C_1}{2\sqrt{x}} - \frac{C_2}{2x\sqrt{x}}\). 由题

\[ \begin{cases} y(1) = 4 \\ y'(1) = 1 \end{cases} \Longrightarrow \begin{cases} C_1 + C_2= 4 \\ \frac{1}{2}(C_1 - C_2) = 1 \end{cases} \]

解得 \(C_1 = 3, C_2 = 1\). 故 \(y = 3\sqrt{x} + \frac{1}{\sqrt{x}}\).

\paragraph{第6题}

设 \(y = e^{2x} + (1 + x)e^x\) 为微分方程 \(y'' + ay' + by = ce^x\) 的一个解, 求常系数 \(a, b, c\) 及微分方程的通解.

\paragraph{解}

\paragraph{第7题}

已知连续函数 \(y = f(x)\) 满足

\[ f(x) = \sin x + \int_{0}^{x}(t-x)f(t)\D{t}, \]

求 \(y = f(x)\).

\paragraph{解}

\(f(0) = 0\). 由 \(f(x) = \sin x + \int_{0}^{x}tf(t)\D{t} - x\int_{0}^{x}f(t)\D{t}\) 两边求导得 \(f'(x) = \cos x + xf(x) - \left(xf(x) + \int_{0}^{x}f(t)\D{t}\right) = \cos x - \int_{0}^{x}f(t)\D{t}\). 这蕴含着 \(f'(0) = 1\). 再次求导得 \(f''(x) = -\sin x - f(x)\), 即 \(y'' + y = -\sin x\). 考虑方程 \(z'' + z = e^{-ix}\). 特征方程为 \(\lambda^2 + 1 = 0\), \(\lambda_1 = i, \lambda_2 = -i\). 因此 \(\lambda = -i\) 为特征方程的一个根. 设其有特解 \(Z(x) = Axe^{-ix}\), 代入有 \(A = \frac{i}{2}\), 则 \(Z(x) = \frac{i}{2}e^{-ix}, \text{Im}{Z(x)} = \frac{1}{2}x\cos x\). 故原微分方程有通解 \(y = C_1\cos x + C_2\sin x + \frac{1}{2}x\cos x\). 又因为 \(f(0) = 0, f(1) = 1\), 故 \(C_1 = 0, C_2 = \frac{1}{2}\). 因此 \(f(x) = \frac{1}{2}\sin x + \frac{1}{2}x\cos x\).

docs.title: 习题1.1
docs.text:
\subsection{习题1.1解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

证明: \(n\) 维 Euclid 空间中的距离 \(\left\lVert\vct{X} - \vct{Y} ight Vert _n\) 满足正定性、对称性与三角不等式.

\paragraph{证明}

不妨设 \(\vct{X} = (x_1, x_2, \cdots, x_n), \vct{Y} = (y_1, y_2, \cdots, y_n)\), 则 \(\left\lVert\vct{X} - \vct{Y} ight Vert _n = \sqrt{\sum_{i = 1}^n(x_i - y_i)^2}\).

(1) 正定性: 显然 \(\left\lVert\vct{X} - \vct{Y} ight Vert _n = \sqrt{\sum_{i = 1}^n(x_i - y_i)^2} \ge 0\), 且 \(\left\lVert\vct{X} - \vct{Y} ight Vert _n = 0\) 当且仅当 \( orall i \in [1, n]\) 均有 \(x_i - y_i = 0\), 此即 \(\vct{X} = \vct{Y}\).

(2) 对称性: 显然 \(\left\lVert\vct{Y} - \vct{X} ight Vert _n = \sqrt{\sum_{i = 1}^n(x_i - y_i)^2} = \left\lVert\vct{X} - \vct{Y} ight Vert _n\)

(3) 三角不等式: 再设 \(\vct{Z} = (z_1, z_2, \cdots, z_n)\). 要证 \(\left\lVert\vct{X} - \vct{Y} ight Vert _n \le \left\lVert\vct{X} - \vct{Z} ight Vert _n + \left\lVert\vct{Z} - \vct{Y} ight Vert _n\), 只需证 \(\sqrt{\sum_{i = 1}^n(x_i - y_i)^2} \le \sqrt{\sum_{i = 1}^n(x_i - z_i)^2} + \sqrt{\sum_{i = 1}^n(z_i - y_i)^2}\). 由于

\[ egin{aligned} \sqrt{\sum_{i = 1}^n(x_i - y_i)^2} &= \sqrt{\sum_{i = 1}^n[(x_i - z_i) + (z_i - y_i)]^2} \ &= \sqrt{\sum_{i = 1}^n(x_i - z_i)^2 + \sum_{i = 1}^n(z_i - y_i)^2 - 2\sum_{i = 1}^n(x_i - z_i)(z_i - y_i)} \ &\le \sqrt{\sum_{i = 1}^n(x_i - z_i)^2 + \sum_{i = 1}^n(z_i - y_i)^2 + 2\sqrt{\sum_{i = 1}^n(x_i - z_i)^2\sum_{i = 1}^{n}(z_i - y_i)^2}} \ &= \sqrt{\sum_{i = 1}^n(x_i - z_i)^2} + \sqrt{\sum_{i = 1}^n(z_i - y_i)^2} \end{aligned} \]

其中不等号由柯西不等式得到. 故三角不等式得证.

\paragraph{第2题}

求下列集合 \(\Omega\) 的内部、外部、边界和闭包.

(1) \(\Omega\) 为 \(\set{R}^2\) 的子集, \(\Omega = \{(x, y) | x^2 + y^2 = 1\}\);

(2) \(\Omega\) 为 \(\set{R}^3\) 的子集, \(\Omega = \{(x, y, z) | 1 \le x^2 + y^2 + z^2 < 4\}\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) 内部: \(\varnothing\), 外部: \(\{(x, y) | x^2 + y^2 eq 1\}\), 边界: \(\{(x, y) | x^2 + y^2 = 1\}\), 闭包: \(\{(x, y) | x^2 + y^2 = 1\}\).

(2) 内部: \(\{(x, y, z) | 1 < x^2 + y^2 + z^2 < 4\}\), 外部 \(\{(x, y, z) | x^2 + y^2 + z^2 < 1 \lor x^2 + y^2 + z^2 > 4\}\), 边界: \(\{(x, y, z) | x^2 + y^2 + z^2 = 1 \lor x^2 + y^2 + z^2 = 4\}\), 闭包: \(\{(x, y, z) | 1 \le x^2 + y^2 + z^2 \le 4\}\).

\paragraph{第3题}

证明下列命题:

(1) 已知 \(S \subset \set{R}^n\), 则 \(S\) 为开集 \(\iff S = \mathring{S}\);

(2) 若 \(S \subset \set{R}^n\) 为开集, 则 \(S \cap \partial S = \varnothing\);

(3) 任意多个开集之并为开集; 有限个开集之交为开集;

(4) 若 \(A, B \subset \set{R}^n\), 记 \(S = A \cap B, T = A \cup B\), 则 \(\mathring{S} = \mathring{A} \cap \mathring{B}, \mathring{T} \supset \mathring{A} \cup \mathring{B}\);

(5) 若 \(A \subset \set{R}^n\), 则集合 \(\mathring{A}\) 的内部等于 \(\mathring{A}\).

\paragraph{证明}

\paragraph{第4题}

\paragraph{证明}

\paragraph{第5题}

\paragraph{证明}

\paragraph{第6题}

\paragraph{证明}

\paragraph{第7题}

下列集合中, 哪些是连通的, 哪些是非连通的?

(1) \(D = \{(x, y) | y eq 0\}\);

(2) \(D = \{(x, y) | 0 < x^2 + y^2 \le 2\}\);

(3) \(\Omega = \{(x, y, z) | x^2 + y^2 eq 0\}\);

(4) \(\Omega = \{(x, y, z) | 1 < x^2 + y^2 + z^2 \le 4\}\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) 不是. (2) 是. (3) 是. (4) 是.

\paragraph{第8题}

\paragraph{证明}

docs.title: 习题1.2
docs.text:
\subsection{习题1.2解答}

\paragraph{第3题}

已知 \(f\left(x + y, \frac{y}{x}\right) = x^2 - y^2\), 求 \(f(x, y)\).

\paragraph{解}

设 \(\begin{cases} m = x + y, \\ n = \frac{y}{x}, \end{cases}\) 则 \(\begin{cases}x = \frac{m}{n + 1}, \\ y = \frac{nm}{n + 1}.\end{cases}\) 因此 \(f(m, n) = x^2 - y^2 = \frac{m^2(1-n)}{1+n} \quad (n \neq -1)\). 而当 \(n = -1\) 时显然有 \(f(m, n) = 0\). 故

\[ f(x, y) = \begin{cases} \frac{x^2(1 - y)}{1 + y}, &y \neq -1, \\ 0, &y = -1. \end{cases} \]

\paragraph{第4题}

如果 \(n\) 元函数 \(f(x_1, x_2, \cdots, x_n)\) 对任意实数 \(t\) 满足 \(f(tx_1, tx_2, \cdots, tx_n) = t^kf(x_1, x_2, \cdots, x_n)\), 则称 \(f\) 是 \(x_1, x_2, \cdots, x_n\) 的 \(k\) 次齐次式, 下列函数是否为齐次式? 若是, 求出次数 \(k\).

(1) \(f(x, y, z) = \frac{x^3 + y^3 + z^3}{xyz}\);

(2) \(f(x, y, z) = \sqrt{x^3 + y^3 + z^3} + xyz\);

(3) \(f(x_1, x_2, \cdots, x_n) = \sum_{i = 1}^n\sum_{j = 1}^na_{ij}x_ix_j\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(f(tx, ty, yz) = \frac{(tx)^3 + (ty)^3 + (tz)^3}{(tx)(ty)(tz)} = \frac{x^3 + y^3 + z^3}{xyz} = t^0f(x, y, z)\). 因此 \(k = 0\).

(2) \(f(tx, ty, tz) = \sqrt{(tx)^3 + (ty)^3 + (tz)^3} + (tx)(ty)(tz) = t^{\frac{3}{2}}\sqrt{x^3 + y^3 + z^3} + t^3xyz\). 因此不是齐次式.

(3) \(f(tx_1, tx_2, \cdots, tx_n) = \sum_{i = 1}^n\sum_{j = 1}^na_{ij}(tx_i)(tx_j) = t^{2}\sum_{i = 1}^n\sum_{j = 1}^na_{ij}x_ix_j = t^{2}f(x_1, x_2, \cdots, x_n)\). 因此 \(k = 2n^2\).

\paragraph{第6题}

\(\set{R}^2\) 的子集 \(D\) 到 \(\set{R}^2\) 的映射 \(F:(x, y)\mapsto (u, v)\) 为 \(\begin{cases}u = x^2 - y^2, \\ v = xy, \end{cases}\) 其中定义域 \(D\) 是由四条曲线 \(x^2 - y^2 = 1, x^2 - y^2 = 4, xy = 1, xy = 2\) 围成的平面区域, 求 \(F\) 的值域 \(F(D)\), 并问: 在 \(D\) 内的直线 \(x = a\) 映射为何曲线?

\paragraph{解}

由题知 \(F(D)\) 中区域被夹在 \(x^2 - y^2 = 1\) 和 \(x^2 - y^2 = 4\) 之间, \(xy = 1\) 和 \(xy = 2\) 之间. 因此 \(F(D) = \{(u, v) | 1 \le u \le 4, 1 \le v \le 2\}\).

因为当 \(x = a\) 时 \(u = a^2 - y^2, v = ay\), 所以消去 \(y\) 可得曲线 \(a^2u + v^2 = a^4 (1 \le u \le 4, 1 \le v \le 2)\).

\paragraph{第7题}

\(\set{R}^2 \backslash \{(0, 0)\}\) 到 \(\set{R}^2\) 的映射 \(F:(x, y) \mapsto (u, v)\) 为 \(\begin{cases}u = \frac{x}{x^2 + y^2}, \\ v = \frac{y}{x^2 + y^2}.\end{cases}\)

问: (1) \(O-xy\) 平面上的圆 \(x^2 + y^2 = R^2\) 映射为 \(O-uv\) 平面上的什么曲线?

(2) \(O-xy\) 平面上的线段 \(y = x(0 < x \le 1)\) 映射为 \(O-uv\) 平面上的什么曲线?

\paragraph{解}

(1) 解得 \(\begin{cases}x = \frac{u}{u^2 + v^2}, \\ y = \frac{v}{u^2 + v^2}.\end{cases}\) 代入 \(x^2 + y^2 = R^2\) 得 \(u^2 + v^2 = \frac{1}{R^2}\).

(2) 代入 \(y = x(0 < x \le 1)\) 得 \(v = u(v \ge \dfrac{1}{2})\).

docs.title: 习题1.3
docs.text:
\subsection{习题1.3解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

下列函数当 \((x, y) o (0, 0)\) 时, 其极限是否存在? 若存在, 求出极限.

(1) \(\dfrac{\arcsin(x^2 + y^2)}{x^2 + y^2}\);

(3) \((x^2 + y^2)e^{-x-y}\);

(5) \(\dfrac{x^2 - y^2}{x^2 + y^2}\);

(7) \(\dfrac{x^3 - y^3}{x + y}\);

(9) \(\dfrac{x^2}{x^2 + y^2}\);

(11) \(\dfrac{x^4y^4}{(x^2 + y^4)^3}\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) 当 \((x, y) o(0, 0)\) 时 \(x^2 + y^2 o 0\). 因此 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}\dfrac{\arcsin(x^2 + y^2)}{x^2 + y^2} = \lim\limits_{u o 0}\dfrac{\arcsin u}{u} = 1\).

(3) \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}(x^2 + y^2)e^{-x-y} = \lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}(x^2 + y^2)\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}e^{-x-y} = 0\).

(5) 当 \((x, y)\) 沿直线 \(x = 0\) 趋于 \((0, 0)\) 时, \(f(x, y) = rac{-y^2}{y^2} = -1\). 当 \((x, y)\) 沿直线 \(y = 0\) 趋于 \((0, 0)\) 时, \(f(x, y) = rac{x^2}{x^2} = 1\). 两者不相等, 故极限不存在.

(7) 当 \((x, y)\) 沿直线 \(y = kx^3 - x\) 趋于 \((0, 0)\) 时, \(f(x, y) = \dfrac{x^3 - (kx^3 - x)^3}{x + (kx^3 - x)} = \dfrac{-k^3x^9 + 3k^2x^7 - 3kx^5 + 2x^3}{kx^3} = \dfrac{-k^3x^6 + 3k^2x^4 - 3kx^2 + 2}{k} o \dfrac{2}{k} \quad (x o 0)\). 因此极限随着 \(k\) 的变化而变化, 故极限不存在.

(9) 当 \((x, y)\) 沿直线 \(x = 0\) 趋于 \((0, 0)\) 时, \(f(x, y) = \dfrac{1}{y^2} o +\infty, \quad y o 0\). 故极限不存在.

(11) 当 \((x, y)\) 沿直线 \(y = x\) 趋于 \((0, 0)\) 时, \(f(x, y) = \dfrac{x^8}{(x^2 + x^4)^3} > \dfrac{1}{x^4} o +\infty, \quad x o 0\). 故极限不存在.

\paragraph{第2题}

求下列函数极限.

(1) \(\lim\limits_{x o 3 \atop y o 0}\dfrac{\ln(x + \sin y)}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}}\);

(3) \(\lim\limits_{x o +\infty \atop y o -\infty}(x^2 + y^2)e^{y - x}\);

(5) \(\lim\limits_{x o \infty \atop y o \infty}\left(\dfrac{\left|xy ight|}{x^2 + y^2} ight)^{x^2}\)

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(\lim\limits_{x o 3 \atop y o 0}\dfrac{\ln(x + \sin y)}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} = \dfrac{\ln(x + \sin y)}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}}\Bigg\vert_{x = 3\atop y = 0} = \dfrac{\ln 3}{3}\).

(3) \(\lim\limits_{x o +\infty \atop y o -\infty}(x^2 + y^2)e^{y - x} = \lim\limits_{x o +\infty \atop y o -\infty}e^y\cdot\dfrac{x^2}{e^x} + \lim\limits_{x o +\infty \atop y o -\infty} \dfrac{1}{e^x}\cdot y^2e^y = 0 \cdot 0 + 0 \cdot 0 = 0\)

(5) 由于 \(0 \le \left(\dfrac{\left|xy ight|}{x^2 + y^2} ight)^{x^2} \le \left(\dfrac{1}{2} ight)^{x^2}\) 且 \(\lim\limits_{x o \infty}\left(\dfrac{1}{2} ight)^{x^2} = 0\), 故由夹逼准则知 \(\lim\limits_{x o \infty \atop y o \infty}\left(\dfrac{\left|xy ight|}{x^2 + y^2} ight)^{x^2} = 0\).

\paragraph{第3题}

讨论下列累次极限与二重极限是否存在, 若存在求值.

(1) \(\lim\limits_{x o \infty}\lim\limits_{y o \infty}\sin \dfrac{\pi x}{2x + y}, \lim\limits_{y o \infty}\lim\limits_{x o \infty}\sin \dfrac{\pi x}{2x + y}, \lim\limits_{x o \infty \atop y o \infty}\sin \dfrac{\pi x}{2x + y};\)

(2) \(\lim\limits_{x o +\infty}\lim\limits_{y o 0^{+}}\dfrac{x^y}{1+x^y}, \lim\limits_{y o 0^{+}}\lim\limits_{x o +\infty}\dfrac{x^y}{1+x^y}, \lim\limits_{x o +\infty \atop y o 0^{+}}\dfrac{x^y}{1+x^y}\);

(3) \(\lim\limits_{x o 0}\lim\limits_{y o 0}(x+y)\sin \dfrac{1}{x}\sin \dfrac{1}{y}, \lim\limits_{y o 0}\lim\limits_{x o 0}(x+y)\sin \dfrac{1}{x}\sin \dfrac{1}{y}, \lim\limits_{x o 0 \atop y o 0}(x+y)\sin \dfrac{1}{x}\sin \dfrac{1}{y}\).

\paragraph{解}

(2) \(\lim\limits_{x o +\infty}\lim\limits_{y o 0^{+}}\dfrac{x^y}{1+x^y} = \lim\limits_{x o +\infty}\dfrac{1}{1+1} = \dfrac{1}{2}\). \(\lim\limits_{y o 0^{+}}\lim\limits_{x o +\infty}\dfrac{x^y}{1+x^y} = \lim\limits_{y o 0^{+}}1 = 1\). 由 1.3.1 节结论知 \(\lim\limits_{x o +\infty \atop y o 0^{+}}\dfrac{x^y}{1+x^y}\) 不存在.

(3) 显然累次极限均不存在. 因为 \(0 \le \left|(x+y)\sin\dfrac{1}{x}\sin\dfrac{1}{y} ight| \le \left|x + y ight|\), 且 \(\lim\limits_{x o 0 \atop y o 0}\left|x+y ight| o 0\), 故由夹逼准则知 \(\lim\limits_{x o 0 \atop y o 0}(x+y)\sin \dfrac{1}{x}\sin \dfrac{1}{y} = 0\).

\paragraph{第4题}

(1) 举例说明累次极限存在性与二重极限的存在性互不包含;

(2) 证明: 若二元函数 \(f\) 在某一点的两个累次极限和二重极限都存在, 则这三个值相等.

\paragraph{解}

(2) 由于 \(f(x, y)\) 的二重极限存在, 不妨设 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(x_0, y_0)}f(x, y) = A\). 再设 \(g(x) = \lim\limits_{y o y_0}f(x, y)\), 即证 \(\lim\limits_{x o x_0}g(x) = A\). 由定义知 \( orall \epsilon > 0, \exists \delta > 0\) 使得在 \(0 < \sqrt{(x - x_0)^2 + (y - y_0)^2} < \delta\) 时有 \(\left|f(x, y) - A ight| < \dfrac{\epsilon}{2}\). 左右两侧取极限可知 \(\lim\limits_{y o y_0}\left|f(x, y)- A ight| \le \dfrac{\epsilon}{2}\). 由于绝对值函数是连续函数, 因此可以转化为 \(\left|\lim\limits_{y o y_0}f(x, y) - A ight| \le \dfrac{\epsilon}{2} < \epsilon\), 即 \(\left|g(x) - A ight| <\epsilon\). 观察此时 \(\delta\) 的取值范围, 发现有 \(0 < \left|x - x_0 ight| \le \sqrt{(x - x_0)^2 + (y - y_0)^2} < \delta\). 故由定义可知 \(\lim\limits_{x o x_0}g(x) = A\). 此即 \(\lim\limits_{x o x_0}\lim\limits_{y o y_0}f(x, y) = \lim\limits_{(x, y) o(x_0, y_0)}f(x, y)\). 由对称性可知 \(\lim\limits_{y o y_0}\lim\limits_{x o x_0}f(x, y) = \lim\limits_{(x, y) o(x_0, y_0)}f(x, y)\). 命题得证.

\paragraph{第5题}

用定义证明函数 \(f(x, y) = \sqrt{x^2 + y^2}\) 在 \(\set{R}^2\) 上连续.

\paragraph{解}

\paragraph{第6题}

判断下列函数的在 \((0, 0)\) 点的连续性.

(1) \(f(x, y) = egin{cases}\dfrac{\sin(x^3 + y^3)}{x^2+y^2}, &x^2 + y^2 eq 0, \ 0, &x^2 + y^2 = 0;\end{cases}\)

(2) \(f(x, y) = egin{cases}1, &x^2 + y^2 eq 0, \ 0, &x^2 + y^2 = 0;\end{cases}\)

(3) \(f(x, y) = egin{cases}\dfrac{x^2y^2}{(x^2+y^2)^{ rac{3}{2}}}, &x^2 + y^2 eq 0, \ 0, &x^2 + y^2 = 0;\end{cases}\)

(4) \(f(x, y) = egin{cases}\dfrac{xy^2}{x^2+y^4}, &x^2 + y^2 eq 0, \ 0, &x^2 + y^2 = 0.\end{cases}\)

\paragraph{解}

(1) 因为 \(0 \le \left|\dfrac{\sin(x^3 + y^3)}{x^2 + y^2} ight| \le \left|\dfrac{x^3 + y^3}{x^2 + y^2} ight| = \left|(x + y)\left(1 + \dfrac{xy}{x^2 + y^2} ight) ight| \le \dfrac{3}{2}(x + y)\), 且 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}\dfrac{3}{2}(x + y) = 0\), 故由夹逼准则知 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}f(x, y) = 0 = f(0, 0)\). 因此该函数在 \((0, 0)\) 处连续.

(2) 因为 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}f(x, y) = 1 eq 0 = f(0, 0)\), 所以该函数在 \((0, 0)\) 处不连续.

(3) 因为 \(0 \le \left|\dfrac{x^2y^2}{(x^2+y^2)^{ rac{3}{2}}} ight| \le \left|\dfrac{x^2 + y^2}{(2xy)^{ rac{3}{2}}} ight| = \left|\dfrac{\sqrt{xy}}{2\sqrt{2}} ight|\), 且 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}\dfrac{\sqrt{xy}}{2\sqrt{2}} = 0\), 故由夹逼准则知 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}f(x, y) = 0 = f(0, 0)\). 因此该函数在 \((0, 0)\) 处连续.

(4) 考虑极限 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}\dfrac{xy^2}{x^2+y^4}\). 当 \((x, y)\) 沿着 \(y = k\sqrt{x}\) 趋于 \((0, 0)\) 时, 有 \(f(x, y) = f(x, k\sqrt{x}) = \dfrac{k^2}{1 + k^4}\) 随着 \(k\) 的变化而变化. 因此该极限不存在. 故该函数在 \((0, 0)\) 处不连续.

\paragraph{第7题}

考察下列函数在平面上的连续性, 并指出在哪些点上函数是连续的.

(1) \(f(x, y) = egin{cases}\dfrac{x - y^2}{x^3+y^3}, &x + y eq 0, \ 0, &x + y = 0;\end{cases}\)

(2) \(f(x, y) = egin{cases}\dfrac{x}{y^2}e^{- rac{x^2}{y^2}}, &y eq 0, \ 0, &y = 0;\end{cases}\)

\paragraph{解}

(1) 当 \(x + y eq 0\) 的时候显然函数是连续的. 现只需考察 \(x + y = 0\) 时的情况即可. 当 \(x + y = 0\) 且 \((x, y)\) 不趋向于 \((0, 0)\) 时, 显然分子不为 \(0\), 但分母趋向于 \(0\), 极限不存在, 因此在 \(x + y = 0(x eq 0)\) 的区域内不连续. 最后再考察 \((x, y) o (0, 0)\) 的情况. 假设 \((x, y)\) 沿着 \(y = kx\) 趋于 \((0, 0)\), 则 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}f(x, y) = \lim\limits_{x o 0}\dfrac{x - (kx)^2}{x^3 + (kx)^3} = \lim\limits_{x o 0}\dfrac{1 - k^2x}{(1 + k^3)x^2} = \lim\limits_{x o 0}\dfrac{-k^2}{2x(1 + k^3)}\) 极限不存在. 因此函数在 \((0, 0)\) 处也不连续. 综上所述, 函数在除了 \(x + y = 0\) 这条直线外的区域都连续.

(2) 先固定 \(x = x_0\), \(f(x, y) = f(x_0, y) = \dfrac{x_0}{y^2e^{ rac{x_0^2}{y^2}}} o 0, \quad y o 0\). 再考虑当 \((x, y) o(0, 0)\) 时的极限值. 不妨设 \((x, y)\) 沿着 \(y = kx\) 趋于 \((0, 0)\), 则 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o (0, 0)}f(x, y) = \lim\limits_{x o 0}\dfrac{x}{(kx)^2}e^ rac{1}{k^2}\) 不存在. 因此该函数在 \((0, 0)\) 处不连续, 在平面上其他区域内都连续.

\paragraph{第8题}

设 \(f\) 是定义在 \(\set{R}^2\) 上的连续函数, 且 \(\lim\limits_{x^2 + y^2 o \infty}f(x, y) = +\infty\), 证明: \(f\) 有最小值.

\paragraph{证明}

记 \(f(0, 0) = A\). 因为 \(\lim\limits_{x^2 + y^2 o \infty}f(x, y) = +\infty\), 所以 \(\exists r_0 > 0\) 使得 \( orall (x, y)\) 满足 \(x^2 + y^2 > r_0^2\), 都有 \(f(x, y) > A\). 记 \(D = \{(x, y) | x^2 + y^2 \le r_0^2\}\) 为一有界闭集, 故 \(D\) 中可以取到最小值. 不妨设 \(f(x_0, y_0)\) 为 \(D\) 中最小值. 由于 \((0, 0) \in D\), 则 \(f(x_0, y_0) \le f(0, 0) = A\). 所以 \( orall (x, y) \in \set{R}^2, f(x_0, y_0) \le f(x, y)\). 所以 \(f\) 在 \(\set{R}^2\) 上存在最小值.

\paragraph{第9题}

当 \((x, y) o (0, 0)\) 时, \(f(x, y) = o( ho^m), g(x, y) = o( ho^n)\), 其中 \( ho = \sqrt{x^2 + y^2}\), 证明:

(1) \(f(x, y) + g(x, y) = o( ho^k), k = \min\{m, n\}\),

(2) \(f(x, y)g(x, y) = o( ho^{m+n})\).

\paragraph{证明}

(1) 由题知 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}\dfrac{f(x, y)}{ ho^m} = 0, \lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}\dfrac{g(x, y)}{ ho^n} = 0\). 不妨设 \(m \le n\). 因此 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}\dfrac{f(x, y) + g(x, y)}{ ho^m} = \lim\limits_{(x, y) o (0, 0)}\left(\dfrac{f(x, y)}{ ho^m} + ho^{n - m}\dfrac{g(x, y)}{ ho^n} ight) = 0 + 0 = 0\). 由定义知 \(f(x, y) + g(x, y) = o( ho^k)\), 其中 \(k = \min\{m, n\}\).

(2) 由题知 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}\dfrac{f(x, y)}{ ho^m} = 0, \lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}\dfrac{g(x, y)}{ ho^n} = 0\). 因此 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}\dfrac{f(x, y)g(x, y)}{ ho^{m + n}} = \lim\limits_{(x, y) o (0, 0)}\left(\dfrac{f(x, y)}{ ho^m} \cdot \dfrac{g(x, y)}{ ho^n} ight) = 0 \cdot 0 = 0\). 由定义知 \(f(x, y)g(x, y) = o( ho^{m+n})\).

\paragraph{第10题}

当 \((x, y) o(0, 0)\) 时, 讨论下列无穷小的阶(若有阶, 求阶; 若无阶, 说明理由).

(1) \(\sin (x^2 + y^2)\);

(2) \(\ln(1 + \sqrt{x^2 + y^2})\);

(3) \((x^2 + y^2)\sin\dfrac{1}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}}\);

(4) \(x + y + 2xy\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) 记 \(\sqrt{x^2 + y^2} = ho\). 则 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}\dfrac{\sin (x^2 + y^2)}{x^2 + y^2} = \lim\limits_{ ho o 0}\dfrac{\sin ho^2}{ ho^2} = 1\). 故为 \(2\) 阶无穷小.

(2) 记 \(\sqrt{x^2 + y^2} = ho\). 则 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}\dfrac{\ln(1 + \sqrt{x^2 + y^2})}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} = \lim\limits_{ ho o 0}\dfrac{\ln(1 + ho)}{ ho} = 1\). 故为 \(1\) 阶无穷小.

(3) 记 \(\sqrt{x^2 + y^2} = ho\). 则 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}\dfrac{(x^2 + y^2)\sin\dfrac{1}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}}}{(\sqrt{x^2 + y^2})^k} = \lim\limits_{ ho o 0}\dfrac{ ho^2\sin\dfrac{1}{ ho}}{ ho^k}\) 不可能为一固定常数, 所以无阶.

(4) 由于 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(0, 0)}\dfrac{x + y + 2xy}{(\sqrt{x^2 + y^2})^k}\) 不可能为一固定常数, 所以无阶.

docs.title: 习题1.4
docs.text:
\subsection{习题1.4解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

求下列函数的偏导数:

(1) \(z = ax^2y + bxy^2\);

(3) \(z = \dfrac{x}{y} + \dfrac{y}{x}\);

(5) \(z = \ln(x + \sqrt{x^2 - y^2})\);

(7) \(z = \cos(1 + 2^{xy})\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = 2axy + by^2\), \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = ax^2 + 2bxy\).

(3) \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = \dfrac{1}{y} -\dfrac{y}{x^2}\), \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = \dfrac{1}{x} -\dfrac{x}{y^2}\).

(5) \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = \dfrac{1}{x + \sqrt{x^2 - y^2}}\cdot(1 + \dfrac{2x}{2\sqrt{x^2 - y^2}}) = \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{x^2 - y^2}}\), \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = \dfrac{1}{x + \sqrt{x^2 - y^2}}\cdot\dfrac{-2y}{2\sqrt{x^2 - y^2}} = \dfrac{y}{y^2 - x^2 - x\sqrt{x^2 - y^2}}\).

(7) \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = -\sin(1 + 2^{xy})\cdot 2^{xy}\cdot \ln(2^y) = -2^{xy}y\sin(1 + 2^{xy})\ln 2\), \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = -\sin(1 + 2^{xy})\cdot 2^{xy}\cdot \ln(2^x) = -2^{xy}x\sin(1 + 2^{xy})\ln 2\).

\paragraph{第2题}

考察下列函数在坐标原点的可微性.

(1) \(f(x, y) = \sqrt{\left|x ight|}\cos y\);

(2) \(f(x, y) = egin{cases}\dfrac{2xy}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}}, &x^2 + y^2 eq 0, \ 0, &x^2 + y^2 = 0;\end{cases}\)

(3) \(f(x, y) = egin{cases}\dfrac{x^2y^2}{\left(x^2 + y^2 ight)^{ rac{3}{2}}}, &x^2 + y^2 eq 0, \ 0, &x^2 + y^2 = 0;\end{cases}\)

(4) \(f(x, y) = \left|x - y ight|\phi(x, y)\), 其中 \(\phi(x, y)\) 在原点的某个邻域内连续, 且 \(\phi(0, 0) = 0\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) 由于 \(f'_x(0, 0) = \lim\limits_{\Delta x o 0}\dfrac{f(\Delta x, 0) - f(0, 0)}{\Delta x} = \lim\limits_{\Delta x o 0}\dfrac{\sqrt{\left|x ight|}}{\Delta x}\) 不存在, 所以该函数在原点不可微.

(2) 由于 \(f'_x(0, 0) = \lim\limits_{\Delta x o 0}\dfrac{f(\Delta x, 0) - f(0, 0)}{\Delta x} = 0, f'_y(0, 0) = \lim\limits_{\Delta y o 0}\dfrac{f(0, \Delta y) - f(0, 0)}{\Delta y} = 0\), 所以 \(\lim\limits_{(\Delta x, \Delta y) o (0, 0)}\dfrac{f(\Delta x, \Delta y) - f'_x(0, 0)\Delta x - f'_y(0, 0)\Delta y - f(0, 0)}{\sqrt{\Delta x^2 + \Delta y^2}} = \lim\limits_{(\Delta x, \Delta y) o (0, 0)}\dfrac{f(\Delta x, \Delta y) - 0 - 0 - 0}{\sqrt{\Delta x^2 + \Delta y^2}} = \lim\limits_{(\Delta x, \Delta y) o (0, 0)}\dfrac{2\Delta x\Delta y}{\Delta x^2 + \Delta y^2}\). 由于沿着 \(\Delta y = k\Delta x\) 趋于 \((0, 0)\) 时极限值为 \(\dfrac{2k}{1 + k^2}\) 随着 \(k\) 的变化为变化, 所以该函数在原点不可微.

(3) 由于 \(f'_x(0, 0) = \lim\limits_{\Delta x o 0}\dfrac{f(\Delta x, 0) - f(0, 0)}{\Delta x} = 0, f'_y(0, 0) = \lim\limits_{\Delta y o 0}\dfrac{f(0, \Delta y) - f(0, 0)}{\Delta y} = 0\), 所以 \(\lim\limits_{(\Delta x, \Delta y) o (0, 0)}\dfrac{f(\Delta x, \Delta y) - f'_x(0, 0)\Delta x - f'_y(0, 0)\Delta y - f(0, 0)}{\sqrt{\Delta x^2 + \Delta y^2}} = \lim\limits_{(\Delta x, \Delta y) o (0, 0)}\dfrac{f(\Delta x, \Delta y) - 0 - 0 - 0}{\sqrt{\Delta x^2 + \Delta y^2}} = \lim\limits_{(\Delta x, \Delta y) o (0, 0)}\dfrac{\Delta x^2\Delta y^2}{(\Delta x^2 + \Delta y^2)^2}\). 由于沿着 \(\Delta y = k\Delta x\) 趋于 \((0, 0)\) 时极限值为 \(\dfrac{k^2}{(1 + k^2)^2}\) 随着 \(k\) 的变化而变化, 所以该函数在原点不可微.

(4) 由于 \(f'_x(0, 0) = \lim\limits_{\Delta x o 0}\dfrac{f(\Delta x, 0) - f(0, 0)}{\Delta x} = \lim\limits_{\Delta x o 0}\dfrac{\left|\Delta x ight|\phi(\Delta x, 0)}{\Delta x} = 0\), \(f'_y(0, 0) = \lim\limits_{\Delta y o 0}\dfrac{f(0, \Delta y) - f(0, 0)}{\Delta y} = \lim\limits_{\Delta y o 0}\dfrac{\left|\Delta y ight|\phi(0, \Delta y)}{\Delta y} = 0\),

故

\[ egin{aligned} \lim\limits_{(\Delta x, \Delta y) o (0, 0)}\dfrac{f(\Delta x, \Delta y) - f'_x(0, 0)\Delta x - f'_y(0, 0)\Delta y - f(0, 0)}{\sqrt{\Delta x^2 + \Delta y^2}} & = \lim\limits_{(\Delta x, \Delta y) o (0, 0)}\dfrac{\left|x - y ight|\phi(\Delta x, \Delta y)}{\sqrt{\Delta x^2 + \Delta y^2}} \ & \le \lim\limits_{(\Delta x, \Delta y) o (0, 0)}\dfrac{(\left|x ight| + \left|y ight|)\phi(\Delta x, \Delta y)}{\sqrt{\Delta x^2 + \Delta y^2}} \ & \le \lim\limits_{(\Delta x, \Delta y) o (0, 0)}\dfrac{\sqrt{2(x^2 + y^2)}\phi(\Delta x, \Delta y)}{\sqrt{\Delta x^2 + \Delta y^2}} \ & = \lim\limits_{(\Delta x, \Delta y) o (0, 0)}\sqrt{2}\phi(\Delta x, \Delta y) o 0 \end{aligned} \]

所以该函数在原点可微.

\paragraph{第4题}

求下列函数的全微分:

(1) \(u = \sin\dfrac{1}{x^2 + y^2 + z^2}\), 在点 \(\left(\dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2}, \dfrac{1}{2}, -\dfrac{1}{2} ight)\);

(3) \(z = (x + y)^2\);

(5) \(z = \dfrac{x - y}{x + y}\);

(7) \(u = \ln(1 + x^2 + y^2 + z^2)\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) 记 \(\vct{r} = \left(\dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2}, \dfrac{1}{2}, -\dfrac{1}{2} ight)\). \(\D{u} = 2(x\D{x} + y\D{y} + z\D{z})\cos\dfrac{1}{x^2 + y^2 + z^2}\). 代入得 \(\D{u} ig\vert_{\vct{r}} = (\sqrt{2}\D{x} + \D{y} - \D{z})\cos 1\).

(3) 由于 \(z = (x + y)^2 = x^2 + 2xy + y^2\), 故 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = 2x + 2y\). 所以 \(\D{z} = 2(x + y){\D{x} + \D{y}}\).

(5) 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = \dfrac{(x + y) - (x - y)}{(x + y)^2} = \dfrac{2y}{(x + y)^2}\), \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = \dfrac{-(x + y) - (x - y)}{(x + y)^2} = -\dfrac{2x}{(x + y)^2}\), 故 \(\D{z} = \dfrac{2(y\D{x} - x\D{y})}{(x + y)^2}\).

(7) \(\D{u} = \dfrac{2x\D{x} + 2y\D{y} + 2z\D{z}}{1 + x^2 + y^2 + z^2} = \dfrac{2(x\D{x} + y\D{y} + z\D{z})}{1 + x^2 + y^2 + z^2}\).

\paragraph{第7题}

设 \(\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial x}(x_0, y_0)\) 存在, \(\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial y}(x, y)\) 连续, 证明 \(f(x, y)\) 在点 \((x_0, y_0)\) 处可微.

\paragraph{证明}

考虑函数 \(f\) 在点 \((x_0, y_0)\) 处的该变量 \(\Delta f = f(x_0 + h, y_0 + k) - f(x_0, y_0)\). 利用一元函数的中值定理得

\[ egin{aligned} \Delta f & = f(x_0 + h, y_0 + k) - f(x_0 + h, y_0) + f(x_0 + h, y_0) - f(x_0, y_0) \ & = f_y(x_0 + h, y_0 + \mu k)k + f(x_0 + h, y_0) - f(x_0, y_0), \quad \mu \in (0, 1) \ & = f(x_0 + h, y_0) - f(x_0, y_0) + f_y(x_0, y_0)k + eta k, \end{aligned} \]

其中 \( eta = f_y(x_0 + h, y_0 + \mu k) - f_y(x_0, y_0)\).

由题知 \(f_y(x, y)\) 连续, 因此 \(\lim\limits_{(h, k) o(0, 0)} eta(h, k) = 0\). 由题知 \(\lim\limits_{(x, y) o(x_0, y_0)}\dfrac{f(x_0 + h, y_0) - f(x_0, y_0)}{h} = \dfrac{\partial f}{\partial x}(x_0, y_0)\) 存在, 这说明 \(f(x_0 + h, y_0) - f(x_0, y_0)\) 是关于 \(h\) 的一阶无穷小. 不妨记 \(f(x_0 + h, y_0) - f(x_0, y_0) = \lambda h\). 故 \(\Delta f = \lambda h + f_y(x_0, y_0)k + eta k = \lambda h + f_y(x_0, y_0)k + o( ho)\). 此即 \(f\) 在点 \((x_0, y_0)\) 处可微. 命题得证.

\paragraph{第8题}

设函数 \(f(x, y) = \sqrt[3]{xy}\), 证明: 函数 \(f\) 在原点处连续、偏导数存在, 但沿方向 \(l = (a, b)(ab eq 0)\) 的方向导数不存在.

\paragraph{证明}

由于 \(f\) 是初等函数的复合, 所以函数 \(f\) 在原点处连续. 因为 \(f'_x(0, 0) = \lim\limits_{\Delta x o 0}\dfrac{f(\Delta x, 0) - f(0, 0)}{\Delta x} = 0, f'_y(0, 0) = \lim\limits_{\Delta y o 0}\dfrac{f(0, \Delta y) - f(0, 0)}{\Delta y} = 0\), 所以 \(f\) 在原点处的偏导数均存在. 设 \(l\) 单位化得 \(l_0 = (\cos heta, \sin heta), heta eq \dfrac{k\pi}{2}, k \in \set{N}\). 则沿着 \(l_0\) 的方向导数 \(\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial l_0} = \lim\limits_{d o 0}\dfrac{f(d\cos heta, d\sin heta) - f(0, 0)}{d} = \sqrt[3]{\dfrac{\cos heta\sin heta}{d}}\). 由于 \( heta eq \dfrac{k\pi}{2}, k \in \set{N}\), 故该极限不存在. 因此题中所表述的方向导数不存在. 命题得证.

\paragraph{第11题}

求下列函数在点 \(P_0\) 处沿方向 \(l\) 的方向导数.

(1) \(z = \cos (x + y), P_0 = \left(0, \dfrac{\pi}{2} ight), l = (3, -4)\);

(3) \(z = \sum\limits_{i = 1}^n\sum\limits_{j = 1}^nx_ix_j, P(1, 1, \cdots, 1), l = (-1, -1, \cdots, -1)\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = -\sin(x + y)\), 且将 \(l\) 单位化后得到 \(r = \left(\dfrac{3}{5}, -\dfrac{4}{5} ight)\), 所以 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial l} = -\dfrac{3}{5}\sin(0 + \dfrac{\pi}{2}) + \dfrac{4}{5}\sin(0 + \dfrac{\pi}{2}) = \dfrac{1}{5}\).

(3) 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x_i} = 2\sum\limits_{j = 1}^nx_j\), 且将 \(l\) 单位化后得到 \(r = \left(-\dfrac{1}{\sqrt{n}}, -\dfrac{1}{\sqrt{n}}, \cdots, -\dfrac{1}{\sqrt{n}} ight)\), 所以将 \(P(1, 1, \cdots, 1)\) 代入得 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial l} = 2\sum\limits_{j = 1}^nn\left(-\dfrac{1}{\sqrt{n}} ight) = -2n\sqrt{n}\).

\paragraph{第12题}

求下列数量场的梯度.

(1) \(u(x, y) = \sqrt{x^2 + y^2}\);

(3) \(u(x_1, x_2, \cdots, x_n) = \sum\limits_{i = 1}^nx_i\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} = \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} = \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}}\), 故 \( abla u = \left(\dfrac{1}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}}, \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} ight)\).

(3) 由于 \( orall i \in [1, n], \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x_i} = 1\), 故 \( abla u = (1, 1, \cdots, 1)\).

\paragraph{第13题}

已知函数 \(u(x, y, z) = x^2 + y^2 + z^2 - xy - xz + yz\) 及点 \(P(1, 1, 1)\), 求 \(u\) 在 \(P\) 点的方向导数 \(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial l}\) 的最值, 并指出取得最值时的方向, 以及哪个方向的方向导数为零.

\paragraph{解}

\(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} = 2x - y - z, \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} = 2y - x + z, \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial z} = 2z - x + y\). 因此在 \(P\) 点处梯度的方向为 \((0, 2, 2)\), 单位化可得 \(l_0 = \left(0, \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2}, \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2} ight)\). 将 \(P(1, 1, 1)\) 以及 \(\pm l_0\) 代入可得 \(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial l}\) 的最大值为 \(2\sqrt{2}\), 方向为 \(\left(0, \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2}, \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2} ight)\); 最小值为 \(-2\sqrt{2}\), 方向为 \(\left(0, -\dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2}, -\dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2} ight)\). 对任意一个垂直于梯度的方向 \((k, 1, -1)(k \in \set{R})\) 或 \((k, -1, 1)(k \in \set{R})\),都有方向导数为 \(0\).

\paragraph{第14题}

求下列函数的二阶偏导数 \(\dfrac{\partial^2 u}{\partial x^2}, \dfrac{\partial^2 u}{\partial y^2}, \dfrac{\partial^2 u}{\partial x\partial y}\).

(1) \(u = \cos^2(ax - by)\);

(3) \(u = xe^{-xy}\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} = 2\cos(ax - by)\cdot(-\sin(ax - by))\cdot a = -a\sin(2ax - 2by)\), \(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} = 2\cos(ax - by)\cdot(-\sin(ax - by))\cdot (-b) = b\sin(2ax - 2by)\), 故 \(\dfrac{\partial ^2u}{\partial x^2} = -2a^2\cos(2ax - 2by), \dfrac{\partial ^2u}{\partial y^2} = -2b^2\cos(2ax - 2by), \dfrac{\partial ^2u}{\partial x\partial y} = 2ab\cos(2ax - 2by)\).

(3) 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} = e^{-xy} + -xye^{-xy} = (1 - xy)e^{-xy}\), \(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} = xe^{-xy}\cdot(-x) = -x^2e^{-xy}\), 故 \(\dfrac{\partial ^2u}{\partial x^2} = ye^{-xy}(xy - 2), \dfrac{\partial ^2u}{\partial y^2} = x^3e^{-xy}, \dfrac{\partial ^2u}{\partial x\partial y} = xe^{-xy}(xy - 2)\).

\paragraph{第15题}

证明下列函数满足相应的等式.

(1) \(u = 2\cos^2\left(x - \dfrac{y}{2} ight)\) 满足 \(2\dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial y^2} + \dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial x \partial y} = 0\);

(3) \( egin{cases}u = e^x\cos y, \ v = e^x\sin y\end{cases}\) 满足 Cauchy-Riemann 条件 \( egin{cases}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} = \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial y}, \ \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} = -\dfrac{\partial v}{\partial x}\end{cases}\), 且分别满足 Laplace 方程 \(\dfrac{\partial^2 f}{\partial x^2} + \dfrac{\partial^2 f}{\partial y^2} = 0\);

\paragraph{证明}

(1) 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} = \sin(2x - y)\), 所以 \(\dfrac{\partial ^2u}{\partial y^2} = -\cos(2x - y), \dfrac{\partial ^2u}{\partial x\partial y} = 2\cos(2x - y)\). 代入有 \(2\dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial y^2} + \dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial x \partial y} = -2\cos(2x - y) + \cos(2x - y) = 0\). 命题得证.

(3) \(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} = e^x\cos y, \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} = -e^x\sin y, \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial x} = e^x\sin y, \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial y} = e^x\cos y\). 代入可知其满足 Cauchy-Riemann 条件. \(\dfrac{\partial ^2u}{\partial x^2} = e^x\cos y, \dfrac{\partial ^2u}{\partial y^2} = -e^x\cos y, \dfrac{\partial ^2v}{\partial x^2} = e^x\sin y, \dfrac{\partial ^2v}{\partial y^2} = -e^x\sin y\). 代入可知其分别满足 Laplace 方程. 命题得证.

docs.title: 习题1.5
docs.text:
\subsection{习题1.5解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

求下列变换所确定的向量值函数 \( egin{pmatrix}u \ v\end{pmatrix} = egin{pmatrix}f_1(x, y) \ f_2(x, y)\end{pmatrix}\) 的 Jacobi 矩阵 \(\dfrac{\partial(u, v)}{\partial(x, y)}\), 并指出在哪些区域 Jacobi 矩阵可逆.

(1) \( egin{cases}u = \sqrt{x^2 + y^2}, \ v = \arctan\dfrac{y}{x};\end{cases}\)

(3) \( egin{cases}u = \dfrac{x}{x^2 + y^2}, \ v = \dfrac{y}{x^2 + y^2};\end{cases}\)

\paragraph{解}

(1)

\[ J= egin{pmatrix} \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} & \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} \ \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial x} & \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial y} \end{pmatrix} = egin{pmatrix} \dfrac{2x}{2\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} & \dfrac{2y}{2\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} \ \dfrac{1}{1 + \left(\dfrac{y}{x} ight)^2}\cdot\left(-\dfrac{y}{x^2} ight) & \dfrac{1}{1 + \left(\dfrac{y}{x} ight)^2}\cdot\dfrac{1}{x} \end{pmatrix} = egin{pmatrix} \dfrac{x}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} & \dfrac{y}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} \ \dfrac{-y}{x^2 + y^2} & \dfrac{x}{x^2 + y^2} \end{pmatrix} \]

且 \(\det{J} eq 0 \iff x^2 + y^2 eq 0\), 故在 \(\set{R}^2 ackslash \{(0, 0)\}\) 处 Jacobi 矩阵可逆.

(3)

\[ J= egin{pmatrix} \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} & \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} \ \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial x} & \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial y} \end{pmatrix} = egin{pmatrix} \dfrac{x^2 + y^2 - x\cdot 2x}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} & \dfrac{-x\cdot 2y}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} \ \dfrac{-y\cdot 2x}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} & \dfrac{x^2 + y^2 - y\cdot 2y}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} \end{pmatrix} = egin{pmatrix} \dfrac{y^2 - x^2}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} & \dfrac{-2xy}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} \ \dfrac{-2xy}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} & \dfrac{x^2 - y^2}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} \end{pmatrix} \]

且 \(\det{J} eq 0 \iff x^2 + y^2 eq 0\), 故在 \(\set{R}^2 ackslash \{(0, 0)\}\) 处 Jacobi 矩阵可逆.

\paragraph{第2题}

求变换 \( egin{cases}x = r\sin heta\cos\phi, \ y = r\cos heta\cos\phi, \ z=r\sin\phi,\end{cases}r>0, 0\le heta \le 2\pi, 0 \le \phi \le pi\) 确定的向量值函数 \( egin{pmatrix}x \ y \ z\end{pmatrix} = egin{pmatrix}f_1(r, heta, \phi) \ f_2(r, heta, \phi) \ f_3(r, heta, \phi)\end{pmatrix}\) 的 Jacobi 矩阵.

\paragraph{解}

\[ J = egin{pmatrix} \dfrac{\partial x}{\partial r} & \dfrac{\partial x}{\partial heta} & \dfrac{\partial x}{\partial \phi} \ \dfrac{\partial y}{\partial r} & \dfrac{\partial y}{\partial heta} & \dfrac{\partial y}{\partial \phi} \ \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial r} & \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial heta} & \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial \phi} \end{pmatrix} = egin{pmatrix} \sin heta & r\cos heta\cos\phi & -r\sin heta\sin\phi \ \cos heta\cos\phi & -r\sin heta\cos\phi & -r\cos heta\sin\phi \ \sin\phi & 0 & r\cos\phi \end{pmatrix} \]

\paragraph{第3题}

求下列复合函数的偏导数 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}\) (已知 \(f\) 为可微函数).

(1) \(z = \arctan \dfrac{u}{v}, u = x^2 + y^2, v = xy\);

(3) \(z = f(x^2 - y^2, e^{xy})\);

(5) \(z = xy + \dfrac{y}{x}f(xy)\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial u}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} + \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial v}\dfrac{\partial v}{\partial x} = \dfrac{\dfrac{1}{v}}{1 + \left(\dfrac{u}{v} ight)^2}\cdot 2x + \dfrac{-\dfrac{u}{v^2}}{1 + \left(\dfrac{u}{v} ight)^2}\cdot y = \dfrac{y(x^2 - y^2)}{x^4 + 3x^2y^2 + y^4}\).

\(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial u}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} + \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial v}\dfrac{\partial v}{\partial y} = \dfrac{\dfrac{1}{v}}{1 + \left(\dfrac{u}{v} ight)^2}\cdot 2y + \dfrac{-\dfrac{u}{v^2}}{1 + \left(\dfrac{u}{v} ight)^2}\cdot x = \dfrac{x(y^2 - x^2)}{x^4 + 3x^2y^2 + y^4}\).

(3) \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial u}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} + \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial v}\dfrac{\partial v}{\partial x} = f_1'(x^2 - y^2, e^{xy})\cdot 2x + f_2'(x^2 - y^2, e^{xy})\cdot ye^{xy} = 2xf_1' + ye^{xy}f_2'\).

\(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial u}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} + \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial v}\dfrac{\partial v}{\partial y} = f_1'(x^2 - y^2, e^{xy})\cdot (-2y) + f_2'(x^2 - y^2, e^{xy})\cdot xe^{xy} = -2yf_1' + xe^{xy}f_2'\).

(5) \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial u}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} + \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial v}\dfrac{\partial v}{\partial x} = y + \dfrac{y^2f'(xy)x-yf(xy)}{x^2} = y + \dfrac{y^2f'(xy)}{x} - \dfrac{yf(xy)}{x^2}\).

\(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial u}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} + \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial v}\dfrac{\partial v}{\partial y} = x + \dfrac{f(xy) + yxf'(xy)}{x} = x + yf'(xy) + \dfrac{f(xy)}{x}\).

\paragraph{第4题}

已知函数 \(z = u\ln(u - v)\), 其中 \(u = e^{-x}, v = \ln x\), 求 \(\dfrac{\D{z}}{\D{x}}\).

\paragraph{解}

\[ egin{aligned} \dfrac{\D{z}}{\D{x}} & = \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial u}\dfrac{\D{u}}{\D{x}} + \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial v}\dfrac{\D{v}}{\D{x}} \ & = \left(\ln(u - v) + \dfrac{u}{u - v} ight)\cdot (-e^{-x}) + \dfrac{u}{u - v}\cdot\left(-\dfrac{1}{x} ight) \ & = -e^{-x}\ln(e^{-x}-\ln x) - \dfrac{e^{-2x}}{e^{-x} - \ln x} - \dfrac{e^{-x}}{x(e^{-x} - \ln x)} \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第5题}

已知函数 \(u = f(x, y)\), 其中 \(x = r\cos heta, y = r\sin heta\), \(f\) 可微, 证明:

\[ \left(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial r} ight)^2 + \left(\dfrac{1}{r}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial heta} ight)^2 = \left(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} ight)^2 + \left(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} ight)^2. \]

\paragraph{证明}

由于 \(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial r} = \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x}\dfrac{\partial x}{\partial r} + \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y}\dfrac{\partial y}{\partial r} = \cos heta \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} + \sin heta \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y}, \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial heta} = \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x}\dfrac{\partial x}{\partial heta} + \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y}\dfrac{\partial y}{\partial heta} = -r\sin heta \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial heta} + r\cos heta \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial heta}\), 所以代入得

\[ egin{aligned} \left(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial r} ight)^2 + \left(\dfrac{1}{r}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial heta} ight)^2 & = \left(\cos heta \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} + \sin heta \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} ight)^2 + \left(-\sin heta \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial heta} + \cos heta \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial heta} ight)^2 \ & = \left(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} ight)^2 + \left(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} ight)^2. \end{aligned} \]

命题得证.

\paragraph{第6题}

设 \(f\) 可微, \(u = xy + xf\left(\dfrac{y}{x} ight)\), 证明: \(x\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} + y\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} = u + xy\).

\paragraph{证明}

由于 \(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} = y + f\left(\dfrac{y}{x} ight) - \dfrac{y}{x}f'\left(\dfrac{y}{x} ight), \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} = x + f'\left(\dfrac{y}{x} ight)\), 所以代入得

\[ egin{aligned} x\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} + y\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} & = xy + xf\left(\dfrac{y}{x} ight) - yf'\left(\dfrac{y}{x} ight) + xy + yf'\left(\dfrac{y}{x} ight) \ & = 2xy + xf\left(\dfrac{y}{x} ight) \ & = u + xy \end{aligned} \]

命题得证.

\paragraph{第7题}

设 \(f \in C^2(\set{R}^2)\) 满足 Laplace 方程 \(\dfrac{\partial ^2f}{\partial x^2} + \dfrac{\partial ^2f}{\partial y^2} = 0\), 证明: \(u(x, y) = f\left(\dfrac{x}{x^2 + y^2}, \dfrac{y}{x^2 + y^2} ight)\) 也满足 Laplace 方程.

\paragraph{证明}

\(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} = u_1'\dfrac{y^2 - x^2}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} + u_2'\dfrac{-2xy}{(x^2 + y^2)^2}\).

\[ egin{aligned} \dfrac{\partial^2 u}{\partial x^2} & = \dfrac{\partial}{\partial x}\left(u_1'\dfrac{y^2 - x^2}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} ight) + \dfrac{\partial}{\partial x}\left(u_2'\dfrac{-2xy}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} ight) \ & = u_{11}'\left(\dfrac{y^2 - x^2}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} ight)^2 - (u_{12}' + u_{21}')\dfrac{2xy(y^2 - x^2)}{(x^2 + y^2)^4} + u_{22}'\left(\dfrac{-2xy}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} ight)^2 \ & + u_1'\dfrac{-2x(3y^2 - x^2)}{(x^2 + y^2)^3} + u_2'\dfrac{2y(3x^2 - y^2)}{(x^2 + y^2)^3} \end{aligned} \]

同理可得

\[ egin{aligned} \dfrac{\partial^2 u}{\partial y^2} & = u_{11}'\left(\dfrac{-2xy}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} ight)^2 + (u_{12}' + u_{21}')\dfrac{2xy(y^2 - x^2)}{(x^2 + y^2)^4} + u_{22}'\left(\dfrac{y^2 - x^2}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} ight)^2 \ & + u_2'\dfrac{-2y(3x^2 - y^2)}{(x^2 + y^2)^3} + u_1'\dfrac{2x(3y^2 - x^2)}{(x^2 + y^2)^3} \end{aligned} \]

由题知 \(f\) 满足 Laplace 方程, 则 \(u_{11}' + u_{22}' = 0\). 则

\[ egin{aligned} \dfrac{\partial^2 u}{\partial x^2} + \dfrac{\partial^2 u}{\partial y^2} & = u_{11}'\left(\dfrac{y^2 - x^2}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} ight)^2 - (u_{12}' + u_{21}')\dfrac{2xy(y^2 - x^2)}{(x^2 + y^2)^4} + u_{22}'\left(\dfrac{-2xy}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} ight)^2 \ & + u_1'\dfrac{-2x(3y^2 - x^2)}{(x^2 + y^2)^3} + u_2'\dfrac{2y(3x^2 - y^2)}{(x^2 + y^2)^3} \ & + u_{11}'\left(\dfrac{-2xy}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} ight)^2 + (u_{12}' + u_{21}')\dfrac{2xy(y^2 - x^2)}{(x^2 + y^2)^4} + u_{22}'\left(\dfrac{y^2 - x^2}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} ight)^2 \ & + u_2'\dfrac{-2y(3x^2 - y^2)}{(x^2 + y^2)^3} + u_1'\dfrac{2x(3y^2 - x^2)}{(x^2 + y^2)^3} \ & = (u_{11}' + u_{22}')\left[\left(\dfrac{-2xy}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} ight)^2 +\left(\dfrac{y^2 - x^2}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} ight)^2 ight] \ & = 0 \end{aligned} \]

命题得证.

\paragraph{第8题}

已知变换 \( egin{cases} w=x+y+z, \u=x, \ v=x+y,\end{cases}\) 化简方程 \(\dfrac{\partial ^2z}{\partial x^2} - 2\dfrac{\partial ^2z}{\partial x \partial y} + \dfrac{\partial ^2z}{\partial y^2} + \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} - \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = 0\), 以 \(w\) 为因变量, \(u, v\) 为自变量.

\paragraph{解}

化简得 \(z = -x - y + w\). 因此

\[ egin{aligned} \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} & = \dfrac{\partial w}{\partial x} - 1 = \dfrac{\partial w}{\partial u}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} + \dfrac{\partial w}{\partial v}\dfrac{\partial v}{\partial x} - 1 = \dfrac{\partial w}{\partial u} + \dfrac{\partial w}{\partial v} - 1, \ \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} & = \dfrac{\partial w}{\partial y} - 1 = \dfrac{\partial w}{\partial u}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} + \dfrac{\partial w}{\partial v}\dfrac{\partial v}{\partial y} - 1 = \dfrac{\partial w}{\partial v} - 1. \end{aligned} \]

故 \(\dfrac{\partial^2 z}{\partial x^2} = \dfrac{\partial^2 w}{\partial u^2} + 2\dfrac{\partial^2 w}{\partial u\partial v} + \dfrac{\partial^2 w}{\partial v^2}, \dfrac{\partial^2 z}{\partial x\partial y} = \dfrac{\partial^2 w}{\partial u\partial v} + \dfrac{\partial^2 w}{\partial v^2}, \dfrac{\partial^2 z}{\partial y^2} = \dfrac{\partial^2 w}{\partial v^2}\).

则

\[ egin{aligned} &\; \; \; \; \; \; \; \; \dfrac{\partial ^2z}{\partial x^2} - 2\dfrac{\partial ^2z}{\partial x \partial y} + \dfrac{\partial ^2z}{\partial y^2} + \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} - \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} \ & = \left(\dfrac{\partial^2 w}{\partial u^2} + 2\dfrac{\partial^2 w}{\partial u\partial v} + \dfrac{\partial^2 w}{\partial v^2} ight) - 2\left(\dfrac{\partial^2 w}{\partial u\partial v} + \dfrac{\partial^2 w}{\partial v^2} ight) + \dfrac{\partial^2 w}{\partial v^2} + \left(\dfrac{\partial w}{\partial u} + \dfrac{\partial w}{\partial v} - 1 ight) - \left(\dfrac{\partial w}{\partial v} - 1 ight) \ & = \dfrac{\partial^2w}{\partial u^2} + \dfrac{\partial w}{\partial u} \end{aligned} \]

所以化简为 \(\dfrac{\partial^2w}{\partial u^2} + \dfrac{\partial w}{\partial u} = 0\).

\paragraph{第9题}

向量值函数 \(\vct{Y} = \vct{f}(\vct{U}), \vct{U} = \vct{g}(\vct{X})\) 均可微, 求复合函数 \(\vct{Y} = \vct{f} \circ \vct{g}(\vct{X})\) 的 Jacobi 矩阵和全微分.

(1) \( egin{cases} y_1 = u_1 + u_2 \ y_2 = u_1u_2 \ y_3 = \dfrac{u_2}{u_1},\end{cases} egin{cases}u_1 = \dfrac{x}{x^2 + y^2}, \ u_2 = \dfrac{y}{x^2 + y^2};\end{cases}\)

\paragraph{解}

(1) 因为

\[ J_{\vct{g}} = egin{pmatrix}\dfrac{\partial u_1}{\partial x} & \dfrac{\partial u_1}{\partial y} \ \dfrac{\partial u_2}{\partial x} & \dfrac{\partial u_2}{\partial y}\end{pmatrix} = egin{pmatrix}\dfrac{y^2 - x^2}{x^2 + y^2} & \dfrac{-2xy}{x^2 + y^2} \ \dfrac{-2xy}{x^2 + y^2} & \dfrac{x^2 - y^2}{x^2 + y^2}\end{pmatrix}, \] \[ J_{\vct{f}} = egin{pmatrix}\dfrac{\partial y_1}{\partial u_1} & \dfrac{\partial y_1}{\partial u_2} \ \dfrac{\partial y_2}{\partial u_1} & \dfrac{\partial y_2}{\partial u_2} \ \dfrac{\partial y_3}{\partial u_1} & \dfrac{\partial y_3}{\partial u_2}\end{pmatrix} = egin{pmatrix}1 & 1 \ \dfrac{y}{x^2 + y^2} & \dfrac{x}{x^2 + y^2} \ -\dfrac{y}{x} & \dfrac{x^2 + y^2}{x}\end{pmatrix}, \]

所以 \(J = J_{\vct{f}}J_{\vct{g}} = egin{pmatrix}1 & 1 \ \dfrac{y}{x^2 + y^2} & \dfrac{x}{x^2 + y^2} \ -\dfrac{y}{x} & \dfrac{x^2 + y^2}{x}\end{pmatrix} egin{pmatrix}\dfrac{y^2 - x^2}{x^2 + y^2} & \dfrac{-2xy}{x^2 + y^2} \ \dfrac{-2xy}{x^2 + y^2} & \dfrac{x^2 - y^2}{x^2 + y^2}\end{pmatrix}\), 且全微分 \(\D{\vct{Y}} = J egin{pmatrix}\D{x} \ \D{y}\end{pmatrix}\).

docs.title: 习题1.6
docs.text:
\subsection{习题1.6解答}

\paragraph{第2题}

下列方程中, 在哪些点附近可以确定一个函数 \(y = y(x)\) 或 \(z = z(x, y)\), 并求出相应的 \(\dfrac{\D{y}}{\D{x}}\) 或 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}\).

(1) \((x^2 + y^2)^2 = a^2(y^2 - x^2)\);

(2) \(e^{-(x + y + z)} = x + y + z\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) 设 \(F(x, y) = (x^2 + y^2)^2 - a^2(y^2 - x^2)\). 在满足 \(y_0 eq 0, x_0^2 + y_0^2 eq \dfrac{a^2}{2}\) 的点附近可以确定 \(y = y(x)\), 且 \(\dfrac{\D{y}}{\D{x}} = -\dfrac{\dfrac{\partial F}{\partial x}}{\dfrac{\partial F}{\partial y}} = -\dfrac{2x^3 + (2y^2 + a^2)x}{2y^3 + (2x^2 - a^2)y}\).

(2) 设 \(F(x, y, z) = e^{-(x + y + z)} - (x + y + z)\). 在 \(\set{R}^2\) 上的所有点附近都可以确定 \(z = z(x, y)\), 且 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = -\dfrac{\dfrac{\partial F}{\partial x}}{\dfrac{\partial F}{\partial z}} = -\dfrac{-e^{-(x + y + z)} - 1}{-e^{-(x + y + z)} - 1} = -1, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = -\dfrac{\dfrac{\partial F}{\partial y}}{\dfrac{\partial F}{\partial z}} = -\dfrac{-e^{-(x + y + z)} - 1}{-e^{-(x + y + z)} - 1} = -1\).

\paragraph{第3题}

下列方程均确定了函数 \(z = z(x, y)\), 分别求解下列各表达式的值.

(1) \(f(ax - cz, ay - bz) = 0\), \(f\) 可微, 计算: \(c\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} + b\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}\);

(3) \(f(x, x + y, x + y + z) = 0\), \(f\) 二阶可微, 计算: \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}, \dfrac{\partial ^2z}{\partial x^2}\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = -\dfrac{\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial x}}{\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial z}} = -\dfrac{f_1'\cdot a}{f_1'\cdot (-c) + f_2'\cdot (-b)} = \dfrac{f_1'\cdot a}{f_1'\cdot c + f_2'\cdot b}\). 同理 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = \dfrac{f_2'\cdot a}{f_1'\cdot c + f_2'\cdot b}\). 故 \(c\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} + b\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = \dfrac{f_1'\cdot ac}{f_1'\cdot c + f_2'\cdot b} + \dfrac{f_2'\cdot ab}{f_1'\cdot c + f_2'\cdot b} = a\).

(3) \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = -\dfrac{\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial x}}{\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial z}} = -\dfrac{f_1' + f_2' + f_3'}{f_3'}\), \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = -\dfrac{\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial x}}{\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial z}} = -\dfrac{f_2' + f_3'}{f_3'}\). 故

\[ egin{aligned} \dfrac{\partial ^2z}{\partial x^2} &= \dfrac{\partial }{\partial x}\left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} ight) \ & = -\dfrac{[(f_{11}'' + f_{12}'' + f_{13}''\cdot\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}) + (f_{21}'' + f_{22}'' + f_{23}''\cdot\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}) + (f_{31}'' + f_{32}'' + f_{33}''\cdot\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x})]\cdot f_3'}{(f_3')^2} \ & - \dfrac{(f_1' + f_2' + f_3')(f_{31}'' + f_{32}'' + f_{33}''\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x})}{(f_3')^2} \ & = - \dfrac{(f_{11}'' + 2f_{12}'' + f_{22}'')}{f_3'} + \dfrac{2(f_1' + f_2')(f_{13}'' + f_{23}'')}{(f_3')^2} - \dfrac{(f_1' + f_2')^2f_{33}''}{(f_3')^3} \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第4题}

设方程 \(f(u^2 - x^2, u^2 - y^2, u^2 - z^2) = 0\) 确定了函数 \(u = u(x, y, z)\), 其中 \(f\) 可微, 证明:

\[ \dfrac{1}{x}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} + \dfrac{1}{y}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} + \dfrac{1}{z}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial z} = \dfrac{1}{u}. \]

\paragraph{证明}

\[ \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} = -\dfrac{\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial x}}{\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial u}} = -\dfrac{f_x'\cdot(-2x)}{f_x'\cdot (2u) + f_y'\cdot (2u) + f_z'\cdot (2u)} = \dfrac{x}{u}\cdot\dfrac{f_x'}{f_x' + f_y' + f_z'} \]

同理有 \(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} = \dfrac{y}{u}\cdot\dfrac{f_y'}{f_x' + f_y' + f_z'}, \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial z} = \dfrac{z}{u}\cdot\dfrac{f_z'}{f_x' + f_y' + f_z'}\). 故 \(\dfrac{1}{x}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} + \dfrac{1}{y}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} + \dfrac{1}{z}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial z} = \dfrac{1}{u}\cdot\dfrac{f_x' + f_y' + f_z'}{f_x' + f_y' + f_z'} = \dfrac{1}{u}\). 命题得证.

\paragraph{第5题}

方程组 \( egin{cases}x = u + v, \ y = u - v, \ z = u^2v^2\end{cases}\) 能否确定 \(z\) 是 \(x, y\) 的函数? 如果能, 求 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}\); 如果不能, 说明理由.

\paragraph{解}

由方程组可解得

\[ egin{cases} u = \dfrac{x + y}{2}, \ v = \dfrac{x - y}{2}. \end{cases} \]

因此 \(z = u^2v^2 = \dfrac{1}{16}(x^4 - 2x^2y^2 + y^4)\) 是 \(x, y\) 的函数. \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = \dfrac{1}{4}(x^3 - xy^2)\), \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = \dfrac{1}{4}(y^3 - x^2y)\).

\paragraph{第6题}

方程组 \( egin{cases}x + y + z + z^2 = 0, \ x + y^2 + z + z^3 = 0\end{cases}\) 在点 \(P(-1, 1, 0)\) 附近能否确定向量值函数 \( egin{pmatrix}y\z\end{pmatrix}=\vct{f}(x)\), 如果能确定, 求出 \(y'(-1), z'(-1)\).

\paragraph{解}

记 \(F(x, y, z) = x + y + z + z^2, G(x, y, z) = x + y^2 + z + z^3\). 计算得 \(\dfrac{\partial(F, G)}{\partial(y, z)} = egin{pmatrix}1 & 1 + 2z \ 2y & z + 3z^2\end{pmatrix}\). 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial(F, G)}{\partial(y, z)} igg\vert_{(1, 0)} = egin{pmatrix}1 & 1 \ 2 & 0\end{pmatrix}\) 可逆, 故能确定向量值函数 \(\vct{f}(x)\). 且有 \(y(-1) = 1, z(-1) = 0\). 对 \( egin{cases}F(x, y, z) = 0, \ G(x, y, z) = 0\end{cases}\) 求导得 \( egin{cases}1 + y'(x) + z'(x) + 2z(x)z'(x) = 0, \ 1 + 2y(x)y'(x) + z'(x) + 3z^2(x)z'(x) = 0.\end{cases}\) 将 \(x = 1\) 代入有 \( egin{cases}1 + y'(-1) + z'(-1) = 0, \1 + 2y'(-1) + z'(-1) = 0.\end{cases}\) 解得 \(y'(-1) = 0, z'(-1) = -1\).

\paragraph{第9题}

求下列向量值函数的逆映射的 Jacobi 矩阵以及 Jacobi 行列式.

(1) \( egin{cases}u = x^2 - y^2, \ v = 2xy;\end{cases}\)

(3) \( egin{cases}u = x^3 - y^3, \ v = xy^2;\end{cases}\)

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(J = egin{pmatrix}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} & \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} \ \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial x} & \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial y}\end{pmatrix}^{-1} = egin{pmatrix}2x & -2y \ 2y & 2x\end{pmatrix}^{-1} = \dfrac{1}{2(x^2 + y^2)} egin{pmatrix}x & y \ -y & x\end{pmatrix}\). \(\left|J ight| = \dfrac{1}{4(x^2 + y^2)}\).

(3) \(J = egin{pmatrix}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} & \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} \ \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial x} & \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial y}\end{pmatrix}^{-1} = egin{pmatrix}3x^2 & -3y^2 \ y^2 & 2xy\end{pmatrix}^{-1} = \dfrac{1}{6x^3y + 3y^4} egin{pmatrix}2xy & 3y^2 \ -y^2 & 3x^2\end{pmatrix}\). \(\left|J ight| = \dfrac{1}{6x^3y + 3y^4}\).

\paragraph{第10题}

下列由可微向量值函数 \(\vct{g}:(\xi, \eta)\mapsto(u, v)\) 和 \(\vct{f}:(x, y)\mapsto(\xi, \eta)\) 复合而成的复合向量值函数 \(\vct{g}\circ\vct{f}\) 在 \((x_0, y_0)\) 的邻域内能否确定可微的逆向量值函数 \((\vct{g}\circ\vct{f})^{-1}\)?

(1) \( egin{cases}u = \xi^2 - \eta^2, \ v = 2\xi\eta,\end{cases} egin{cases}\xi = e^x\cos y,\ \eta = e^x\sin y,\end{cases}(x_0, y_0) = (1, 0)\);

(3) \( egin{cases}u = \xi^5 + \eta, \ v = \eta^5 - \xi,\end{cases} egin{cases}\xi = x^3-y^3,\ \eta = x^2+2y^2,\end{cases}(x_0, y_0) = (1, 0)\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(\vct{g}\) 的逆映射的 Jacobi 矩阵为 \(J_g = egin{pmatrix}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial \xi} & \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial \eta} \ \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial \xi} & \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial \eta}\end{pmatrix}^{-1} = egin{pmatrix}2\xi & -2\eta \ 2\eta & 2\xi\end{pmatrix}^{-1} = \dfrac{1}{2(\xi^2 + \eta^2)} egin{pmatrix}\xi & \eta \ -\eta & \xi\end{pmatrix}\). \(\vct{f}\) 的逆映射的 Jacobi 矩阵为 \(J_f = egin{pmatrix}\dfrac{\partial \xi}{\partial x} & \dfrac{\partial \xi}{\partial y} \ \dfrac{\partial \eta}{\partial x} & \dfrac{\partial \eta}{\partial y}\end{pmatrix}^{-1} = egin{pmatrix}e^x\cos y & -e^x\sin y \ e^x\sin y & e^x\cos y\end{pmatrix}^{-1} = \dfrac{1}{e^{2x}} egin{pmatrix}e^x\cos y & e^x\sin y \ -e^x\sin y & e^x\cos y\end{pmatrix}\). 当 \(x = x_0 = 1, y = y_0 = 0\) 时, \(\left|J_f ight| eq 0, \left|J_g ight| eq 0\), 故能确定. 且 \((\vct{g}\circ\vct{f})^{-1}\) 的 Jacobi 矩阵为 \(J_fJ_g\).

(3) \(\vct{g}\) 的逆映射的 Jacobi 矩阵为 \(J_g = egin{pmatrix}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial \xi} & \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial \eta} \ \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial \xi} & \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial \eta}\end{pmatrix}^{-1} = egin{pmatrix}5\xi^4 & 1 \ -1 & 5\eta^4\end{pmatrix}^{-1} = \dfrac{1}{25\xi^4\eta^4 + 1} egin{pmatrix}5\eta^4 & -1 \ 1 & 5\xi^4\end{pmatrix}\). \(\vct{f}\) 的逆映射的 Jacobi 矩阵为 \(J_f = egin{pmatrix}\dfrac{\partial \xi}{\partial x} & \dfrac{\partial \xi}{\partial y} \ \dfrac{\partial \eta}{\partial x} & \dfrac{\partial \eta}{\partial y}\end{pmatrix}^{-1} = egin{pmatrix}3x^2 & -3y^2 \ 2x & 4y\end{pmatrix}^{-1} = \dfrac{1}{12x^2y + 6xy^2} egin{pmatrix}4y & 3y^2 \ -2x & 3x^2\end{pmatrix}\). 当 \(x = x_0 = 1, y = y_0 = 0\) 时, \(J_f\) 前的系数分母为 \(0\), 故 \(J_f\) 不存在, 不能确定.

docs.title: 习题1.7
docs.text:
\subsection{习题1.7解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

求下列曲面在给定点的切平面方程和法线方程.

(1) \(z = x^2 + y^2\), 点 \(P(1, 2, 5)\);

(3) \((2a^2 - z^2)x^2 = a^2y^2\), 点 \(P(a, a, a)(a \neq 0)\);

(5) \(\begin{cases}x = u\cos v, \\ y = u\sin v, \\ z = av,\end{cases}\) 点 \((u, v) = (u_0, v_0)\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) 因为 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = 2x, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = 2y\), 所以切平面的表达式为 \(z = z_0 + 2x_0(x - x_0) + 2y_0(y - y_0)\). 将 \(P(1, 2, 5)\) 代入得 \(z = 2x + 4y - 5\). 法线的表达式为 \(\dfrac{x - 1}{2} = \dfrac{y - 2}{4} = \dfrac{z - 5}{-1}\).

(3) 记 \(F(x, y, z) = (2a^2 - z^2)x^2 - a^2y^2\). 则 \(\dfrac{\partial F}{\partial x} = 2x(2a^2 - z^2), \dfrac{\partial F}{\partial y} = -2a^2y, \dfrac{\partial F}{\partial z} = -2x^2z\). 代入 \(P(a, a, a)\) 得切平面表达式为 \(x - y - z + a = 0\), 法线表达式为 \(x - a = a - y = a - z\).

(5)

\[ \begin{aligned} A &= \begin{vmatrix} \dfrac{\partial y}{\partial u} & \dfrac{\partial y}{\partial v} \\ \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial u} & \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial v} \end{vmatrix} = \begin{vmatrix} \sin v & u\cos v \\ 0 & a \end{vmatrix} = a\sin v\\ B &= \begin{vmatrix} \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial u} & \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial v} \\ \dfrac{\partial x}{\partial u} & \dfrac{\partial x}{\partial v} \end{vmatrix} = \begin{vmatrix} 0 & a \\ \cos v & -u\sin v \end{vmatrix} = -a\cos v\\ C &= \begin{vmatrix} \dfrac{\partial x}{\partial u} & \dfrac{\partial x}{\partial v} \\ \dfrac{\partial y}{\partial u} & \dfrac{\partial y}{\partial v} \end{vmatrix} = \begin{vmatrix} \cos v & -u\sin v \\ \sin v & u\cos v \end{vmatrix} = u \end{aligned} \]

代入 \((u_0, v_0)\) 可得切平面为 \(a\sin v_0(x - u_0\cos v_0) - a\cos v_0(y - u_0\sin v_0) + u_0(z - av_0) = 0\), 法线为 \(\dfrac{x - u_0\cos v_0}{a\sin v_0} = \dfrac{y - u_0\sin v_0}{-a\cos v_0} = \dfrac{z - av_0}{u_0}\).

\paragraph{第2题}

在椭球面 \(\dfrac{x^2}{a^2} + \dfrac{y^2}{b^2} + \dfrac{z^2}{c^2} = 1\) 上求一点 \(P\), 使得过 \(P\) 点的法线与坐标轴正方向成等角.

\paragraph{解}

记 \(F(x, y, z) = \dfrac{x^2}{a^2} + \dfrac{y^2}{b^2} + \dfrac{z^2}{c^2} - 1\). 则 \(\dfrac{\partial F}{\partial x} = \dfrac{2x}{a^2}, \dfrac{\partial F}{\partial y} = \dfrac{2y}{b^2}, \dfrac{\partial F}{\partial z} = \dfrac{2z}{c^2}\). 因此在 \((x_0, y_0, z_0)\) 处的法向量为 \(\left(\dfrac{2x_0}{a^2}, \dfrac{2y_0}{b^2}, \dfrac{2z_0}{c^2}\right)\). 由于与三个坐标轴的正方向成等角, 因此有 \(\dfrac{2x_0}{a^2} = \dfrac{2y_0}{b^2} = \dfrac{2z_0}{c^2}\). 结合 \(F(x_0, y_0, z_0) = 0\) 解得满足条件的点 \(P\) 有两个, \(P_1 = \left(\dfrac{a^2}{\sqrt{a^2 + b^2 + c^2}}, \dfrac{b^2}{\sqrt{a^2 + b^2 + c^2}}, \dfrac{c^2}{\sqrt{a^2 + b^2 + c^2}}\right), P_2 = \left(-\dfrac{a^2}{\sqrt{a^2 + b^2 + c^2}}, -\dfrac{b^2}{\sqrt{a^2 + b^2 + c^2}}, -\dfrac{c^2}{\sqrt{a^2 + b^2 + c^2}}\right)\).

\paragraph{第3题}

求曲面 \(x^2 + 2y^2 + 3z^2 = 21\) 上平行于 \(x + 4y + 6z = 0\) 的切平面.

\paragraph{解}

设切点为 \(P(x_0, y_0, z_0)\). 记 \(F(x, y, z) = x^2 + 2y^2 + 3z^2 = 21\). 因为 \(\dfrac{\partial F}{\partial x} = 2x, \dfrac{\partial F}{\partial y} = 4y, \dfrac{\partial F}{\partial z} = 6z\), 所以切平面的法向量为 \((2x_0, 4y_0, 6z_0)\). 因为改平面平行于 \(x + 4y + 6z = 0\), 所以 \(\dfrac{2x_0}{1} = \dfrac{4y_0}{4} = \dfrac{6z_0}{6}\). 解得法平面为 \(x + 4y + 6z = 21\) 或 \(x + 4y + 6z = -21\).

\paragraph{第4题}

(1) 曲面 \(xyz = a^3\) 上的任一点的切平面与坐标平面围成的四面体的体积为定值;

(3) 曲面 \(z = x^2 + y^2\) 与直线 \(l:\begin{cases}x + 2z = 1, \\ y + 2z = 2\end{cases}\) 垂直的切平面;

(5) 设 \(f\) 可微, 曲面 \(z = yf\left(\dfrac{x}{y}\right)\) 的所有切平面相交于一个定点.

\paragraph{证明}

(1) 设 \(F(x, y, z) = xyz - a^3\). 则 \(\dfrac{\partial F}{\partial x} = yz, \dfrac{\partial F}{\partial y} = xz, \dfrac{\partial F}{\partial z} = xy\). 假设切点为 \((x_0, y_0, z_0)\), 则切平面的表达式为 \(y_0z_0(x - x_0) + x_0z_0(y - y_0) + x_0y_0(z - z_0) = 0\) 与坐标轴交点分别为 \((x_0, 0, 0), (0, y_0, 0), (0, 0, z_0)\). 体积即为 \(\dfrac{1}{6}x_0y_0z_0 = \dfrac{1}{12}a^3\) 为定值.

(3) 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = 2x, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = 2y\), 所以设切点为 \((x_0, y_0, z_0)\), 则法向量为 \((2x_0, 2y_0, -1)\). 而该直线能被表示为 \(\dfrac{x - 1}{2} = \dfrac{y - 2}{2} = \dfrac{z}{-1}\), 因此有 \(2x_0 = 2y_0 = 2\). 解得切点为 \((1, 1, 2)\). 所以切平面为 \(2(x - 1) + 2(y - 1) - (z - 2) = 0\).

(5) \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = yf'\left(\dfrac{x}{y}\right)\cdot \dfrac{1}{y} = f'\left(\dfrac{x}{y}\right), \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = f\left(\dfrac{x}{y}\right) + y\cdot f'\left(\dfrac{x}{y}\right)\cdot\left(-\dfrac{x}{y^2}\right) = f\left(\dfrac{x}{y}\right) - \dfrac{xf'\left(\dfrac{x}{y}\right)}{y}\). 因此在 \((x_0, y_0)\) 处的切平面的表达式为 \(f'\left(\dfrac{x_0}{y_0}\right)(x - x_0) + [f\left(\dfrac{x_0}{y_0}\right) - \dfrac{x_0f'\left(\dfrac{x_0}{y_0}\right)}{y_0}](y - y_0) + y_0f'\left(\dfrac{x_0}{y_0}\right) - z = 0\), 过定点 \((0, 0, 0)\).

\paragraph{第5题}

求曲线 \(l:\begin{cases}x^2 + y^2 + z^2 = 6, \\ x + y + z = 0\end{cases}\) 在点 \(P(1, -2, 1)\) 处的切线方程与法平面方程.

\paragraph{解}

记 \(F(x, y, z) = x^2 + y^2 + z^2 - 6, G(x, y, z) = x + y + z\). 则 \(\dfrac{\partial F}{\partial x} = 2x, \dfrac{\partial F}{\partial y} = 2y, \dfrac{\partial F}{\partial z} = 2z\), \(\dfrac{\partial G}{\partial x} = \dfrac{\partial G}{\partial y} = \dfrac{\partial G}{\partial z} = 1\). 因此代入 \(P(1, -2, 1)\), 有切线方程满足

\[ \begin{cases} 2(x - 1) - 4(y + 2) + 2(z - 1) = 0, \\ (x - 1) + (y + 2) + (z - 1) = 0. \end{cases} \]

法平面的方程则为 \(-(x - 1) + (z - 1) = 0\), 即为 \(x - z = 0\).

\paragraph{第6题}

证明: 螺旋线 \(\begin{cases}x = a\cos t, \\ y = a\sin t, \\ z = bt\end{cases}\) 的切线与 \(z\) 轴形成定角.

\paragraph{证明}

设切点在 \(t = t_0\) 处. 则切向量为 \(\vct{n} = (-a\sin t_0, a\cos t_0, b)\), 记沿着 \(z\) 轴正方向的单位向量为 \(\vct{k} = (0, 0, 1)\). 该切线与 \(z\) 轴正方向所夹角度 \(\theta\) 满足 \(\cos\theta = \dfrac{\vct{n}\cdot \vct{k}}{\left|\vct{n}\right|} = \dfrac{b}{\sqrt{a^2 + b^2}}\) 为定值.

\paragraph{第7题}

已知函数 \(f\) 可微, 若 \(T\) 为曲面 \(S:f(x, y, z) = 0\) 在点 \(P(x_0, y_0, z_0)\) 处的切平面, \(l\) 为 \(T\) 上任意一条过 \(P\) 的曲线, 求证: 在 \(S\) 上存在一条曲线, 该曲线在 \(P\) 处的切线恰好为 \(l\).

\paragraph{证明}

不妨设要求的曲线为 \(L\). 现在构造 \(L\) 如下: 过 \(P(x_0, y_0, z_0)\) 有法向量 \(\vct{n}\), 由于 \(\vct{n}\) 和 \(l\) 相互垂直, 因此张成了一个平面 \(Q\). 取 \(L\) 为 \(Q\) 和 \(S\) 的交线, 则 \(L\) 与平面 \(Q\) 相切, 且它在 \(P\) 处的切线恰好为 \(l\). 因此命题得证.

docs.title: 习题1.8
docs.text:
\subsection{习题1.8解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

分别写出下列函数在点 \(O\) 处带有二阶 Peano 余项和 Lagrange 余项的 Taylor 公式.

(1) \(z = \cos(x^2 + y^2)\);

(2) \(z = e^{x^2 - y^2}\);

(3) \(u = \ln(1 + x + y + z)\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = -2x\sin(x^2 + y^2), \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = -2y(x^2 + y^2)\), 所以 \(\dfrac{\partial^2 z}{\partial x^2} = -4x^2\cos(x^2 + y^2) - 2\sin(x^2 + y^2), \dfrac{\partial^2 z}{\partial y^2} = -4y^2\cos(x^2 + y^2) - 2\sin(x^2 + y^2), \dfrac{\partial^2 z}{\partial x\partial y} = -4xy\cos(x^2 + y^2)\). 因此带有二阶 Peano 余项的 Taylor 公式为 \(z = 1 + o(x^2 + y^2)\), 因此带有二阶 Lagrange 余项的 Taylor 公式为 \(z = 1 - (x^2 + y^2)\sin(\theta^2(x^2 + y^2)) - 2\theta^2(x^2 + y^2)^2\cos(\theta^2(x^2 + y^2)), \theta \in (0, 1)\).

(2) 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = 2xe^{x^2 - y^2}, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = -2ye^{x^2-y^2}\), 所以 \(\dfrac{\partial^2 z}{\partial x^2} = (4x^2+2)e^{x^2-y^2}, \dfrac{\partial^2 z}{\partial y^2} = (4y^2-2)e^{x^2-y^2}, \dfrac{\partial^2 z}{\partial x\partial y} = -4xye^{x^2-y^2}\). 因此带有二阶 Peano 余项的 Taylor 公式为 \(z = 1 + x^2 - y^2 + o(x^2 + y^2)\), 带有二阶 Lagrange 余项的 Taylor 公式为 \(z = 1 + (x^2-y^2)e^{\theta^2(x^2-y^2)}(1+2\theta^2(x^2-y^2)), \theta \in (0, 1)\).

(3) 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} = \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} = \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial z} = \dfrac{1}{1 + x + y + z}\), 所以 \(\dfrac{\partial^2 u}{\partial x^2} = \dfrac{\partial ^2u}{\partial x\partial y} = \dfrac{\partial^2 u}{\partial x\partial z} = \dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial y^2} = \dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial y\partial z} = \dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial z^2} = -\dfrac{1}{(1 + x + y + z)^2}\). 因此带有二阶 Peano 余项的 Taylor 公式为 \(z = x + y + z - \dfrac{1}{2}(x + y + z)^2 + o(x^2 + y^2 + z^2)\), 带有二阶 Lagrange 余项的 Taylor 公式为 \(z = x + y + z - \dfrac{1}{2(1 + \theta x + \theta y + \theta z)^2}(x + y + z)^2, \theta \in (0, 1)\).

\paragraph{第2题}

写出下列函数在指定点处的 Taylor 公式

(2) \(z = \dfrac{\cos x}{\cos y}\) 在点 \((0, 0)\) 处的二阶 Taylor 多项式;

\paragraph{解}

(2) \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = -\dfrac{\sin x}{\cos y}, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = \dfrac{\cos x\sin y}{\cos^2y}\). 因此 \(\dfrac{\partial^2z}{\partial x^2} = -\dfrac{\cos x}{\cos y}, \dfrac{\partial^2z}{\partial x\partial y} = -\dfrac{\sin x\sin y}{\cos^2y}, \dfrac{\partial^2z}{\partial y^2} = \dfrac{(\sin^2 y + \cos y)\cos x}{\cos^3 y}\). 故 \(R_{2}(x, y) = \dfrac{1}{2}(\dfrac{\partial^2z}{\partial x^2}\bigg\vert_{(0, 0)}x^2 + 2\dfrac{\partial^2z}{\partial x\partial y}\bigg\vert_{(0, 0)}xy + \dfrac{\partial^2z}{\partial y^2}\bigg\vert_{(0, 0)}y^2) = -\dfrac{1}{2}x^2 + \dfrac{1}{2}y^2\). 因此在 \((0, 0)\) 处的二阶 Taylor 多项式为 \(z = 1 - \dfrac{1}{2}x^2 + \dfrac{1}{2}y^2\).

docs.title: 习题1.9
docs.text:
\subsection{习题1.9解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

研究下列函数的极值.

(1) \(z = x^3 + y^3 - 3x^2 - 3y^2\);

(2) \(z = e^{2x}(x + y^2 + 2y)\);

(4) \(z = x_1 + \dfrac{x_2}{x_1} + \dfrac{x_3}{x_2} + \cdots + \dfrac{x_n}{x_{n - 1}} + \dfrac{2}{x_n}, \quad x_i > 1\);

(5) \(u = x + \dfrac{y^2}{4x} + \dfrac{z^2}{y} + \dfrac{2}{z}, \quad x, y, z > 0\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = 3x^2 - 6x, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = 3y^2 - 6y\). Hesse 矩阵为 \(H = \begin{pmatrix}6x - 6 & 0\\ 0 & 6y - 6\end{pmatrix}\). 驻点有 \((0, 0), (0, 2), (2, 0), (2, 2)\). 代入 Hesse 矩阵判断正定性、负定性知极小值点为 \((2, 2)\), 极大值点为 \((0, 0)\). 因此极小值为 \(z(2, 2) = -8\), 极大值为 \(z(0, 0) = 0\).

(2) \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = e^{2x}(2x + 2y^2 + 4y + 1), \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = e^{2x}(2y + 2)\). Hesse 矩阵为 \(H = \begin{pmatrix}e^{2x}(4x + 4y^2 + 8y + 4) & (4y+4)e^{2x}\\ (4y+4)e^{2x} & 2e^{2x}\end{pmatrix}\). 驻点为 \((\dfrac{1}{2}, -1)\). 代入 Hesse 矩阵, 为正定的. 因此有极小值为 \(z\left(\dfrac{1}{2}, -1\right) = -\dfrac{e}{2}\).

(4) \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x_1} = 1 - \dfrac{x_2}{x_1}\), \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x_i} = \dfrac{1}{x_{i - 1}} - \dfrac{x_{i + 1}}{x_i^2}, \quad (2 \le i \le n - 1)\), \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x_n} = \dfrac{1}{x_{n - 1}} - \dfrac{2}{x_n^2}\). 因此 Hesse 矩阵为

\[ \begin{pmatrix} \dfrac{2x_2}{x_1^3} & -\dfrac{1}{x_1^2} & 0 & 0 & \cdots & 0 \\ -\dfrac{1}{x_1^2} & \dfrac{2x_3}{x_2^3} & -\dfrac{1}{x_2^2} & 0 & \cdots & 0 \\ 0 & -\dfrac{1}{x_2^2} & \dfrac{2x_4}{x_3^3} & -\dfrac{1}{x_3^2} & \cdots & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & -\dfrac{1}{x_3^2} & \dfrac{2x_5}{x_4^3} & \cdots & 0 \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots \\ 0 & 0 & 0 & 0 & \cdots & \dfrac{4}{x_n^3} \end{pmatrix} \]

驻点为 \((2^{\frac{1}{n+1}}, 2^{\frac{2}{n+1}}, \cdots, 2^{\frac{n}{n+1}})\). 代入 Hesse 矩阵知其为正定的, 因此有极小值 \(z(2^{\frac{1}{n+1}}, 2^{\frac{2}{n+1}}, \cdots, 2^{\frac{n}{n+1}}) = (n+1)2^{\frac{1}{n+1}}\).

(5) \(\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} = 1 - \dfrac{y^2}{4x^2}, \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} = \dfrac{y}{2x} - \dfrac{z^2}{y^2}, \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial z} = \dfrac{2z}{y} - \dfrac{2}{z^2}\). Hesse 矩阵为 \(\begin{pmatrix}\dfrac{y^2}{2x^3} & -\dfrac{y}{2x^2} & 0\\ -\dfrac{y}{2x^2} & \dfrac{1}{2x} + \dfrac{2z^2}{y^3} & -\dfrac{2z}{y^2} \\ 0 & -\dfrac{2z}{y^2} & \dfrac{2}{y} + \dfrac{4}{z^3}\end{pmatrix}\). 驻点为 \(\left(\dfrac{1}{2}, 1, 1\right)\) 和 \(\left(-\dfrac{1}{2}, -1, -1\right)\). 代入 Hesse 矩阵知极小值点为 \((\dfrac{1}{2}, 1, 1)\). 因此极小值为 \(u(\dfrac{1}{2}, 1, 1) = 4\).

\paragraph{第2题}

函数 \(z = z(x, y)\) 由 \(2x^2 + 2y^2 + z^2 + 8xz - z + 8 = 0\) 确定, 求 \(z = z(x, y)\) 的极值.

\paragraph{解}

记 \(F(x, y, z) = 2x^2 + 2y^2 + z^2 + 8xz - z + 8\). 因此 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = -\dfrac{\dfrac{\partial F}{\partial x}}{\dfrac{\partial F}{\partial z}} = -\dfrac{4x + 8z}{2z + 8x - 1}, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = -\dfrac{\dfrac{\partial F}{\partial y}}{\dfrac{\partial F}{\partial z}} = \dfrac{4y}{2z + 8x - 1}\). 因此在极值点有 \(\begin{cases}4x_0 + 8z_0 = 0, \\ y_0 = 0.\end{cases}\) 代入方程有 \(2(-2z_0)^2 + z_0^2 + 8(-2z_0)z_0 - z_0 + 8 = 0\), 化简得 \(7z_0^2 + z_0 - 8 = 0\). 解得 \(z_{01} = 1. z_{02} = -\dfrac{8}{7}\). 经检验 Hesse 矩阵也满足条件, 所以极小值为 \(1\), 极大值为 \(-\dfrac{8}{7}\).

\paragraph{第4题}

求下列函数在给定区域的最值.

(2) \(z = xy(4 - x - y), (x, y) \in \{x + y \le 6, y \ge 0, x \ge 1\}\).

\paragraph{解}

由于 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = 4y - y^2 - 2xy, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = 4x - x^2 - 2xy\), 所以驻点满足方程

\[ \begin{cases} 4y - y^2 - 2xy = 0 \\ 4x - x^2 - 2xy = 0 \end{cases} \]

解得 \((x, y) = (0, 0), (0, 4), \left(\dfrac{4}{3}, \dfrac{4}{3}\right), (4, 0)\). 再加上 \(x \ge 1\) 的条件后, 只剩下 \(z\left(\dfrac{4}{3}, \dfrac{4}{3}\right) = \dfrac{64}{27}\) 和 \(z(4, 0) = 0\).

再考虑边界上的极值. 当 \(y = 0\) 时 \(z \equiv 0\). 当 \(x = 1\) 时 \(z = y(3 - y) \in \left[0, \dfrac{9}{4}\right]\). 当 \(x + y = 6\) 时 \(z = -2xy \in [-18, 0]\).

综上可得 \(z\) 有最大值 \(\dfrac{64}{27}\), 最小值 \(-18\).

\paragraph{第5题}

证明下列各题

(1) 设 \(D\) 为 \(\set{R}^2\) 中的有界闭区域. \(f(x, y)\) 在 \(D\) 上连续, 在 \(D\) 内可微, 且满足方程 \(\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial x} + \dfrac{\partial f}{\partial y} = kf(x, y)(k > 0)\), 若在 \(D\) 的边界上有 \(f(x, y) = 0\), 试证 \(f(x, y)\) 在 \(D\) 上恒为 \(0\).

(2) 设 \(u(x, y)\) 在 \(x^2 + y^2 \le 1\) 上连续, 在 \(x^2 + y^2 < 1\) 满足 \(\dfrac{\partial^2 u}{\partial x^2} + \dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial y^2} = u\). 且在 \(x^2 + y^2 = 1\) 上, \(u(x, y) \ge 0\). 证明: 当 \(x^2 + y^2 \le 1\) 时, \(u(x, y) \ge 0\).

\paragraph{证明}

(1) 反证法. 假设 \(\exists P(x_0, y_0)\) 使得 \(f(x_0, y_0) \neq 0\). 不妨设 \(f(x_0, y_0) > 0\). 则由题知 \(\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial x}\bigg\vert_P + \dfrac{\partial f}{\partial y}\bigg\vert_P = kf(x_0, y_0) > 0\). 因此 \(\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial x}\bigg\vert_P\) 和 \(\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial y}\bigg\vert_P\) 中至少有一个为正数. 不妨设 \(\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial x}\bigg\vert_P> 0\). 则 \(f(x, y)\) 从 \(f(x_0, y_0)\) 沿着 \(x\) 方向单调递增. 而 \(f(x_0, y_0) > 0\), 所以沿着该方向到边界时, 有边界点函数值也为正数, 矛盾. 因此 \(f(x, y) \equiv 0\).

(2) 反证法. 假设 \(\exists P(x_0, y_0)\) 使得 \(u(x_0, y_0) < 0\), 且 \(u\) 在 \(P(x_0, y_0)\) 处取得极小值. 则在极小值点 \(P(x_0, y_0)\) 处的 Hesse 矩阵的迹为 \(\dfrac{\partial^2 u}{\partial x^2}\bigg\vert_P + \dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial y^2}\bigg\vert_P > 0\). 这与题目 \(\dfrac{\partial^2 u}{\partial x^2}\bigg\vert_P + \dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial y^2}\bigg\vert_P = u(x_0, y_0) < 0\) 矛盾. 因此当 \(x^2 + y^2 \le 1\) 时, \(u(x, y) \ge 0\).

\paragraph{第6题}

证明函数 \(z(x, y) = (1 + e^y)\cos x - ye^y\) 有无穷多个极大值点而无极小值.

\paragraph{证明}

由于 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = -(1 + e^y)\sin x, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = (\cos x - 1 - y)e^y\), 所以 Hesse 矩阵为

\[ H = \begin{pmatrix}\dfrac{\partial^2 z}{\partial x^2} & \dfrac{\partial ^2z}{\partial x\partial y} \\ \dfrac{\partial^2z}{\partial x\partial y} & \dfrac{\partial^2z}{\partial y^2}\end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix}-(1+e^y)\cos x & -e^y\sin x \\ -e^y\sin x & (\cos x - y - 2)e^y\end{pmatrix} \]

且驻点为 \((2k\pi, 0)\) 和 \(((2k+1)\pi, 2)\), 其中 \(k \in \set{Z}\). 将 \((2k\pi, 0)\) 代入 \(H\), 有 \(H_1 = \begin{pmatrix}-2 & 0 \\ 0 & -1\end{pmatrix}\) 负定. 因此 \((2k\pi, 0), k \in \set{Z}\) 为极大值点, 且有无穷多个. 将 \(((2k + 1)\pi, 2)\) 代入 \(H\), 有 \(H_2 = \begin{pmatrix}e^2 + 1 & 0 \\ 0 & -5e^2\end{pmatrix}\) 不定. 因此 \(((2k + 1)\pi, 2), k \in \set{Z}\) 不为极值点. 所以没有极小值点.

\paragraph{第7题}

求下列函数在给定条件下的条件极值.

(1) \(\begin{cases}z = x^2 + y^2, \\ \text{s.t.} \dfrac{x}{a} + \dfrac{y}{b} = 1;\end{cases}\)

(2) \(\begin{cases}u = x - 2y + 2z, \\ \text{s.t.} x^2 + y^2 + z^2 = 1;\end{cases}\)

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(L = x^2 + y^2 + \lambda\left(\dfrac{x}{a} + \dfrac{y}{b} - 1\right)\). \(L_x' = 2x + \dfrac{\lambda}{a}, L_y' = 2y + \dfrac{\lambda}{b}\). 因此有方程组 \(\begin{cases}2x + \dfrac{\lambda}{a} = 0 \\2y + \dfrac{\lambda}{b} = 0 \\\dfrac{x}{a} + \dfrac{y}{b} = 1\end{cases}\), 解得 \(\begin{cases}x = \dfrac{ab^2}{a^2 + b^2} \\y = \dfrac{a^2b}{a^2 + b^2} \\\lambda = -\dfrac{2a^2b}{a^2 + b^2}\end{cases}\). 此时有 \(z = \dfrac{a^2b^2}{a^2 + b^2}\) 为极小值.

(2) \(L = x - 2y + 2z + \lambda(x^2 + y^2 + z^2 - 1)\). \(L_x' = 1 + 2\lambda x, L_y' = -2 + 2\lambda y, L_z' = 2 + 2\lambda z\). 因此有方程组 \(\begin{cases}1 + 2\lambda x = 0 \\ -2 + 2\lambda y = 0 \\ 2 + 2\lambda z = 0 \\ x^2 + y^2 + z^2 = 1\end{cases}\). 解得 \(\begin{cases}x = -\dfrac{1}{3} \\ y = \dfrac{2}{3} \\ z = -\dfrac{2}{3} \\ \lambda = \dfrac{3}{2}\end{cases}\) 或 \(\begin{cases}x = \dfrac{1}{3} \\ y = -\dfrac{2}{3} \\ z = \dfrac{2}{3} \\ \lambda = -\dfrac{3}{2}\end{cases}\). 因此有极小值 \(u\left(-\dfrac{1}{3}, \dfrac{2}{3}, -\dfrac{2}{3}\right) = -3\), 极大值 \(u\left(\dfrac{1}{3}, -\dfrac{2}{3}, \dfrac{2}{3}\right) = 3\).

\paragraph{第8题}

求函数 \(u = x^2 + 2y^2 + z^2 - 2xy - 2yz\) 在区域 \(x^2 + y^2 + z^2 \le 4\) 内的最值.

\paragraph{解}

\[\begin{enumerate} \item 考虑内点处的极值. $\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} = 2x - 2y, \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} = 4y - 2x - 2z, \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial z} = 2z - 2y$. 因此驻点满足 $x = y = z$. 此时 $u = 0$. \item 考虑边界点处的极值. $L = x^2 + 2y^2 + z^2 - 2yz - 2xy + \lambda(x^2 + y^2 + z^2 - 4)$. $L_x' = 2x - 2y + 2\lambda x, L_y' = 4y - 2z - 2z + 2\lambda y, L_z' = 2z - 2y + 2\lambda z$. 因此有方程组 $\begin{cases}2x - 2y + 2\lambda x = 0 \\ 4y - 2z - 2z + 2\lambda y = 0 \\ 2z - 2y + 2\lambda z = 0 \\ x^2 + y^2 + z^2 = 4\end{cases}$. 解得 $(x, y, z) = (0, 0, 0), \left(\dfrac{2\sqrt{3}}{3}, \dfrac{2\sqrt{3}}{3}, \dfrac{2\sqrt{3}}{3}\right), \left(\pm\dfrac{\sqrt{6}}{3}, \mp\dfrac{2\sqrt{6}}{3}, \pm\dfrac{\sqrt{6}}{3}\right), (\pm\sqrt{2}, 0, \mp\sqrt{2}),$. 故有最大值 $u\left(\pm\dfrac{\sqrt{6}}{3}, \mp\dfrac{2\sqrt{6}}{3}, \pm\dfrac{\sqrt{6}}{3}\right) = 12$, 最小值 $u(k, k, k)(k \in \set{R}) \equiv 0$. \end{enumerate}\]

\paragraph{第9题}

求解下列问题.

(1) 求椭圆 \(x^2 + \dfrac{y^2}{4} = 1\) 上的点到直线 \(x + y = 4\) 的距离的最值;

(3) 求椭圆面 \(\dfrac{x^2}{a^2} + \dfrac{y^2}{b^2} + \dfrac{z^2}{c^2} = 1\) 内接长方体的体积最值;

\paragraph{解}

(1) 设椭圆上的某一点为 \(P(\cos \theta, 2\sin \theta), \theta \in (-\pi, \pi]\). 距离为 \(d = \dfrac{\left|\cos \theta + 2\sin \theta - 4\right|}{\sqrt{2}} = \dfrac{\left|4 - \sqrt{5}\cos\varphi\right|}{\sqrt{2}} \in [\dfrac{4\sqrt{2} - \sqrt{10}}{2}, \dfrac{4\sqrt{2} + \sqrt{10}}{2}]\). 因此最大值为 \(\dfrac{4\sqrt{2} + \sqrt{10}}{2}\), 最小值为 \(\dfrac{4\sqrt{2} - \sqrt{10}}{2}\).

(3) 易知该长方体关于原点中心对称. 设长方体的某一个顶点为 \(P(a\cos\theta\cos\varphi, b\cos\theta\sin\varphi, c\sin\theta)\). 则体积为 \(V = 8\left|xyz\right| = 8abc\cos^2\theta\sin\theta\sin\varphi\cos\varphi = 4abc\sin\theta(1 - \sin^2\theta)\sin2\varphi \in (0, \dfrac{2\sqrt{3}}{9}abc]\). 因此体积最大值为 \(\dfrac{8\sqrt{3}}{9}abc\), 无最小值.

\paragraph{第10题}

求解下列问题.

(3) 已知矩形的周长为 \(2p\), 将它绕其一边旋转成的圆柱体的体积最大值为多少?

\paragraph{解}

设矩形的一边长为 \(x\), 则邻边长为 \(p - x\). 绕长为 \(p - x\) 的边旋转而成的圆柱体体积为 \(\pi x^2 (p-x) = \dfrac{\pi}{2}x \cdot x \cdot (2p - 2x) \le \dfrac{\pi}{2}\left(\dfrac{x + x + 2p - 2x}{3}\right)^3 = \dfrac{4p^3\pi}{27}\). 因此圆柱体的体积最大值为 \(\dfrac{4p^3\pi}{27}\).

\paragraph{第11题}

求解下列问题.

(1) 求函数 \(u = x^2y^2z^2\) 在约束条件 \(x^2 + y^2 + z^2 = a^2\) 下的最大值, 并证明:

\[ \sqrt[3]{x^2y^2z^2} \le \dfrac{x^2 + y^2 + z^2}{3}; \]

(2) 类似 (1), 证明: \(a_1, a_2, \cdots, a_n > 0\) 有

\[ \sqrt{\dfrac{a_1^2 + a_2^2 + \cdots + a_n^2}{n}} \ge \dfrac{a_1 + a_2 + \cdots + a_n}{n} \ge \sqrt[n]{a_1a_2\cdots a_n} \ge \dfrac{n}{\dfrac{1}{a_1} + \dfrac{1}{a_2} + \cdots + \dfrac{1}{a_n}}. \]

\paragraph{证明}

(1) 设 \(L = x^2y^2z^2 + \lambda(x^2 + y^2 + z^2 - a^2)\), 则

\[ \begin{aligned} L_x' & = 2xy^2z^2 + 2x\lambda = 0 \\ L_y' & = 2x^2yz^2 + 2y\lambda = 0 \\ L_z' & = 2x^2y^2z + 2z\lambda = 0 \end{aligned} \]

解得有极大值点满足 \(x^2 = y^2 = z^2 = \dfrac{a^2}{3}\), 因此有 \(x^2y^2z^2 \le \left(\dfrac{a^2}{3}\right)^3 = \left(\dfrac{x^2 + y^2 + z^2}{3}\right)^3\). 此即 \(\sqrt[3]{x^2y^2z^2} \le \dfrac{x^2 + y^2 + z^2}{3}\).

(2) 同理, 拓展至 \(n\) 元, 有 \(\sqrt{\dfrac{a_1^2 + a_2^2 + \cdots + a_n^2}{n}} \ge \dfrac{a_1 + a_2 + \cdots + a_n}{n}\). 而由 \(n\) 元均值不等式有 \(\dfrac{a_1 + a_2 + \cdots + a_n}{n} \ge \sqrt[n]{a_1a_2\cdots a_n}\). 将 \(a_1 = \dfrac{1}{b_1}, a_2 = \dfrac{1}{b_2}, \cdots, a_n = \dfrac{1}{b_n}\) 代入有 \(\dfrac{\dfrac{1}{b_1} + \dfrac{1}{b_2} + \cdots + \dfrac{1}{b_n}}{n}\ge \dfrac{1}{\sqrt[n]{b_1b_2\cdots b_n}}\), 不等式两边同时取倒数, 有 \(\sqrt[n]{b_1b_2\cdots b_n} \ge \dfrac{n}{\dfrac{1}{b_1} + \dfrac{1}{b_2} + \cdots + \dfrac{1}{b_n}}\). 此即 \(\sqrt[n]{a_1a_2\cdots a_n} \ge \dfrac{n}{\dfrac{1}{a_1} + \dfrac{1}{a_2} + \cdots + \dfrac{1}{a_n}}\). 命题得证.

\paragraph{第13题}

弹簧在弹性限度内的伸长 \(x\) 与所受拉力 \(y\) 满足关系式 \(y = a + bx\), 试根据下列数据确定弹性系数 \(b\).

\[\begin{table}[H] \centering %\caption{} \vspace{1em} \begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|c|} \hline $x_i/\text{cm}$ & 2.6 & 3.0 & 3.5 & 4.3 \\ \hline $y_i/\text{kg}$ & 0 & 1 & 2 & 3 \\ \hline \end{tabular} %\label{} \end{table}\]

\paragraph{解}

由题可列出方程组 \(A\vct{x}=\vct{b}\):

\[ \begin{pmatrix} 1 & 2.6 \\ 1 & 3.0 \\ 1 & 3.5 \\ 1 & 4.3 \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} a \\ b \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} 0 \\ 1 \\ 2 \\ 3 \end{pmatrix} \]

则 \(A^{\top}A = \begin{pmatrix}1 & 1 & 1 & 1 \\ 2.6 & 3.0 & 3.5 & 4.3\end{pmatrix}\begin{pmatrix}1 & 2.6 \\1 & 3.0 \\1 & 3.5 \\1 & 4.3\end{pmatrix}=\begin{pmatrix}4 & 13.4 \\ 13.4 & 46.5\end{pmatrix}\), \(A^{\top}\vct{b} = \begin{pmatrix}1 & 1 & 1 & 1 \\ 2.6 & 3.0 & 3.5 & 4.3\end{pmatrix}\begin{pmatrix}0 \\ 1 \\ 2 \\ 3\end{pmatrix}=\begin{pmatrix}6 \\ 22.9\end{pmatrix}\)

因此方程即

\[ \begin{pmatrix} 4 & 13.4 \\ 13.4 & 46.5 \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} a \\ b \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} 6 \\ 22.9 \end{pmatrix} \]

解得 \(a = -4.326, b = 1.739\).

docs.title: 第1章总复习题
docs.text:
\subsection{第1章总复习题解答}

\paragraph{第15题}

设 \(f(x, y)\) 是可微函数, 且满足以下条件: \(\lim\limits_{x^2 + y^2 o +\infty}\dfrac{f(x, y)}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} = +\infty\), 试证明: 对于任意的 \(\vct{v} = (v_1, v_2)\), 都存在点 \((x_0, y_0)\), 使得 \( abla f(x_0, y_0) = \vct{v}\).

\paragraph{证明}

作辅助函数 \(g(x, y) = f(x, y) - v_1 x - v_2 y\), 则

\[ \lim\limits_{x^2 + y^2 o +\infty}\dfrac{g(x, y)}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} = \lim\limits_{x^2 + y^2 o +\infty}\dfrac{f(x, y)}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} - \lim\limits_{x^2 + y^2 o +\infty}\dfrac{v_1 x}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} - \lim\limits_{x^2 + y^2 o +\infty}\dfrac{v_2 y}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} = +\infty \]

考虑 \(g(x, y)\) 在 \(\set{R}^2\) 上的极小值点 \(P(x_0, y_0)\), 有 \( abla g(x_0, y_0) = \vct{0}\), 此即 \( abla f(x_0, y_0) = \vct{v}\).

\paragraph{第17题}

已知点 \(P(a, b)\) 在曲线 \(f(x, y) = 0\) 上, 点 \(Q(c, d)\) 在曲线 \(g(x, y) = 0\) 上, 其中 \(f, g\) 可微, 证明: 若 \(|PQ|\) 为两条曲线的距离, 则 \(\dfrac{a - c}{b - d} = \dfrac{f_1'(a, b)}{f_2'(a, b)} = \dfrac{g_1'(c, d)}{g_2'(c, d)}\). 利用此结论求椭圆 \(x^2 + 2xy + 5y^2 - 16y = 0\) 与直线 \(x - y - 8 = 0\) 的距离.

\paragraph{解}

由于 \(|PQ|\) 为两条曲线间的距离, 故由题知 \(\vec{PQ} \parallel abla f(a, b) \parallel abla g(c, d)\). 此即

\[ \dfrac{a - c}{b - d} = \dfrac{f_1'(a, b)}{f_2'(a, b)} = \dfrac{g_1'(c, d)}{g_2'(c, d)} \]

在此例中, \(f_1'(x, y) = 2x + 2y, f_2'(x, y) = 2x + 10y - 16, g_1'(x, y) = 1, g_2'(x, y) = -1\). 代入有方程

\[ egin{cases} \dfrac{a - c}{b - d} = \dfrac{2a + 2b}{2a + 10b - 16} = \dfrac{1}{-1}, \ a^2 + 2ab + 5b^2 - 16b = 0, \ c - d - 8 = 0. \end{cases} \]

解得 \(|PQ| = \min\{6\sqrt{2} + 4, 6\sqrt{2} - 4\} = 6\sqrt{2} - 4\).

docs.title: 习题2.1
docs.text:
\subsection{习题2.1解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

证明: \(f(x, y) = \sin(x^2 + y^2)\) 在 \(\set{R}^2\) 上非一致连续.

\paragraph{证明}

反证法. 假设 \(f(x, y) = \sin(x^2 + y^2)\) 在 \(\set{R}^2\) 上一致连续, 那么对任意 \(\epsilon > 0\), 比如 \(\epsilon = \dfrac{1}{3}\), 则存在 \(\delta > 0\), 使得只要 \(\|(x_1, y_1) - (x_2, y_2)\| < \delta\), 就有 \(\left|\sin(x_1^2 + y_1^2) - \sin(x_2^2 + y_2^2)\right| < \epsilon = \dfrac{1}{3}\). 取 \((x_1, y_1) = (0, \sqrt{n\pi}), (x_2, y_2) = (0, \sqrt{n\pi + \dfrac{\pi}{2}})\), 则当 \(n\) 足够大时可以保证 \(\|(x_1, y_1) - (x_2, y_2)\| < \delta\). 但此时

\[ \begin{aligned} \left|\sin(x_1^2 + y_1^2) - \sin(x_2^2 + y_2^2)\right| & = \left|\sin(n\pi) - \sin\left(n\pi + \dfrac{\pi}{2}\right)\right| \\ & = \cos\left(n\pi + \dfrac{\pi}{4}\right)\sin\left(\dfrac{\pi}{4}\right) \\ & = \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2}\cos\left(n\pi + \dfrac{\pi}{4}\right) \end{aligned} \]

当 \(n\) 取 \(2\) 的倍数的时候有 \(\left|\sin(x_1^2 + y_1^2) - \sin(x_2^2 + y_2^2)\right| = \dfrac{1}{2} > \dfrac{1}{3} = \epsilon\). 矛盾. 因此 \(f(x, y) = \sin(x^2 + y^2)\) 在 \(\set{R}^2\) 上非一致连续.

\paragraph{第2题}

已知函数 \(f:\set{R}^n\to\set{R}\) 连续, 且 \(\lim\limits_{\| X\|\to +\infty}f(X)\) 存在, 求证: \(f\) 在 \(\set{R}^n\) 上一致连续.

\paragraph{证明}

记 \(L = \lim\limits_{\| X\|\to +\infty}f(X)\), 则 \(\exists M_0 > 0\), 使得 \(\forall \epsilon > 0, \|X\| > M_0\), 都有 \(\left|f(X) - L\right| < \dfrac{\epsilon}{2}\). 对于 \(\|X\| \le M_0\) 的有界闭区域, \(f\) 在上面是一致连续的, 现只需要考虑 \(\|X\| > M_0\) 的区域. 由于 \(\forall X, X'\) 满足 \(\|X\|, \|X'\| > M_0, \|X - X'\| < \delta\), 有 \(\left|f(X) - f(X')\right| \le \left|f(X) - L\right| + \left|f(X') - L\right| < \dfrac{\epsilon}{2} + \dfrac{\epsilon}{2} = \epsilon\), 所以 \(f\) 在 \(\|X\| > M_0\) 的区域上也是一致连续的. 故 \(f\) 在 \(\set{R}^2\) 上一致连续.

\paragraph{第3题}

证明: 函数 \(f(X)\) 在 \(\Omega \subset \set{R}^n\) 上一致连续的充要条件是: 对 \(\Omega \subset \set{R}^n\) 上的任何两个点列 \(\{X_n\}\) 和 \(\{Y_n\}\), 当 \(\lim\limits_{n\to\infty}\|X_n-Y_n\| = 0\) 时, 有 \(\lim\limits_{n\to\infty}(f(X_n)-f(Y_n)) = 0\).

\paragraph{证明}

先证必要性: 假设 \(f(X)\) 在 \(\Omega \subset \set{R}^n\) 上一致连续, 则对于任意点列 \(\{X_n\}, \{Y_n\}\): \(\forall \epsilon > 0, \exists \delta_0 > 0\) 使得 \(\forall X, X'' \in \Omega, \|X - X'\| < \delta_0\) 有 \(\|f(X) - f(X')\| < \epsilon\). 由于 \(\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}\|X_n - Y_n\| = 0\), 故按定义展开有 \(\exists M > 0, \forall n > M\), 有 \(\|X_n - Y_n\| < \delta_0\) 从而 \(\|f(X_n) - f(Y_n)\| < \epsilon\). 故由定义知 \(\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}\|f(X_n)-f(Y_n)\| = 0\).

再证充分性: 反证法. 假设 \(f(X)\) 不一致连续, 则 \(\exists \epsilon_0 > 0, \forall delta > 0, \exists X_0, X_0' \in \Omega\) 满足 \(\|X_0 - X_0'\| < \delta\) 但 \(\|f(X_0) - f(X_0')\| \ge \epsilon_0\). 取 \(\delta_n = \dfrac{1}{n}\), 则 \(\exists X_n, Y_n\) 使得 \(\|X_n - Y_n\| < \delta_n = \dfrac{1}{n}\), 则由条件知 \(\|f(X_n) - f(Y_n)\| \ge \epsilon_0\). 由此, \(\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}\|X_n - Y_n\| = 0\) 但 \(\|f(X_n) - f(Y_n)\| \ge \epsilon_0\) 恒成立, 说明其极限不为 \(0\). 与 \(\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}\|f(X_n) - f(Y_n)\| = 0\) 矛盾. 故假设错误, \(f(X)\) 在 \(\Omega \subset \set{R}^n\) 上一致连续.

\paragraph{第4题}

讨论下列积分在所给区间上的一致收敛性.

(2) \(\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\cos yx}{1 + x^2}\D{x}(-\infty < y < +\infty)\);

(4) \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}e^{-tx^2}\sin x\D{x}(0 < t_0 \le t < +\infty)\);

(6) \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\D{x}}{1 + (x + t)^2}(0 \le t < +\infty)\);

\paragraph{解}

(2) 考虑 \(f(x) = \cos (yx), g(x) = \dfrac{1}{1 + x^2}\), 则对任意 \(A<0, B>0, y \in \set{R}\) 均有 \(\left|\int_{A}^{B}f(x)\D{x}\right| \le 1\) 有界, 且 \(g(x) = \dfrac{1}{1 + x^2}\) 关于 \(x\) 单调递减. 由于不含 \(y\), 所以 \(\lim\limits_{x \to +\infty} g(x) = 0\) 对于 \(y\) 一致成立. 由 Dirichlet 判别法知 \(\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\cos yx}{1 + x^2}\D{x}\) 在 \(\set{R}\) 上一致收敛.

(4) 考虑 \(f(x) = \sin x, g(x) = e^{-tx}\), 则对任意 \(A > 0, t \in [t_0, +\infty)\) 有 \(\left|\int_{0}^{A}f(x)\D{x}\right| \le 1\) 有界, 且 \(g(x) = e^{-tx}\) 单调递减, 且 \(\lim\limits_{x \to +\infty}g(x) = 0\) 对于任意 \(t \in [t_0, +\infty)\) 一致成立. 有 Dirichlet 判别法知 \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}e^{-tx^2}\sin x\D{x}\) 在 \([t_0, +\infty)\) 上一致收敛.

(6) 考虑含参积分 \(I(t) = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\D{x}}{1 + (x + t)^2}\), 则 \(I(t) = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\D{(x + t)}}{1 + (x + t)^2} = \arctan(x + t)\bigg\vert_{0}^{+\infty} = \dfrac{\pi}{2} - \arctan t\) 在 \([0, +\infty)\) 一致收敛.

\paragraph{第5题}

证明: 积分 \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}e^{-tx}\dfrac{\sin 3x}{x + t}\D{x}(0 \le t < +\infty)\) 一致收敛.

\paragraph{证明}

先证明函数 \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}f(x, t)\D{x} = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\sin 3x}{x + t}\D{x}\) 关于 \(t>0\) 一致收敛. 由于 \(\int_{0}^{A}\sin 3x\D{x}\) 不含 \(t\) 且对充分大的 \(A\) 均有界, 并且 \(\dfrac{1}{x + t}\) 关于 \(x\) 单调递减且趋于 \(0\) 对于任意 \(t > 0\) 一致成立, 故由 Dirichlet 判别法知 \(f(x, t) = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\sin 3x}{x + t}\D{x}\) 关于 \(t > 0\) 一致收敛.

再考虑 \(g(x, t) = e^{-tx}\), 它关于 \(x\) 单调递减且趋于 \(0\) 对于任意 \(t > 0\) 一致成立. 由 Dirichlet 判别法知 \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}e^{-tx}\dfrac{\sin 3x}{x + t}\D{x} = \int_{0}^{+\infty}f(x, t)g(x, t)\D{x}\) 对于 \(t > 0\) 一致收敛.

\paragraph{第6题}

设 \(f(x, y)\) 在 \([a, +\infty) \times [\alpha, \beta]\) 中连续, 如果对于每一个 \(t \in [\alpha, \beta)\), \(\int_{a}^{+\infty}f(x, t)\D{x}\) 均收敛, 但 \(\int_{a}^{+\infty}f(x, \beta)\D{x}\) 均发散, 证明: \(\int_{a}^{+\infty}f(x, y)\D{x}\) 在 \([\alpha, \beta)\) 上非一致收敛.

\paragraph{证明}

反证法. 假设 \(\int_{0}^{+\infty} f(x, t) \D{x}\) 在 \([\alpha, \beta)\) 上一致收敛, 则由定义知 \(\forall \epsilon > 0, \exists A > 0, \forall A', A'' > A, \forall t \in [\alpha, \beta)\), 有 \(\left|\int_{A'}^{A''}f(x, t)\D{x}\right| < \epsilon\). 考虑数列 \(\{t_n\} = \{\beta - \dfrac{1}{n}\} \to \beta, n \to +\infty\), 由于 \(f(x, t)\) 在 \([a, +\infty)\times[\alpha, \beta]\) 上连续, 因此对 \(\left|\int_{A'}^{A''}f(x, t_n)\D{x}\right| < \epsilon\) 取 \(n \to +\infty\) 的极限, 有 \(\left|\int_{A'}^{A''}f(x, \beta)\D{x}\right| \le \epsilon\). 但这与 \(\int_{a}^{+\infty}f(x, \beta)\D{x}\) 发散矛盾. 因此假设不成立. 命题得证.

\paragraph{第8题}

证明: 积分 \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\sin tx}{x}\D{x}\) 在包含 \(t = 0\) 的区间上不一致收敛.

\paragraph{证明}

反证法. 假设积分 \(I(t) = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\sin tx}{x}\D{x}\) 在包含 \(t = 0\) 的区间上一致收敛, 不妨设该区间为 \([a, b]\), 其中 \(0 \in [a, b]\). 由于 \(\dfrac{\sin tx}{x}\) 在带状域 \([0, +\infty)\times[a, b]\) 上连续, 且广义积分 \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\sin tx}{x}\D{x}\) 在包含 \(t = 0\) 的区间上一致收敛, 则该广义积分 \(I(t)\) 是连续的. 但 \(I(t) = \begin{cases}0, t = 0, \\ \dfrac{\pi}{2}, t \neq 0 \end{cases}\) 并不连续, 矛盾. 因此积分 \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\sin tx}{x}\D{x}\) 在包含 \(t = 0\) 的区间上不一致收敛.

docs.title: 习题2.2
docs.text:
\subsection{习题2.2解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

求下列极限:

(1) \(\lim\limits_{a \to 0}\int_{-1}^{1}\sqrt{x^2 + a^2}\D{x}\);

(2) \(\lim\limits_{a \to 0}\int_{0}^{3}x^2\cos ax \D{x}\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(\lim\limits_{a \to 0}\int_{-1}^{1}\sqrt{x^2 + a^2}\D{x} = \int_{-1}^{1}\lim\limits_{a \to 0}\sqrt{x^2 + a^2}\D{x} = \int_{-1}^{1}\left|x\right|\D{x} = 1\).

(2) \(\lim\limits_{a \to 0}\int_{0}^{3}x^2\cos ax \D{x} = \int_{0}^{3}\lim\limits_{a \to 0}x^2\cos ax \D{x} = \int_{0}^{3}x^2\D{x} = \dfrac{1}{3}x^3\bigg\vert_0^3 = 9\).

\paragraph{第2题}

求下列函数的导函数.

(1) \(F(x) = \int_{x}^{x^2}e^{-xy^2}\D{y}\);

(3) \(F(x) = \int_{0}^{t}\dfrac{\ln(1 + tx)}{x}\D{x}\);

\paragraph{解}
