(1) \(F'(x) = \int_{x}^{x^2}-y^2e^{-xy^2}\D{y} + e^{-x^5}\cdot 2x - e^{-x^3} = 2xe^{-x^5} - e^{-x^3} - \int_{x}^{x^2}y^2e^{-xy^2}\D{y}\).

(3) \(F'(t) = \int_{0}^t\dfrac{1}{1 + tx}\D{x} + \dfrac{\ln (1 + t^2)}{t}\).

\paragraph{第3题}

设 \(f(x)\) 可微, 且 \(F(x) = \int_{0}^{x}(x + y)f(y)\D{y}\), 求 \(F''(x)\).

\paragraph{解}

由于 \(F'(x) = \int_{0}^xf(y)\D{y} + 2xf(x)\), 所以 \(F''(x) = f(x) + 2f(x) + 2xf'(x) = 3f(x) + 2xf'(x)\).

\paragraph{第4题}

证明: \(u(x, t) = \dfrac{1}{2}(\varphi(x + at) + \varphi(x - at)) + \dfrac{1}{2a}\int_{x - at}^{x + at}\psi(s)\D{s}\) 是弦振动方程 \(\dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial t^2} = a^2 \dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial x^2}\) 的解, 其中 \(\varphi \in C^2, \psi \in C^1\).

\paragraph{证明}

由题知

\[ \begin{aligned} \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial t} &= \dfrac{a}{2}[\varphi'(x + at) - \varphi'(x - at)] + \dfrac{1}{2}[\psi'(x + at) + \psi'(x - at)], \\ \dfrac{\partial^2 u}{\partial t^2} &= \dfrac{a^2}{2}[\varphi''(x + at) + \varphi''(x - at)] + \dfrac{a}{2}[\psi''(x + at) - \psi''(x - at)]. \end{aligned} \]

且有

\[ \begin{aligned} \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} &= \dfrac{1}{2}[\varphi'(x + at) + \varphi'(x - at)] + \dfrac{1}{2a}[\psi'(x + at) - \psi'(x - at)], \\ \dfrac{\partial^2 u}{\partial x^2} &= \dfrac{1}{2}[\varphi''(x + at) + \varphi''(x - at)] + \dfrac{1}{2a}[\psi''(x + at) - \psi''(x - at)]. \end{aligned} \]

代入则可验证 \(\dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial t^2} = a^2 \dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial x^2}\).

\paragraph{第5题}

计算下列积分.

(1) \(\int_{0}^{1}\dfrac{\arctan x}{x}\dfrac{1}{\sqrt{1 - x^2}}\D{x}\) (提示: \(\dfrac{\arctan x}{x} = \int_{0}^{1}\dfrac{1}{1 + x^2y^2}\D{y}\));

\paragraph{解}

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_{0}^{1}\dfrac{\arctan x}{x}\dfrac{1}{\sqrt{1 - x^2}}\D{x} &= \int_{0}^{1}\int_{0}^1\dfrac{1}{1 + x^2y^2}\D{y}\dfrac{1}{\sqrt{1 - x^2}}\D{x} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{\sin\theta}\int_{0}^1\dfrac{1}{1 + \sin^2\theta y^2}\D{y}\dfrac{1}{\sqrt{1 - \sin^2\theta}} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{\tan \theta}\int_{0}^1\dfrac{1}{1 + (y^2 + 1)\tan^2\theta}\D{y} \\ & = \int_0^1\D{y}\int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\D{\theta}}{1 + (y^2 + 1)\theta^2} \\ & = \int_0^{1}\D{y}\dfrac{1}{y^2 + 1}\arctan(\theta\sqrt{y^2 + 1})\bigg\vert_{\theta = 0}^{\theta = +\infty} \\ & = \int_0^1\dfrac{\pi}{2}\dfrac{1}{\sqrt{y^2 + 1}}\D{y} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{2}\ln(y + \sqrt{y^2 + 1})\big\vert_{0}^1 \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{2}\ln(\sqrt{2} + 1). \end{aligned} \]

docs.title: 习题2.3
docs.text:
\subsection{习题2.3解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

计算下列积分.

(1) \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{e^{-ax^2}-e^{-bx^2}}{x}\D{x}(a, b > 0)\);

(2) \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}xe^{-ax^2}\sin yx \D{x}(a > 0)\);

(3) \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\cos ax - \cos bx}{x^2}\D{x}(a, b > 0)\)(提示: 将 \(\cos ax - \cos bx\) 写成积分的形式, 并且 \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\sin x}{x} = \dfrac{\pi}{2}\)).

\paragraph{解}

(1) 因为 \(\dfrac{e^{-ax^2}-e^{-bx^2}}{x} = x\int_a^be^{-x^2y}\D{y}\), 故

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{e^{-ax^2}-e^{-bx^2}}{x}\D{x} & = \int_{0}^{+\infty}x\D{x}\int_a^be^{-x^2y}\D{y} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2}\int_{0}^{+\infty}\D{x^2}\int_a^be^{-x^2y}\D{y} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2}\D{\theta}\int_a^be^{-\theta y}\D{y} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2}\int_a^b\dfrac{1}{y}\D{y} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2}\ln\dfrac{b}{a}. \end{aligned} \]

(2)

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_{0}^{+\infty}xe^{-ax^2}\sin yx \D{x} & = -\dfrac{1}{2a}\left(e^{-ax^2}\sin(yx)\bigg\vert^{+\infty}_{0} - y\int_{0}^{+\infty}e^{-ax^2}\cos(yx)\D{x}\right) \\ & = \dfrac{y}{2a}\int_{0}^{+\infty}e^{-ax^2}\cos(yx)\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{y}{4a}\sqrt{\dfrac{\pi}{a}}e^{-\frac{y^2}{4a}} \end{aligned} \]

(3) 由于 \(\cos ax - \cos bx = x\int_a^b\sin yx\D{y}\), 故

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\cos ax - \cos bx}{x^2}\D{x} & = \int_0^{+\infty}\dfrac{1}{x}\D{x}\int_a^b\sin(yx)\D{y} \\ & = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\sin yx}{yx}\D{(yx)}\int_a^b\D{y} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{2}(b - a). \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第2题}

利用对参变量的求导, 求下列积分.

(1) \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}e^{-tx^2}x^{2n}\D{x}(t > 0)\)(提示: 利用 \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}e^{-x^2}\D{x} = \dfrac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}\));

(2) \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\D{x}}{(y + x^2)^{n+1}} = \dfrac{\pi(2n - 1)!!}{2(2n)!!}y^{-\left(n + \frac{1}{2}\right)}(y > 0)\)(提示: 利用 \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\D{x}}{y + x^2}\) 的值).

\paragraph{解}

(1) 考虑 \(I(t) = \int_{0}^{+\infty}e^{-tx^2}\D{x}\), 则其 \(n\) 阶导数为 \(I^{(n)}(t) = \int_{0}^{+\infty}e^{-tx^2}x^{2n}\D{x}\) 即为所求. 注意到

\[ \begin{aligned} I(t) & = \int_{0}^{+\infty}e^{-tx^2}\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{t}}\int_{0}^{+\infty}e^{-(\sqrt{t}x)^2}\D{(\sqrt{t}x)} \\ & = \dfrac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}\cdot t^{-\frac{1}{2}} \end{aligned} \]

因此有 \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}e^{-tx^2}x^{2n}\D{x} = I^{(n)}(t) = \dfrac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}\cdot\dfrac{(2n-1)!!}{2^n}(-1)^nt^{-\left(n+\frac{1}{2}\right)}\).

(2) 考虑 \(I(y) = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\D{x}}{y + x^2}\), 则 \(\dfrac{(-1)^n}{n!}I^{(n)}(y) = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\D{x}}{(y + x^2)^{n+1}}\) 即为所求. 由于

\[ \begin{aligned} I(y) & = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\D{x}}{y + x^2} \\ & = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\sqrt{y}\D{\left(\dfrac{x}{\sqrt{y}}\right)}}{y\left(1 + \left(\dfrac{x}{\sqrt{y}}\right)^2\right)} \\ & = y^{-\frac{1}{2}}\arctan\left(\dfrac{x}{\sqrt{y}}\right)\bigg\vert_{x = 0}^{x = +\infty} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{2}y^{-\frac{1}{2}} \end{aligned} \]

因此 \(I^{(n)}(y) = \dfrac{\pi}{2}\cdot\dfrac{(2n-1)!!}{2^n}(-1)^ny^{-\left(n + \frac{1}{2}\right)}\). 故 \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\D{x}}{(y + x^2)^{n+1}} = \dfrac{(-1)^n}{n!}I^{(n)}(y) = \dfrac{\pi(2n - 1)!!}{2(2n)!!}y^{-\left(n + \frac{1}{2}\right)}\).

docs.title: 第2章总复习题
docs.text:
\subsection{第2章总复习题解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

证明: \(f(x, y) = \sin (xy)\) 在 \(\set{R}^2\) 上不一致连续.

\paragraph{证明}

取点列 \(\{X_n\} = \left(\sqrt{n\pi}, \sqrt{n\pi}\right), \{Y_n\} = \left(\sqrt{n\pi + \dfrac{\pi}{2}}, \sqrt{n\pi + \dfrac{\pi}{2}}\right)\). 对于足够大的 \(n\), \(\forall \delta > 0\), 都能有 \(\|X_n - Y_n\| = \sqrt{2}\left(\sqrt{n\pi + \dfrac{\pi}{2}} - \sqrt{n\pi}\right)< \delta\), 但取 \(\epsilon_0 = 1\), 有

\[ \begin{aligned} \left|f(X_n) - f(Y_n)\right| & = \left|\sin(n\pi) - \sin\left(n\pi + \dfrac{\pi}{2}\right)\right| \\ & = 1 \ge \epsilon_0 \end{aligned} \]

因此 \(f(x, y) = \sin(xy)\) 在 \(\set{R}^2\) 上不一致连续.

\paragraph{第4题}

利用对参变量的微分, 求下列积分.

(1) \(\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\ln(a^2\sin^2x + b^2\cos^2x)\D{x}\);

(2) \(\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\dfrac{\arctan(a\tan x)}{\tan x}\D{x}\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) 不妨设 \(a, b > 0\). 记 \(I(b) = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\ln(a^2\sin^2x + b^2\cos^2x)\D{x}\) 为关于 \(b\) 的函数, \(a\) 为常数. 则

\[ \begin{aligned} I'(b) & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\dfrac{2b\cos^2x}{a^2\sin^2 x + b^2\cos^2 x}\D{x} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\dfrac{2b}{a^2\tan^2x + b^2}\D{x} \\ & = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{2b}{a^2u^2 + b^2}\D{\arctan u} \\ & = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{2b}{(a^2u^2 + b^2)(1 + u^2)}\D{u} \\ & = 2b\cdot \dfrac{\arctan u - \dfrac{a}{b}\arctan\left(\dfrac{a}{b}u\right)}{b^2 - a^2} \bigg\vert_{u=0}^{u=+\infty} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{a + b} \end{aligned} \]

因此 \(I(b) = \pi\ln(a + b) + C\), 其中 \(C\) 为某一待定常数. 由于 \(I(a) = \dfrac{\pi}{2}\ln(a^2) = \pi\ln a\), 所以 \(C = \pi\ln a - \pi\ln(a + a) = -\pi\ln 2\). 故 \(\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\ln(a^2\sin^2x + b^2\cos^2x)\D{x} = I(b) = \pi\ln\left(\dfrac{a + b}{2}\right)\).

(2) 设 \(I(a) = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\dfrac{\arctan(a\tan x)}{\tan x}\D{x}\). 则

\[ \begin{aligned} I'(a) & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\dfrac{\tan x}{1 + (a\tan x)^2}\cdot\dfrac{1}{\tan x}\D{x} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\dfrac{1}{1 + (a\tan x)^2}\D{x} \\ & = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{1}{1 + (ax)^2}\cdot\dfrac{1}{1 + x^2}\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{1 - a^2}\int_{0}^{+\infty}\left[\dfrac{1}{1 + x^2}-\dfrac{a^2}{1 + (ax)^2}\right]\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{1 - a^2}(\arctan x - a\arctan (ax))\bigg\vert_{x=0}^{x=+\infty} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{2(a + 1)} \end{aligned} \]

因此 \(I(a) = \dfrac{\pi}{2}\ln(a + 1) + C\). 由于 \(I(0) = 0\), 所以 \(C = 0\). 故 \(\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\dfrac{\arctan(a\tan x)}{\tan x}\D{x} = I(a) = \dfrac{\pi}{2}\ln(a + 1)\).

\paragraph{第6题}

计算下列积分的值.

(1) \(\int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\arctan xy}{x(1 + x^2)}\D{x}(y \ge 0)\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) 设 \(I(y) = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\arctan xy}{x(1 + x^2)}\D{x}\), 则

\[ \begin{aligned} I'(y) & = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{\D}{\D{y}}\dfrac{\arctan xy}{x(1 + x^2)}\D{x} \\ & = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{1}{1 + x^2}\cdot\dfrac{x}{1 + (xy)^2}\D{x} \\ & = \int_{0}^{+\infty}\dfrac{1}{(1 + x^2)(1 + x^2y^2)}\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{1 - y^2}\int_{0}^{+\infty}\left(\dfrac{1}{1 + x^2}-\dfrac{y^2}{1 + x^2y^2}\right)\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{1 - y^2}\left(\arctan(x) - y\arctan (yx)\right)\bigg\vert_{x=0}^{x=+\infty} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{2(1 + y)} \end{aligned} \]

因此 \(I(y) = \dfrac{\pi}{2}\ln(1 + y) + C\). 由 \(I(0) = 0\) 知 \(C = 0\). 因此 \(I(y) = \dfrac{\pi}{2}\ln(1 + y)\).

docs.title: 习题3.2
docs.text:
\subsection{习题3.2解答}

\paragraph{第2题}

证明: \(1.96<\iint\limits_{\left|x\right| + \left|y\right| \le 10}\dfrac{\D{x}\D{y}}{100 + \cos^2 x + \cos^2 y}<2\).

\paragraph{证明}

由于 \(\cos^2 x + \cos^2 y \in [0, 2]\), 因此

\[ 1.96<\dfrac{200}{102} < \iint\limits_{\left|x\right| + \left|y\right| \le 10}\dfrac{\D{x}\D{y}}{100 + \cos^2 x + \cos^2 y}<\dfrac{200}{100} = 2. \]

\paragraph{第3题}

比较下列各组积分值的大小.

(1) \(\iint\limits_{D}(x + y)^2\D{x}\D{y}\) 与 \(\iint\limits_{D}(x + y)^3\D{x}\D{y}\), 其中 \(D = \{(x, y) | (x - 2)^2 + (y - 2)^2 \le 2\}\);

(2) \(\iint\limits_{D}\ln(x + y)\D{x}\D{y}\) 与 \(\iint\limits_{D}xy\D{x}\D{y}\), 其中 \(D\) 由直线 \(x = 0, y = 0, x + y = \dfrac{1}{2}, x + y = 1\) 围成.

\paragraph{解}

(1) 由于在 \(D\) 上有 \(x + y \ge 1\), 因此 \(\iint\limits_{D}(x + y)^2\D{x}\D{y} \le \iint\limits_{D}(x + y)^3\D{x}\D{y}\).

(2) 由于在 \(D\) 上有 \(xy \ge \ln(x + y)\), 因此 \(\iint\limits_{D}\ln(x + y)\D{x}\D{y} \le \iint\limits_{D}xy\D{x}\D{y}\).

\paragraph{第4题}

设 \(D \subset \set{R}^2\) 为有界闭矩形, 非负函数 \(f(x, y) \in C(D)\), 证明: 若 \(\iint\limits_{D}f(x, y)\D{x}\D{y} = 0\), 则 \(f(x, y) = 0, \forall (x, y) \in D\).

\paragraph{证明}

反证法. 假设 \(\exists P_0(x_0, y_0)\) 使得 \(f(x_0, y_0) \neq 0\), 则 \(\exists \delta > 0\), 使得 \(\forall (x, y) \in B(P_0, \delta)\), 均有 \(f(x, y) > 0\). 因此 \(\iint\limits_{B(P_0, \delta)\subset D}f(x, y)\D{x}\D{y} > 0\). 而其他区域上 \(f(x, y)\) 非负, 所以 \(\iint\limits_{D}f(x, y)\D{x}\D{y} \ge \iint\limits_{B(P_0, \delta)\subset D}f(x, y)\D{x}\D{y} > 0\). 与题目条件矛盾. 故 \(f(x, y) = 0, \forall (x, y) \in D\).

\paragraph{第5题}

函数 \(f(x, y)\) 在 \((0, 0)\) 的某个邻域内连续, 计算极限 \(\lim\limits_{r \to 0^{+}}\dfrac{1}{r^2}\iint\limits_{x^2 + y^2 \le r^2}f(x, y)\D{x}\D{y}\).

\paragraph{证明}

由于 \(f(x, y)\) 在 \(O(0, 0)\) 的某个邻域内连续, 不妨记为 \(B(O, \delta)\), 因此由多元函数的中值定理可得 \(\exists \xi, \eta \in (0, \min\{\delta, r\})\) 使得 \(\iint\limits_{x^2 + y^2 \le r^2}f(x, y)\D{x}\D{y} = f(\xi, \eta)\iint\limits_{x^2 + y^2 \le r^2}\D{x}\D{y} = \pi r^2 f(\xi, \eta)\). 故

\[ \lim\limits_{r \to 0^{+}}\dfrac{1}{r^2}\iint\limits_{x^2 + y^2 \le r^2}f(x, y)\D{x}\D{y} = \lim\limits_{r \to 0^{+}}\dfrac{f(\xi, \eta)}{r^2}\pi r^2 = \pi f(0, 0) \]

docs.title: 习题3.3
docs.text:
\subsection{习题3.3解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

用二重积分的几何意义求下列二重积分的值.

(1) \(\iint\limits_{D}\sqrt{R^2 - x^2 - y^2}\D{x}\D{y}, D = \{(x, y) | x^2 + y^2 \le R^2\}\);

(2) \(\iint\limits_{D}\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}\D{x}\D{y}, D = \{(x, y) | x^2 + y^2 \le R^2\}\);

(3) \(\iint\limits_{D}\D{x}\D{y}, D = \{(x, y) | \left|x\right| + \left|y\right| \le 1\}\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) 这个积分是半径为 \(R\) 的上半球的体积, 因此 \(\iint\limits_{D}\sqrt{R^2 - x^2 - y^2}\D{x}\D{y} = \dfrac{2}{3}\pi R^3\).

(2) 这个积分是底面半径为 \(R\), 高度为 \(R\) 的圆锥的体积, 因此 \(\iint\limits_{D}\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}\D{x}\D{y} = \dfrac{2}{3}\pi R^3\).

(3) 这个积分是一个对角线长度为 \(2\) 的正方形的面积, 因此 \(\iint\limits_{D}\D{x}\D{y} = 2\).

\paragraph{第2题}

计算下列二重积分.

(1) \(\iint\limits_{I}\dfrac{x^2}{1 + y^2}\D{x}\D{y}, I = [0, 1]^2\);

(2) \(\iint\limits_{I}x\cos(xy)\D{x}\D{y}, I = \left[0, \dfrac{\pi}{2}\right] \times [0, 1]\);

(3) \(\iint\limits_{I}\sin(x + y)\D{x}\D{y}, I = [0, \pi]^2\).

\paragraph{解}

(1)

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{I}\dfrac{x^2}{1 + y^2}\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1}\dfrac{x^2}{1 + y^2}\D{y} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}x^2\arctan y\bigg\vert_{y=0}^{y=1}\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{4}\int_{0}^{1}x^2\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{4}\cdot \dfrac{1}{3}x^3\bigg\vert_{0}^{1} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{12} \end{aligned} \]

(2)

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{I}x\cos(xy)\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1}x\cos(xy)\D{y} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin(xy)\bigg\vert_{y=0}^{y=1}\D{x} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin x\D{x} \\ & = -\cos x\bigg\vert_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}} \\ & = 1 \end{aligned} \]

(3)

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{I}\sin(x + y)\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{0}^{\pi}\D{x}\int_{0}^{\pi}\sin(x + y)\D{y} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\pi}-\cos(x + y)\bigg\vert_{y=0}^{y=\pi}\D{x} \\ & = 0 \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第3题}

设函数 \(f(x, y)\) 在 \(I = [a, b] \times [c, d]\) 上有连续的二阶偏导数, 计算\(\iint\limits_{I}\dfrac{\partial ^2 f}{\partial x\partial y}\D{x}\D{y}\).

\paragraph{解}

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{I}\dfrac{\partial ^2 f}{\partial x\partial y}\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{a}^{b}\D{x}\int_{c}^{d}\dfrac{\partial ^2 f}{\partial x\partial y}\D{y} \\ & = \int_{a}^{b}\dfrac{\partial f}{\partial x}(x, y)\bigg\vert_{y=c}^{y=d}\D{x} \\ & = \int_{a}^{b}\left(\dfrac{\partial f(x,d)}{\partial x} - \dfrac{\partial f(x, c)}{\partial x}\right)\D{x} \\ & = f(x, d)\bigg\vert_{a}^{b} - f(x, c)\bigg\vert_{a}^{b} \\ & = f(b, d) - f(a, d) - f(b, c) + f(a, c) \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第4题}

将二重积分 \(\iint\limits_{D}f(x, y)\D{x}\D{y}\) 化为累次积分.

(1) \(D = \{(x, y) | x + y \le 1, y - x \le 1, y \ge 0\}\);

(2) \(D = \{(x, y) | y \ge x - 2, x \ge y^2\}\);

(3) \(D = \{(x, y) | \dfrac{2}{x} \le y \le 2x, 1 \le x \le 2\}\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) 由题知 \(y-1\le x \le 1-y\), 因此 \(y \in [0, 1]\). 故 \(\iint\limits_{D}f(x, y)\D{x}\D{y} = \int_{0}^{1}\D{y}\int_{y-1}^{1-y}f(x, y)\D{x}\).

(2) 由题知 \(y^2 \le x \le y + 2\), 因此 \(y \in [-1, 2]\). 故 \(\iint\limits_{D}f(x, y)\D{x}\D{y} = \int_{-1}^{2}\D{y}\int_{y^2}^{y+2}f(x, y)\D{x}\).

(3) 按题目所给约束, 有 \(\iint\limits_{D}f(x, y)\D{x}\D{y} = \int_{1}^{2}\D{x}\int_{\frac{2}{x}}^{2x}f(x, y)\D{y}\).

\paragraph{第5题}

在直角坐标系中画出下列积分的积分区域, 并交换积分次序.

(1) \(\int_{-1}^{0}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1 + x}f(x, y)\D{y} + \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1 - x}f(x, y)\D{y}\);

(2) \(\int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{2\sqrt{1-x}}^{\sqrt{4-x^2}}f(x, y)\D{y} + \int_{1}^{2}\D{x}\int_{0}^{\sqrt{4-x^2}}f(x, y)\D{y}\);

(3) \(\int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{\sqrt{2x-x^2}}f(x, y)\D{y} + \int_{1}^{2}\D{x}\int_{0}^{2-x}f(x, y)\D{y}\);

\paragraph{解}

(1)

\[\begin{figure}[!htbp] \centering \begin{tikzpicture} \begin{axis}[ axis lines=middle, samples=100, %grid, thick, domain=-1:1, %legend pos=outer north east, smooth, xmin=-1.1, xmax=1.1, ymin=0, ymax=1.1, xlabel={$x$}, ylabel={$y$}, mark=halfcircle*, mark size=2.9pt, ] \addplot+[no marks,domain=0:1]{1-x}; \addplot+[no marks,domain=-1:0]{1+x}; %\addplot+[sharp plot] coordinates {(3, 5.6569)}; %\addplot+[sharp plot] coordinates {(3, -5.6569)}; \end{axis} \end{tikzpicture} %\put(0, 0){O} \caption{习题3.3第5题(1)} %\label{} \end{figure}\]

由图知 \(\int_{-1}^{0}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1 + x}f(x, y)\D{y} + \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1 - x}f(x, y)\D{y} = \int_{0}^{1}\D{y}\int_{y-1}^{1-y}f(x, y)\D{x}\).

(2)

\[\begin{figure}[!htbp] \centering \begin{tikzpicture} \begin{axis}[ axis lines=middle, samples=100, %grid, thick, domain=-0.1:2.1, %legend pos=outer north east, smooth, xmin=0, xmax=2.1, ymin=0, ymax=2.1, xlabel={$x$}, ylabel={$y$}, mark=halfcircle*, mark size=2.9pt, ] \addplot+[no marks,domain=0:2]{sqrt(4-x^2)}; \addplot+[no marks,domain=0:1]{2*sqrt(1-x)}; %\addplot+[sharp plot] coordinates {(3, 5.6569)}; %\addplot+[sharp plot] coordinates {(3, -5.6569)}; \end{axis} \end{tikzpicture} %\put(0, 0){O} \caption{习题3.3第5题(2)} %\label{} \end{figure}\]

由图知 \(\int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{2\sqrt{1-x}}^{\sqrt{4-x^2}}f(x, y)\D{y} + \int_{1}^{2}\D{x}\int_{0}^{\sqrt{4-x^2}}f(x, y)\D{y} = \int_{0}^{2}\D{y}\int_{1-\frac{1}{4}y^2}^{\sqrt{4-y^2}}f(x,y)\D{x}\).

(3)

\[\begin{figure}[!htbp] \centering \begin{tikzpicture} \begin{axis}[ axis lines=middle, samples=100, %grid, thick, domain=0:2, %legend pos=outer north east, smooth, xmin=0, xmax=2.1, ymin=0, ymax=1.1, xlabel={$x$}, ylabel={$y$}, mark=halfcircle*, mark size=2.9pt, ] \addplot+[no marks,domain=1:2]{2-x}; \addplot+[no marks,domain=0:1]{sqrt(2*x-x^2)}; %\addplot+[sharp plot] coordinates {(3, 5.6569)}; %\addplot+[sharp plot] coordinates {(3, -5.6569)}; \end{axis} \end{tikzpicture} %\put(0, 0){O} \caption{习题3.3第5题(3)} %\label{} \end{figure}\]

由图知 \(\int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{\sqrt{2x-x^2}}f(x, y)\D{y} + \int_{1}^{2}\D{x}\int_{0}^{2-x}f(x, y)\D{y} = \int_{0}^{1}\D{y}\int_{1-\sqrt{1-y^2}}^{2-y}f(x,y)\D{x}\).

\paragraph{第6题}

计算下列二重积分.

(1) \(\iint\limits_{D}xy^2\D{x}\D{y}, D = \{(x, y) | 4x \ge y^2, x \le 1\}\);

(3) \(\iint\limits_{D}\left|xy\right|\D{x}\D{y}, D = \{(x, y) | x^2+y^2\le R^2\}\);

(5) \(\iint\limits_{D}(x^2 + y^2)\D{x}\D{y}\), \(D\) 是以 \(y=x, y=x+1, y=1, y=4\) 为边的平行四边形区域;

(7) \(\iint\limits_{D}\cos(x+y)\D{x}\D{y}, D = \{(x, y) | 0 \le x, y \le \pi\}\);

(9) \(\iint\limits_{D}y^2\D{x}\D{y}\), \(D\) 由 \(\begin{cases}x=a(t-\sin t), \\ y = a(1-\cos t),\end{cases}0\le t \le 2\pi\) 以及 \(x\) 轴围成;

\paragraph{解}

(1)

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{D}xy^2\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{-2}^{2}\D{y}\int_{\frac{1}{4}y^2}^{1}xy^2\D{x} \\ & = \int_{-2}^{2}\dfrac{1}{2}x^2y^2\bigg\vert_{x=\frac{1}{4}y^2}^{x=1}\D{y} \\ & = \int_{-2}^{2}\left(\dfrac{1}{2}y^2-\dfrac{1}{32}y^6\right)\D{y} \\ & = \left(\dfrac{1}{6}y^3 - \dfrac{1}{224}y^7\right)\bigg\vert_{-2}^2 \\ & = \dfrac{32}{21} \end{aligned} \]

(2) 考虑 \(D_{\rho, \varphi} = \{(\rho, \varphi) | 0 \le \rho \le R, 0 \le \phi \le \dfrac{\pi}{2}\}\), 则由对称性可知 \(\iint\limits_{D}\left|xy\right|\D{x}\D{y} = 4\iint\limits_{D_{\rho,\varphi}}\rho^2\sin\varphi\cos\varphi\rho\D{\rho}\D{\varphi}\).

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{D_{\rho,\varphi}}\rho^2\sin\varphi\cos\varphi\rho\D{\rho}\D{\varphi} & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\dfrac{1}{8}\sin2\varphi\rho^4\bigg\vert_{\rho = 0}^{\rho = R}\D{\varphi} \\ & = \dfrac{R^4}{8}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin2\varphi\D{\varphi} \\ & = \dfrac{R^4}{16}(-\cos2\varphi)\bigg\vert_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}} \\ & = \dfrac{R^4}{8} \end{aligned} \]

故 \(\iint\limits_{D}\left|xy\right|\D{x}\D{y} = 4\iint\limits_{D_{\rho,\varphi}}\rho^2\sin\varphi\cos\varphi\rho\D{\rho}\D{\varphi} = \dfrac{R^4}{2}\).

(5)

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{D}(x^2 + y^2)\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{1}^{4}D{y}\int_{y-1}^{y}(x^2+y^2)\D{x} \\ & = \int_{1}^{4}\left(\dfrac{1}{3}x^3+xy^2\right)\bigg\vert_{x=y-1}^{x=y}\D{y} \\ & = \int_{1}^{4}\left(2y^2-y + \dfrac{1}{3}\right)\D{y} \\ & = \left(\dfrac{2}{3}y^3 - \dfrac{1}{2}y^2 + \dfrac{1}{3}y\right)\bigg\vert_{1}^{4} \\ & = \dfrac{71}{2} \end{aligned} \]

(7)

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{D}\cos(x+y)\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{0}^{\pi}\D{x}\int_{0}^{\pi}\cos(x + y)\D{y} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\pi}\sin(x + y)\bigg\vert_{y=0}^{y=\pi}\D{x} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\pi}2\sin x\D{x} \\ & = 2\cos x\bigg\vert_{0}^{\pi} \\ & = -4 \end{aligned} \]

(9)

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{D}y^2\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{0}^{2\pi a}\D{x}\int_{0}^{y(x)}y^2\D{y} \\ & = \int_{0}^{2\pi a}\dfrac{1}{3}{y^3}\bigg\vert_{y=0}^{y=y(x)}\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{3}\int_{0}^{2\pi a}y^3(x)\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{3}\int_{0}^{2\pi}a^3(1-\cos t)^3a(1-\cos t)\D{t} \\ & = \dfrac{16a^4}{3}\int_{0}^{2\pi}\sin^8\dfrac{t}{2}\D{t} \\ & = \dfrac{32a^4}{3}\int_{0}^{2\pi}\sin^8 u\D{u} \\ & = \dfrac{64a^4}{3}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin^8 u\D{u} \\ & = \dfrac{64a^4}{3}\cdot\dfrac{\pi}{2}\cdot\dfrac{7!!}{8!!} \\ & = \dfrac{35}{12}\pi a^4 \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第8题}

利用第7题结论, 计算积分

\(\iint\limits_{D}x^2y^3\D{x}\D{y}\), \(\iint\limits_{D}\sqrt{R^2-x^2}\sin y\D{x}\D{y}\), \(D = \{(x, y) | x^2+y^2\le R^2\}\).

\paragraph{解}

由于 \(D\) 关于 \(x\) 轴对称且关于 \(y\) 轴对称, 且第一个被积函数关于 \(y\) 为奇函数, 所以第一个积分式为 \(0\). 同理, 第二个被积函数关于 \(y\) 也为奇函数, 所以第二个积分式也为 \(0\). 此即 \(\iint\limits_{D}x^2y^3\D{x}\D{y} = \iint\limits_{D}\sqrt{R^2-x^2}\sin y\D{x}\D{y} = 0\).

\paragraph{第9题}

分别求出由平面 \(z=x-y,z=0\) 与圆柱面 \(x^2+y^2=2x\) 所围成的两个空间几何体的体积.

\paragraph{解}

记 \(D_1 = \{x^2+y^2\le 2x, y \ge x\}, D_2 = \{0 \le x \le 1, 0 \le y \le x\}, D_3 = \{x^2+y^2\le 2x, x\ge1\lor y \le 0\}\). 容易验证总积分区域 \(D = D_1 + D_2 + D_3\).

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{D_2}z\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{x}(x-y)\D{y} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2}\int_{0}^{1}x^2\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{6} \end{aligned} \] \[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{D_1+D_2}z\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{\frac{\pi}{2}}^{\pi}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{1}r(1+r\cos\theta-r\sin\theta)\D{r} \\ & = \int_{\frac{\pi}{2}}^{\pi}\left(\dfrac{1}{2} + \dfrac{1}{3}\cos\theta - \dfrac{1}{3}\sin\theta\right)\D{\theta} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{4} -\dfrac{2}{3} \end{aligned} \] \[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{D_3}z\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{-\pi}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{1}r(1+r\cos\theta-r\sin\theta)\D{r} \\ & = \int_{-\pi}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\left(\dfrac{1}{2} + \dfrac{1}{3}\cos\theta - \dfrac{1}{3}\sin\theta\right)\D{\theta} \\ & = \dfrac{2}{3} + \dfrac{3\pi}{4} \end{aligned} \]

因此 \(V_1 = \int\limits_{D_1}z\D{x}\D{y} = \int\limits_{D_1+D_2}z\D{x}\D{y} - \iint\limits_{D_2}z\D{x}\D{y} = \dfrac{5}{6} - \dfrac{\pi}{4}, V_2 = \int\limits_{D_2+D_3}z\D{x}\D{y} = \int\limits_{D_2}z\D{x}\D{y} + \iint\limits_{D_3}z\D{x}\D{y} = \dfrac{5}{6} + \dfrac{3\pi}{4}\).

\paragraph{第10题}

求由旋转抛物面 \(z = x^2+y^2\), 柱面 \(y=x^2\) 及平面 \(y=1,z=0\) 围成的空间几何体的体积.

\paragraph{解}

体积为

\[ \begin{aligned} V & = \int_{-1}^{1}\D{x}\int_{x^2}^{1}(x^2+y^2)\D{y} \\ & = \int_{-1}^{1}\left(\dfrac{1}{3} + x^2 - x^4 - \dfrac{1}{3}x^6\right)\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{88}{105} \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第11题}

画出下列积分区域的图形, 并将二重积分 \(\iint\limits_{D}f(x, y)\D{x}\D{y}\) 化为极坐标下的累次积分.

(1) \(D = \{(x, y) | x^2 + y^2 \le 1, x^2 + (y-1)^2 \le 1\}\);

(2) \(D = \{(x, y) | x^2 + (y-a)^2 \le a^2, (x - a)^2 + y^2 \le a^2\}\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) 由图知 \(\iint\limits_{D}f(x, y)\D{x}\D{y} = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{6}}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{2\sin\theta}f(r\cos\theta, r\sin\theta)r\D{r} + \int_{\frac{\pi}{6}}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{2}f(r\cos\theta, r\sin\theta)r\D{r}\).

\[\begin{figure}[!htbp] \centering \begin{tikzpicture} \begin{axis}[ axis lines=middle, samples=100, %grid, thick, domain=-0.1:1.1, %legend pos=outer north east, smooth, xmin=0, xmax=1.1, ymin=0, ymax=1.1, xlabel={$x$}, ylabel={$y$}, mark=halfcircle*, mark size=2.9pt, ] \addplot+[no marks,domain=0:sqrt(3)/2]{sqrt(1-x^2)}; \addplot+[no marks,domain=0:sqrt(3)/2]{1-sqrt(1-x^2)}; %\addplot+[sharp plot] coordinates {(3, 5.6569)}; %\addplot+[sharp plot] coordinates {(3, -5.6569)}; \end{axis} \end{tikzpicture} %\put(0, 0){O} \caption{习题3.3第11题(1)} %\label{} \end{figure}\]

(2) 由图知 \(\iint\limits_{D}f(x, y)\D{x}\D{y} = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{4}}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{2a\sin\theta}f(r\cos\theta, r\sin\theta)r\D{r} + \int_{\frac{\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{2\cos\theta}f(r\cos\theta, r\sin\theta)r\D{r}\).

\[\begin{figure}[!htbp] \centering \begin{tikzpicture} \begin{axis}[ axis lines=middle, samples=100, %grid, thick, domain=-0.1:1.1, %legend pos=outer north east, smooth, xmin=0, xmax=1.1, ymin=0, ymax=1.1, xlabel={$x$}, ylabel={$y$}, mark=halfcircle*, mark size=2.9pt, ] \addplot+[no marks,domain=0:1]{1-sqrt(1-x^2)}; \addplot+[no marks,domain=0:1]{sqrt(1-(x-1)^2)}; %\addplot+[sharp plot] coordinates {(3, 5.6569)}; %\addplot+[sharp plot] coordinates {(3, -5.6569)}; \end{axis} \end{tikzpicture} %\put(0, 0){O} \caption{习题3.3第11题(2), 此时取 a=1} %\label{} \end{figure}\]

\paragraph{第12题}

计算下列二重积分.

(1) \(\iint\limits_{D}(x^2 + y^2)\D{x}\D{y}, D = \{(x, y) | 2x \le x^2 + y^2 \le 4x\}\);

(3) \(\iint\limits_{D}(x+y)\D{x}\D{y}\), \(D\) 是由 \(x^2+y^2=x+y\) 围成的平面区域;

(5) \(\iint\limits_{D}\arctan\dfrac{y}{x}\D{x}\D{y}, D = \{(x, y) | x^2 + y^2 \le 1, x \le 0, y \le 0\}\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) 代换 \(x = r\cos\theta, y = r\sin\theta\), 则区域变为 \(D_{r, \theta} = \{2\cos\theta \le r \le 4\cos\theta, \theta \in [0, \pi]\}\). 则

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{D}(x^2 + y^2)\D{x}\D{y} & = \iint\limits_{D_{r,\theta}}r^2\cdot r\D{r}\D{\theta} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\pi}\D{\theta}\int_{2\cos\theta}^{4\cos\theta}r^3\D{r} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\pi}60\cos^4\theta\D{\theta} \\ & = 120 \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\cos^4\theta\D{\theta} \\ & = 120\cdot\dfrac{\pi}{2}\cdot\dfrac{3\cdot 1}{4\cdot 2} \\ & = \dfrac{45}{2}\pi \end{aligned} \]

(3) 做坐标变换 \(\begin{cases}x = r\cos\theta, \\ y = r\sin\theta,\end{cases}\) 则有

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{D}(x+y)\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{-\frac{\pi}{4}}^{\frac{3\pi}{4}}\int_{0}^{\sin\theta + \cos\theta}r^2(\sin\theta + \cos\theta)\D{r} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{3}\int_{-\frac{\pi}{4}}^{\frac{3\pi}{4}}(\sin\theta + \cos\theta)^4\D{\theta} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{3}\int_{-\frac{\pi}{4}}^{\frac{3\pi}{4}}\left(\dfrac{3-\cos4\theta}{2} + 2\sin2\theta\right)\D{\theta} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{3}\cdot\dfrac{3\pi}{2} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{2} \end{aligned} \]

(5) 做坐标变换 \(\begin{cases}x = r\cos\theta, \\ y = r\sin\theta,\end{cases}\) 则有

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{D}\arctan\dfrac{y}{x}\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{0}^{1}r\D{r}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\theta\D{\theta} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2}\cdot\dfrac{\pi^2}{8} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi^2}{16} \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第13题}

求下列曲线所围图形的面积.

(1) 双纽线 \((x^2 + y^2)^2 = 2a^2(x^2-y^2)\) 与圆 \(x^2 + y^2 = a^2\) 所围图形 (圆外部分) 的面积 \((a > 0)\);

(2) 心脏线 \(r = a(1 + \cos\theta)\) 与圆 \(x^2 + y^2 = \sqrt{3}ay\) 所围图形 (心脏线内部) 的面积 \((a > 0)\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) 考虑 \(D = \{a \le \rho \le a\sqrt{2\cos 2\theta}, -\dfrac{\pi}{6} \le \theta \le \dfrac{\pi}{6} \lor \dfrac{5\pi}{6} \le \theta \le \dfrac{7\pi}{6}\}\). 则面积

\[ \begin{aligned} S & = \iint\limits_{D}\rho\D{\rho}\D{\theta} \\ & = \int_{-\frac{\pi}{6}}^{\frac{\pi}{6}}\D{\theta}\int_{a}^{a\sqrt{2\cos2\theta}}\rho \D{\rho}\D{\theta} + \int_{\frac{5\pi}{6}}^{\frac{7\pi}{6}}\D{\theta}\int_{a}^{a\sqrt{2\cos2\theta}}\rho \D{\rho}\D{\theta} \\ & = \left(\sqrt{3} - \dfrac{\pi}{3}\right)a^2 \end{aligned} \]

(2) 考虑 \(D = \{0 \le \rho \le \sqrt{3}a\sin\theta, 0 \le \theta \le \dfrac{\pi}{3}\} \bigcup \{0 \le \rho \le a(1 + \cos\theta), \dfrac{\pi}{3} \le \theta \le \pi\}\). 则面积

\[ \begin{aligned} S & = \iint\limits_{D}\rho\D{\rho}\D{\theta} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{3}}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{\sqrt{3}a\sin\theta}\rho \D{\rho}\D{\theta} + \int_{\frac{\pi}{3}}^{\pi}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{a(1+\cos\theta)}\rho \D{\rho}\D{\theta} \\ & = \dfrac{3\pi - 3\sqrt{3}}{4}a^2 \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第14题}

通过恰当的变量代换, 计算下列二重积分.

(1) \(\iint\limits_{D}x^2y^2\D{x}\D{y}\), \(D\) 是由 \(xy = 2, xy = 4, y=x, y=3x\) 在第一象限所围成的平面区域;

(2) \(\iint\limits_{D}(x^2 + y^2)\D{x}\D{y}\), \(D\) 是由 \(xy=1, xy=2, x^2-y^2=1, x^2-y^2=2\) 所围成的平面区域;

\paragraph{解}

(1) 做坐标变换 \((u, v) = (xy, \dfrac{y}{x})\), 则 \(\dfrac{D(x, y)}{D(u, v)} = \dfrac{1}{4v}\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{D}x^2y^2\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{1}^{3}\D{v}\int_{2}^{4}\dfrac{D(x, y)}{D(u, v)}u^2\D{u} \\ & = \int_{1}^{3}\dfrac{1}{4v}\D{v}\int_{2}^{4}u^2\D{u} \\ & = \dfrac{\ln3}{4}\cdot\dfrac{56}{3} \\ & = \dfrac{28\ln3}{3} \end{aligned} \]

(2) 做坐标变换 \((u, v) = (x^2-y^2, xy)\), 则 \(\dfrac{D(x, y)}{D(u, v)} = \dfrac{1}{2\sqrt{u^2+4v^2}}\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{D}(x^2 + y^2)\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{1}^{2}\D{v}\int_{1}^{2}\dfrac{D(x, y)}{D(u, v)}\sqrt{u^2+4v^2}\D{u} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2}\int_{1}^{2}\D{v}\int_{1}^{2}\D{u} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2} \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第15题}

求下列图形围成区域的面积.

(1) \((a_1x + b_1y + c_1)^2 + (a_2x + b_2y + c_2)^2 = 1\), 其中 \(a_1b_2 \neq a_2b_1\);

(2) \(\sqrt{x} + \sqrt{y} = \sqrt{a}\) 与 \(x = 0, y = 0\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) 做坐标变换 \((u, v) = (a_1x + b_1y + c_1, a_2x, b_2y, c_2)\), 则 \(\dfrac{D(x, y)}{D(u, v)} = \dfrac{1}{a_1b_2 - a_2b_1}\). 因此 \(S = \iint\limits_{u^2 + v^2 \le 1}\left|\dfrac{D(x, y)}{D(u, v)}\right|\D{u}\D{v} = \dfrac{\pi}{\left|a_1b_2 - a_2b_1\right|}\).

(2) 做坐标变换 \((u, v) = (\sqrt{x}, \sqrt{y})\), 则 \(\dfrac{D(x, y)}{D(u, v)} = 4uv\). 因此 \(S = \iint\limits_{u+v\le \sqrt{a}, u,v\ge 0}\left|\dfrac{D(x, y)}{D(u, v)}\right|\D{u}\D{v} = \iint\limits_{u+v\le\sqrt{a}, u, v\ge 0}4uv\D{u}\D{v} = \dfrac{1}{6}a^2\).

\paragraph{第16题}

设函数 \(f(t)\) 连续, 证明:

(1) \(\iint\limits_{\left|x\right| + \left|y\right| \le 1}f(x+y)\D{x}\D{y} = \int_{-1}^{1}f(t)\D{t}\).

(2) \(\iint\limits_{D}f(xy)\D{x}\D{y} = \ln 2\int_{1}^{2}f(t)\D{t}\), \(D\) 是由 \(xy = 1, xy = 2, y = x, y = 4x\) 所围成的第一象限的区域.

\paragraph{证明}

(1) 做坐标变换 \((u, v) = (x+y, x-y)\), 则 \(\dfrac{D(x, y)}{D(u, v)} = -\dfrac{1}{2}\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{\left|x\right| + \left|y\right| \le 1}f(x+y)\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{-1}^{1}\D{v}\int_{-1}^{1}\left|\dfrac{D(x, y)}{D(u, v)}\right|f(u)\D{u} \\ & = \int_{-1}^{1}f(u)\D{u} \\ & = \int_{-1}^{1}f(t)\D{t} \end{aligned} \]

(2) 做坐标变换 \((u, v) = (xy, \dfrac{y}{x})\), 则 \(\dfrac{D(x, y)}{D(u, v)} = \dfrac{1}{4v}\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{D}f(xy)\D{x}\D{y} & = \int_{1}^{4}\dfrac{D(x, y)}{D(u, v)}\D{v}\int_{1}^{2}f(u)\D{u} \\ & = \int_{1}^{4}\dfrac{1}{4v}\D{v}\int_{1}^{2}f(u)\D{u} \\ & = \ln2\int_{1}^{2}f(t)\D{t} \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第17题}

设函数 \(f(t)\) 连续, \(f(t) > 0\), 求积分 \(\iint\limits_{x^2 + y^2 \le R^2}\dfrac{af(x) + bf(y)}{f(x) + f(y)}\D{x}\D{y}\).

\paragraph{解}

由对称性, 记 \(S = \iint\limits_{x^2 + y^2 \le R^2}\dfrac{f(x)}{f(x) + f(y)}\D{x}\D{y} = \iint\limits_{x^2 + y^2 \le R^2}\dfrac{f(y)}{f(x) + f(y)}\D{x}\D{y}\), 则 \(2S = \iint\limits_{x^2 + y^2 \le R^2}\dfrac{f(x) + f(y)}{f(x) + f(y)}\D{x}\D{y} = \pi R^2\). 故 \(S = \dfrac{1}{2}\pi R^2\). 因此 \(\iint\limits_{x^2 + y^2 \le R^2}\dfrac{af(x) + bf(y)}{f(x) + f(y)}\D{x}\D{y} = aS + bS = \dfrac{a+b}{2}\pi R^2\).

\paragraph{第18题}

设函数 \(f(t, s)\) 连续, 求 \(F(x) = \int_{0}^{x}\int_{t^2}^{x^2}f(t, s)\D{s}\D{t}\) 的导函数.

\paragraph{解}

记 \(g(x, t) = \int_{t^2}^{x^2}f(t, s)\D{s}\), 则 \(F(x) = \int_{0}^{x}g(x, t)\D{t}\).

\[ \begin{aligned} F'(x) & = \int_{0}^{x}\dfrac{\partial g}{\partial x}(x, t)\D{t} + g(x, x) \\ & = \int_{0}^{x} f(t, x^2)\cdot 2x\D{t} + \int_{x^2}^{x^2}f(x, s)\D{s} \\ & = 2x\int_{0}^{x}f(t, x^2)\D{t} \end{aligned} \]

docs.title: 习题3.4
docs.text:
\subsection{习题3.4解答}

\paragraph{第3题}

利用三重积分的几何意义, 求下列三重积分的值.

(1) \(\iiint\limits_{\Omega}1\D{x}\D{y}\D{z}, \Omega = \{(x, y, z) | \sqrt{x^2 + y^2} \le z \le H\}\);

(2) \(\iiint\limits_{\Omega}1\D{x}\D{y}\D{z}, \Omega = \{(x, y, z) | 0 \le z \le 1 - x - y, 0 \le y \le 1 - x, 0 \le x \le 1\}\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) 由题知, 这个积分的值是一个底面半径为 \(H\) 高为 \(H\) 的圆锥的体积, 因此为 \(\dfrac{1}{3}\pi H^3\).

(2) 由题知, 这个积分的值是一个由三条两两垂直的长为 \(1\) 的边构成的正四面体的体积, 因此为 \(\dfrac{1}{6}\).

\paragraph{第4题}

将三重积分 \(\iiint\limits_{\Omega}f(x, y, z)\D{x}\D{y}\D{z}\) 化为直角坐标下的累次积分.

(1) \(\Omega = \{(x, y, z) | \sqrt{x^2 + y^2} \le z \le 1\}\);

(2) \(\Omega = \{(x, y, z) | 0 \le z \le x^2 + y^2, x + y \le 1, x \ge 0, y \ge 0\}\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) 由 \(\sqrt{x^2 + y^2} \le 1\) 得 \(-\sqrt{1-x^2} \le y \le \sqrt{1-x^2}\). 因此 \(\iiint\limits_{\Omega}f(x, y, z)\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} = \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{-\sqrt{1-x^2}}^{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\D{y}\int_{\sqrt{x^2+y^2}}^{1}f(x, y, z)\D{z}\).

(2) 由 \(x + y \le 1, x \ge 0, y \ge 0\) 得到 \(1 - x \le y \le 1, 0 \le x \le 1\). 因此 \(\iiint\limits_{\Omega}f(x, y, z)\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} = \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{1-x}^{1}\D{y}\int_{0}^{x^2+y^2}f(x, y, z)\D{z}\).

\paragraph{第5题}

计算下列三重积分的值.

(1) \(\iiint\limits_{\Omega}xy^2z^3\D{x}\D{y}\D{z}\), \(\Omega\) 是由马鞍面 \(z = xy\) 与平面 \(y = x, x = 1, z = 0\) 所围成的空间区域;

(3) \(\iiint\limits_{\Omega}x\cos(y + z)\D{x}\D{y}\D{z}\), \(\Omega\) 是由曲面 \(x = \sqrt{y}\) 与平面 \(x = 0, z = 0, y + z = \dfrac{\pi}{2}\) 围成的区域.

\paragraph{解}

(1) 由题知 \(\Omega = \{(x, y, z) | 0 \le x \le 1, 0 \le y \le x, 0 \le z \le xy\}\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \iiint\limits_{\Omega}xy^2z^3\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{x}\D{y}\int_{0}^{xy}xy^2z^3\D{z} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{x}\dfrac{1}{4}x^5y^6\D{y} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}\dfrac{1}{28}x^{12}\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{364} \end{aligned} \]

(3) 由题知 \(\Omega = \{(x, y, z) | 0 \le z \le \dfrac{\pi}{2}, 0 \le y \le \dfrac{\pi}{2} - z, 0 \le x \le \sqrt{y}\}\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \iiint\limits_{\Omega}x\cos(y + z)\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{z}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}-z}\D{y}\int_{0}^{\sqrt{y}}x\cos(y+z)\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{z}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}-z}y\cos(y+z)\D{y} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\left(\dfrac{\pi}{2} - z - \cos z\right)\D{z} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi^2}{16} - \dfrac{1}{2} \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第6题}

计算累次积分 \(I = \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{x}\D{y}\int_{0}^{y}\dfrac{\cos z}{(1 - z)^2}\D{z}\) 的值.

\paragraph{解}

积分区域为 \(\Omega = \{0 \le z \le y \le x \le 1\}\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} I & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{x}\D{y}\int_{0}^{y}\dfrac{\cos z}{(1 - z)^2}\D{z} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{z}\int_{z}^{1}\D{y}\int_{y}^{1}\dfrac{\cos z}{(1-z)^2}\D{x} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{z}\int_{z}^{1}(1-y)\dfrac{\cos z}{(1-z)^2}\D{y} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2}\int_{0}^{1}\cos z\D{z} \\ & = \dfrac{\sin 1}{2} \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第7题}

计算下列三重积分的值.

(1) \(\iiint\limits_{\Omega}\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}\D{x}\D{y}\D{z}, \Omega = \{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2} \le z \le 1\}\);

(3) \(\iiint\limits_{\Omega}\dfrac{z}{x^2 + y^2}\D{x}\D{y}\D{z}, \Omega = \{(x, y, z) | 0 \le z \le x^2 + y^2, x + y \le 1, x, y \ge 0\}\);

(5) \(\iiint\limits_{\Omega}xyz\D{x}\D{y}\D{z}, \Omega = \{(x, y, z) | x^2 + y^2 + z^2 \le 4, x^2 + y^2 + (z - 2)^2\le 4, x \ge 0, y \ge 0\}\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) 做坐标变换 \(\begin{cases}x = r\cos \theta, \\ y = r\sin \theta, \\ z = z,\end{cases}\) 则

\[ \begin{aligned} \iiint\limits_{\Omega}\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{r}\int_{0}^{2\pi}\D{\theta}\int_{r}^{1}r^2\D{z} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{r}\int_{0}^{2\pi}r^2(1-r)\D{\theta} \\ & = 2\pi\int_{0}^{1}r^2(1-r)\D{r} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{6} \end{aligned} \]

(3)

\[ \begin{aligned} \iiint\limits_{\Omega}\dfrac{z}{x^2 + y^2}\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1-x}\D{y}\int_{0}^{x^2+y^2}\dfrac{z}{x^2 + y^2}\D{z} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2}\int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1-x}(x^2+y^2)\D{y} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2}\int_{0}^{1}\left(x^2(1-x) + \dfrac{1}{3}(1-x)^3\right)\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{12} \end{aligned} \]

(5)

做坐标变换 \(\begin{cases}x = r\sin\varphi\cos\theta, \\ y = r\sin\varphi\sin\theta, \\ z = r\cos\varphi, \end{cases}\) 则 \(\Omega = \Omega_1 + \Omega_2\), 其中

\[ \begin{aligned} \Omega_1 & = \{0 \le r \le 2, 0 \le \varphi \le \dfrac{\pi}{4}, 0 \le \theta \le \dfrac{\pi}{2}\}, \\ \Omega_2 & = \{0 \le r \le 4\cos\varphi, \dfrac{\pi}{4} \le \varphi \le \dfrac{\pi}{2}, 0 \le \theta \le \dfrac{\pi}{2}\}. \end{aligned} \]

因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \iiint\limits_{\Omega_1}xyz\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} & = \int_{0}^{2}r^5\D{r}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{4}}\sin^3\varphi \cos\varphi\D{\varphi}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin\theta\cos\theta\D{\theta} \\ & = \int_{0}^{2}r^5\D{r}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{4}}\sin^3\varphi \D{\sin\varphi}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin\theta\D{\sin\theta} \\ & = \dfrac{32}{3}\cdot\dfrac{1}{16}\cdot\dfrac{1}{2} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{3} \end{aligned} \]

且

\[ \begin{aligned} \iiint\limits_{\Omega_2}xyz\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} & = \int_{\frac{\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin^3\varphi \cos\varphi\D{\varphi}\int_{0}^{4\cos\varphi}r^5\D{r}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin\theta\cos\theta\D{\theta} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2}\int_{\frac{\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin^3\varphi \cos\varphi\D{\varphi}\int_{0}^{4\cos\varphi}r^5\D{r} \\ & = \dfrac{1024}{3}\int_{\frac{\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin^3\varphi\cos^7\varphi\D{\varphi} \\ & = -\dfrac{1024}{3}\int_{\frac{\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}(1-\cos^2\varphi)\cos^7\varphi\D{\cos\varphi} \\ & = \dfrac{1024}{3}\int_{0}^{\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}}(u^7-u^9)\D{u} \\ & = \dfrac{8}{5} \end{aligned} \]

故

\[ \begin{aligned} \iiint\limits_{\Omega}xyz\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} & = \iiint\limits_{\Omega_1}xyz\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} + \iiint\limits_{\Omega_2}xyz\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{3} + \dfrac{8}{5} \\ & = \dfrac{29}{15} \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第8题}

做适当的变量代换, 计算下列三重积分.

(1) \(\iiint\limits_{\Omega}\sqrt{1 - \dfrac{x^2}{a^2} - \dfrac{y^2}{b^2} - \dfrac{z^2}{c^2}}\D{x}\D{y}\D{z}, \Omega = \{(x, y, z) | \dfrac{x^2}{a^2} + \dfrac{y^2}{b^2} + \dfrac{z^2}{c^2} \le 1\}\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) 作代换 \(\begin{cases}x = ar\sin\varphi\cos\theta, \\ y = br\sin\varphi\sin\theta, \\ z = cr\sin\varphi,\end{cases}\) 有

\[ \begin{aligned} \iiint\limits_{\Omega}\sqrt{1 - \dfrac{x^2}{a^2} - \dfrac{y^2}{b^2} - \dfrac{z^2}{c^2}}\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} & = abc\int_{0}^{2\pi}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{\pi}\sin\varphi\D{\varphi}\int_{0}^{1}\sqrt{1-r^2}r^2\D{r} \\ & = 4\pi abc\int_{0}^{1}r^2\sqrt{1-r^2}\D{r} \\ & = 4\pi abc\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin^2\alpha\cos\alpha\D{\sin\alpha} \\ & = 4\pi abc \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}(\sin^2\alpha - \sin^4\alpha)\D{\alpha} \\ & = 4\pi abc\cdot (\dfrac{1}{2} - \dfrac{3\cdot 1}{4\cdot 2})\cdot\dfrac{\pi}{2} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi^2 abc}{4} \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第10题}

设 \(f(t)\) 在 \((-\infty, +\infty)\) 上连续, \(f(t) = 3\iiint\limits_{x^2 + y^2 + z^2 \le t^2}f(\sqrt{x^2 + y^2 + z^2})\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} + \left|t^3\right|\), 求 \(f(t)\).

\paragraph{解}

注意到 \(f(t)\) 为偶函数, 因此暂时先考虑 \(t\ge 0\) 时的情况, 此时 \(f(t) = 3\iiint\limits_{x^2 + y^2 + z^2 \le t^2}f(\sqrt{x^2 + y^2 + z^2})\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} + t^3\). 作变换 \(\begin{cases}x = r\sin\varphi\cos\theta, \\ y = r\sin\varphi\sin\theta, \\ z = r\sin\varphi,\end{cases}\), 则

\[ \begin{aligned} f(t) & = 3\iiint\limits_{x^2 + y^2 + z^2 \le t^2}f(\sqrt{x^2 + y^2 + z^2})\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} + t^3 \\ & = t^3 + \int_{0}^{\pi}\sin\varphi\D{\varphi}\int_{0}^{2\pi}\D{\theta}\int_{-t}^{t}r^2f(r)\D{r} \\ & = t^3 + 12 \pi \int_{-t}^{t}r^2f(r)\D{r} \\ & = t^3 + 24 \pi \int_{0}^{t}r^2f(r)\D{r} \end{aligned} \]

对等式左右两侧求导, 有 \(f'(t) = 3t^2 + t^2f(t)\). 解得 \(f(t) = Ce^{8\pi t^3}-\dfrac{1}{8\pi}(t\ge 0)\). 又因为 \(f(0) = 0\) 且 \(f(t)\) 为偶函数, 因此

\[ f(t) = \dfrac{1}{8\pi}e^{8\pi \left|t^3\right|}-\dfrac{1}{8\pi} \]

\paragraph{第11题}

函数 \(f(x, y, z)\) 连续, 计算极限 \(\lim\limits_{r \to 0^{+}}\dfrac{1}{r^3}\iiint\limits_{x^2 + y^2 + z^2 \le r^2}f(x, y, z)\D{x}\D{y}\D{z}\).

\paragraph{解}

将积分中值定理推广到三维, 有 \(\exists \xi, \eta, \zeta \in (0, r)\) 使得 \(\iiint\limits_{x^2+y^2+z^2\le r^2}f(x, y, z)\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} = \dfrac{4}{3}\pi r^3f(\xi, \eta, \zeta)\). 代入则有

\[ \begin{aligned} \lim\limits_{r \to 0^{+}}\dfrac{1}{r^3}\iiint\limits_{x^2 + y^2 + z^2 \le r^2}f(x, y, z)\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} & = \lim\limits_{r \to 0^{+}}\dfrac{1}{r^3}\dfrac{4}{3}\pi r^3f(\xi, \eta, \zeta) \quad \xi, \eta, \zeta \in (0, r) \\ & = \dfrac{4}{3}\pi f(0, 0, 0) \end{aligned} \]

docs.title: 习题3.5
docs.text:
\subsection{习题3.5解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

求下列曲面的面积.

(1) 柱面 \(x^2 + z^2 = a^2\) 在柱面 \(x^2 + y^2 = a^2\) 内的部分;

(2) 锥面 \(z = \sqrt{x^2 + y^2}\) 在柱面 \(z^2 = 2x\) 内的部分;

(3) 由曲面 \(x^2 + y^2 = az\) 与 \(z = 2a - \sqrt{x^2 + y^2}\) 所包围的空间几何体的表面积.

\paragraph{解}

(1) 只考虑 \(z \ge 0\) 部分的面积 \(S_1\). 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = -\dfrac{x}{\sqrt{a^2-x^2}}, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = 0\), 因此 \(\sqrt{1 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}\right)^2 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}\right)^2} = \sqrt{1 + \dfrac{x^2}{a^2-x^2}} = \dfrac{a}{\sqrt{a^2-x^2}}\).

\[ \begin{aligned} S_1 & = \iint\limits_{x^2+y^2\le a^2}\dfrac{a}{\sqrt{a^2-x^2}}\D{x}\D{y} \\ & = \int_{-a}^{a}\D{x}\int_{-\sqrt{a^2-x^2}}^{\sqrt{a^2-x^2}}\dfrac{a}{\sqrt{a^2-x^2}}\D{y} \\ & = \int_{-a}^{a}2a\D{x} \\ & = 4a^2 \end{aligned} \]

由对称性知 \(S = 2S_1 = 8a^2\).

(2) 在 \(xy\) 面上的投影为 \(D_{xy} = \{(x, y) | x^2 + y^2 \le 2x\}\), 是一个以 \((1, 0)\) 为圆心, \(1\) 为半径的圆, 面积为 \(\pi\). 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = \dfrac{x}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}}, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = \dfrac{y}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}}\), 故 \(\sqrt{1 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}\right)^2 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}\right)^2} = \sqrt{2}\). 因此

\[ S = \iint\limits_{D_{xy}}\sqrt{2}\D{x}\D{y} = \sqrt{2}\pi \]

(3) 两者的交线为 \(x^2 + y^2 = a(2a-\sqrt{x^2+y^2})\). 积分区域为 \(\{(x, y) | x^2+y^2 \le a(2a - \sqrt{x^2+y^2})\}\), 化简后即为 \(\{(x, y) | x^2 + y^2 \le a^2\}\). 先考虑 \(z = 2a - \sqrt{x^2 + y^2}\) 带来的上表面面积 \(S_1\). 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = -\dfrac{x}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}}, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = -\dfrac{y}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}}\), 故 \(\sqrt{1 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}\right)^2 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}\right)^2} = \sqrt{2}\).

\[ \begin{aligned} S_1 & = \iint\limits_{x^2+y^2\le a^2}\sqrt{1 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}\right)^2 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}\right)^2}\D{x}\D{y} \\ & = \sqrt{2}\iint\limits_{x^2+y^2\le a^2}\D{x}\D{y} \\ & = \sqrt{2}\pi a^2 \end{aligned} \]

再考虑 \(x^2 + y^2 = az\) 带来的下表面面积 \(S_2\). 由于 \(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x} = \dfrac{2x}{a}, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y} = \dfrac{2y}{a}\), 故 \(\sqrt{1 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}\right)^2 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}\right)^2} = \sqrt{\dfrac{a^2 + 4(x^2 + y^2)}{a^2}}\). 极坐标变换后, 有

\[ \begin{aligned} S_2 & = \iint\limits_{x^2 + y^2 \le a^2}\sqrt{1 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}\right)^2 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}\right)^2}\D{x}\D{y} \\ & = \int_{0}^{2\pi}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{a}r\cdot\sqrt{1+\dfrac{4r^2}{a^2}}\D{r} \\ & = \dfrac{2\pi}{a}\int_{0}^{a}r\sqrt{a^2 + 4r^2}\D{r} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{4a}\int_{a^2}^{5a^2}\sqrt{u}\D{u} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{6}(5\sqrt{5} - 1)a^2 \end{aligned} \]

因此表面积为 \(S = S_1 + S_2 = \dfrac{\pi}{6}(6\sqrt{2} + 5\sqrt{5} - 1)a^2\).

\paragraph{第2题}

求下列曲面所包围的均匀物体的质心.

(1) \(\dfrac{x^2}{a^2} + \dfrac{y^2}{b^2} + \dfrac{z^2}{c^2} = 1, x \ge 0, y \ge 0, z \ge 0\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) 积分区域为 \(\Omega = \{(x, y, z) | \dfrac{x^2}{a^2} + \dfrac{y^2}{b^2} + \dfrac{z^2}{c^2} \le 1, x \ge 0, y \ge 0, z \ge 0\}\). 做坐标变换 \(\begin{cases}x = ar\sin\varphi\cos\theta, \\ x = br\sin\varphi\sin\theta, \\ z = cr\cos\varphi, \end{cases}\), 则 \(\left|\dfrac{D(x, y, z)}{D(r, \varphi, \theta)}\right| = abcr^2\sin\varphi\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} M & = \iiint\limits_{\Omega}\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{\varphi}\int_{0}^{1}\left|\dfrac{D(x, y, z)}{D(r, \varphi, \theta)}\right|\D{r} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{\varphi}\int_{0}^{1}abcr^2\sin\varphi\D{r} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin\varphi\D{\varphi}\int_{0}^{1}abcr^2\D{r} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{2}\cdot 1\cdot \dfrac{1}{3}abc \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{6}abc \end{aligned} \]

对 \(xy\) 平面的静力矩为

\[ \begin{aligned} M_{xy} & = \iiint\limits_{\Omega}z\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{\varphi}\int_{0}^{1}\left|\dfrac{D(x, y, z)}{D(r, \varphi, \theta)}\right|cr\cos\varphi\D{r} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{\varphi}\int_{0}^{1}abc^2r^3\sin\varphi\cos\varphi\D{r} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin\varphi\cos\varphi\D{\varphi}\int_{0}^{1}abc^2r^3\D{r} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{2}\cdot \dfrac{1}{2}\cdot \dfrac{1}{4}abc^2 \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{16}abc^2 \end{aligned} \]

由对称性知 \(M_{yz} = \dfrac{\pi}{16}a^2bc, M_{xz} = \dfrac{\pi}{16}ab^2c\). 因此质心坐标为 \(\left(\dfrac{3a}{8}, \dfrac{3b}{8}, \dfrac{3c}{8}\right)\).

\paragraph{第3题}

求解下列问题.

(1) 物体在 \(P(x, y, z)\) 的点密度为 \(\rho = \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{x^2+y^2+z^2}}, \Omega = \{(x, y, z) | 0 \le x, y, z \le 1\}\), 求物体的质心;

\paragraph{解}

(1) 总质量为

\[ \begin{aligned} M & = \iiint\limits_{\Omega}(x+y+z)\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1}\D{y}\int_{0}^{1}(x+y+z)\D{z} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1}(x+y+\dfrac{1}{2})\D{y} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}(x+1)\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{3}{2} \end{aligned} \]

对 \(xy\) 平面的静力矩为

\[ \begin{aligned} M_{xy} & = \iiint\limits_{\Omega}z(x+y+z)\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1}\D{y}\int_{0}^{1}z(x+y+z)\D{z} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1}\left(\dfrac{1}{2}(x+y)+\dfrac{1}{3}\right)\D{y} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}\left(\dfrac{1}{2}x + \dfrac{7}{12}\right)\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{5}{6} \end{aligned} \]

因此 \(\bar{z} = \dfrac{M_{xy}}{M} = \dfrac{5}{9}\). 由对称性知 \(\bar{x} = \bar{y} = \bar{z} = \dfrac{5}{9}\). 因此质心坐标为 \(\left(\dfrac{5}{9}, \dfrac{5}{9}, \dfrac{5}{9}\right)\).

\paragraph{第4题}

求下列曲面所包围的均匀物体关于 \(z\) 轴的转动惯量.

(1) \(z = x^2+y^2, x+y = \pm 1, x - y = \pm 1, z = 0\);

\paragraph{解}

(1) 设积分区域为 \(\Omega = \{(x, y, z) | z \le x^2 + y^2, x+y\le 1, x\ge 0, y \ge 0, z \ge 0\}\).

\[ \begin{aligned} J_z' & = \iiint\limits_{\Omega}(x^2+y^2)\D{x}\D{y}\D{z} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1-x}\D{y}\int_{0}^{x^2+y^2}(x^2+y^2)\D{z} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1-x}(x^2+y^2)^2\D{y} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}\left(-\dfrac{28}{15}x^5+4x^4-4x^3+\dfrac{8}{3}x^2-x+\dfrac{1}{5}\right)\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{7}{90} \end{aligned} \]

由对称性知 \(J_z = 4J_z' = 4\cdot\dfrac{7}{90} = \dfrac{14}{45}\).

docs.title: 习题4.2
docs.text:
\subsection{习题4.2解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

计算下列曲线积分.

(1) \(\int_L(x+y)\D{l}\), 其中 \(L\) 为 \(O(0, 0), A(1, 0), B(0, 1)\) 为顶点的三角形的三条边;

(2) \(\int_L\sqrt{x^2+y^2}\D{l}\), 其中 \(L\) 为圆周 \(x^2+y^2=2x\);

(3) \(\int_Ly^2\D{l}\), 其中 \(L\) 为摆线 \(\begin{cases}x = a(t - \sin t), \\ y = a(1 - \cos t),\end{cases}0 \le t \le 2\pi\);

(4) \(\int_L(x^{\frac{4}{3}}+y^{\frac{4}{3}})\D{l}\), 其中 \(L\) 为星形线 \(\begin{cases}x = a\cos^3t, \\ y = a\sin^3t,\end{cases}0 \le t \le 2\pi\).

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(L = L_1 + L_2 + L_3\), 其中 \(L_1 = \begin{cases}x = x, \\ y = 0, \end{cases}L_2 = \begin{cases}x = x, \\ y = 1-x, \end{cases}L_3 = \begin{cases}x = 0, \\ y = y, \end{cases}(0 \le x \le 1, 0 \le y \le 1)\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_L (x+y)\D{l} & = \int_{L_1} (x+y)\D{l} + \int_{L_2} (x+y)\D{l} + \int_{L_3} (x+y)\D{l} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}x\D{x} + \int_{0}^{1}\sqrt{2}\D{x} + \int_{0}^{1}y\D{y} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2} + \sqrt{2} + \dfrac{1}{2} \\ & = \sqrt{2} + 1 \end{aligned} \]

(2) 设 \(\begin{cases}x=1+\cos\theta, \\ y = \sin\theta, \end{cases}\) 则 \(\D{l} = \sqrt{(\D{x})^2 + (\D{y})^2} = \sqrt{(-\sin\theta)^2+(\cos\theta)^2}\D{\theta} = \D{\theta}\).

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_L\sqrt{x^2+y^2}\D{l} & = \int_{-\pi}^{\pi}\sqrt{(1+\cos\theta)^2 + \sin^2\theta}\D{\theta} \\ & = \int_{-\pi}^{\pi}2\cos\dfrac{\theta}{2}\D{\theta} \\ & = 4\int_{-\frac{\pi}{2}}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\cos u\D{u} \\ & = 8 \end{aligned} \]

(3) \(\D{l} = \sqrt{(\D{x})^2 + (\D{y})^2} = \sqrt{a^2(a-\cos t)^2 + (a\sin t)^2} = \sqrt{2}a\sin\dfrac{t}{2}\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_Ly^2\D{l} & = \int_{0}^{2\pi}a^2(1-\cos t)^2\cdot\sqrt{2}a\sin\dfrac{t}{2} \D{t} \\ & = 4\sqrt{2}a^3\int_{0}^{2\pi}\sin^3\dfrac{t}{2}\D{t} \\ & = 8\sqrt{2}a^3\int_{0}^{2\pi}\sin^3u\D{u} \\ & = 32\sqrt{2}a^3\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin^5u\D{u} \\ & = 32\sqrt{2}a^3\cdot\dfrac{4 \cdot 2}{5\cdot 3} \\ & = \dfrac{256}{15}a^3 \end{aligned} \]

(4) \(\D{l} = \sqrt{(\D{x})^2+(\D{y})^2} = \sqrt{(3a\cos^2t\sin t)^2 + (3a\sin^2t\cos t)^2}\D{t} = 3a\left|\sin t\cos t\right|\D{t}\). 只考虑 \(0 \le t \le \dfrac{\pi}{2}\) 的情况.

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_{L'}(x^{\frac{4}{3}}+y^{\frac{4}{3}})\D{l} & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}a^{\frac{4}{3}}(\cos^4t+\sin^4t)\cdot 3a(\sin t\cos t)\D{t} \\ & = 3a^{\frac{7}{3}}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}(\cos^4t+\sin^4t)\sin t\cos t\D{t} \\ & = 3a^{\frac{7}{3}}\left(\dfrac{1}{6}\sin^6t - \dfrac{1}{6}\cos^6t\right)\bigg\vert_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}} \\ & = a^{\frac{7}{3}} \end{aligned} \]

由对称性知 \(\int_{L}(x^{\frac{4}{3}}+y^{\frac{4}{3}})\D{l} = 4\int_{L'}(x^{\frac{4}{3}}+y^{\frac{4}{3}})\D{l} = 4a^{\frac{7}{3}}\).

\paragraph{第2题}

计算下列曲线积分.

(1) \(\int_L x\sqrt{x^2-y^2}\D{l}\), 其中 \(L\) 为双纽线右半支 \(r^2 = a^2\cos2\theta(-\dfrac{\pi}{4} \le \theta \le \dfrac{\pi}{4}, a > 0)\);

(2) \(\int_L(x^2+y^2+z^2)\D{l}\), 其中 \(L\) 为螺线 \(x=2\cos t, y=2\sin t, z=3t(0\le t \le 2\pi)\);

(3) \(\int_L xyz \D{l}\), 其中 \(L\) 的参数方程为 \(x=t, y=\dfrac{2}{3}\sqrt{2}t^{\frac{3}{2}}, z=\dfrac{1}{2}t^2(0 \le t \le 1)\);

(4) \(\int_L x\D{l}\), 其中 \(L\) 为球面 \(x^2+y^2+z^2=4\) 在第一象限部分的边界.

\paragraph{解}

(1) 由题知 \(\sqrt{x^2-y^2}=\sqrt{(r\cos\theta)^2-(r\sin\theta)^2} = \sqrt{r^2\cos2\theta} = \dfrac{r^2}{a}\). 而

\[ \begin{aligned} \D{l} & = \sqrt{(\D{x})^2+(\D{y})^2} \\ & = \sqrt{(-r\sin\theta)^2+(r\cos\theta)^2} \\ & = \sqrt{(\cos\theta\D{r} - r\sin\theta\D{\theta})^2 + (\sin\theta\D{r} + r\cos\theta\D{\theta})^2} \\ & = \sqrt{(\D{r})^2 + r^2(\D{\theta})^2} \end{aligned} \]

对 \(r^2 = a^2\cos2\theta\) 微分得到 \(\D{r} = -\dfrac{a^2\sin2\theta}{r}\D{\theta}\), 代入有 \(\D{l} = \sqrt{\left(-\dfrac{a^2\sin2\theta}{r}\D{\theta}\right)^2+r^2(\D{\theta})^2} = \dfrac{1}{r}\sqrt{r^4 - (a^2\sin2\theta)^2}\D{\theta}\). 结合 \(r^2 = a^2\cos2\theta\) 知 \(\D{l} = \dfrac{a^2}{r}\D{\theta}\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_L x\sqrt{x^2-y^2}\D{l} & = \int_{-\frac{\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{4}}r\cos\theta\cdot \dfrac{r^2}{a}\cdot \dfrac{a^2}{r}\D{\theta} \\ & = a\int_{-\frac{\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{4}}r^2\cos\theta\D{\theta} \\ & = a\int_{-\frac{\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{4}}a^2\cos2\theta\cos\theta\D{\theta} \\ & = a^3\int_{-\frac{\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{4}}(1-2\sin^2\theta)\cos\theta\D{\theta} \\ & = a^3\left(\sin\theta - \dfrac{2}{3}\sin^3\theta\right)\bigg\vert_{-\frac{\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{4}} \\ & = \dfrac{2\sqrt{2}a^3}{3} \end{aligned} \]

(2) \(\D{l} = \sqrt{(\D{x})^2+(\D{y})^2+(\D{z})^2} = \sqrt{(-2\sin t)^2+(2\cos t)^2 + 3^2} = \sqrt{13}\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_L(x^2+y^2+z^2)\D{l} & = \int_{0}^{2\pi}(4 + 9t^2)\cdot\sqrt{13}\D{t} \\ & = \sqrt{13}(4t + 3t^3)\bigg\vert_{0}^{2\pi} \\ & = 24\sqrt{13}\pi^3+8\sqrt{13}\pi \end{aligned} \]

(3) \(\D{l} = \sqrt{(\D{x})^2+(\D{y})^2+(\D{z})^2} = \sqrt{1^2+(\sqrt{2t})^2 + t^2} = (t+1)\D{t}\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_Lxyz\D{l} & = \int_{0}^{1}\dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{3}t^{\frac{9}{2}}\cdot(t+1)\D{t} \\ & = \dfrac{2\sqrt{2}}{3}t^{\frac{11}{2}}\left(\dfrac{1}{13}t + \dfrac{1}{11}\right)\bigg\vert_{0}^{1} \\ & = \dfrac{16\sqrt{2}}{143} \end{aligned} \]

(4) \(L = L_1 + L_2 + L_3\), 其中 \(L_1 = \begin{cases}x = 0, \\ y = 2\cos\theta, \\ z = 2\sin\theta, \end{cases}L_2 = \begin{cases}x = 2\cos\theta, \\ y = 0, \\ z = 2\sin\theta, \end{cases} L_3 = \begin{cases}x = 2\cos\theta, \\ y = 2\sin\theta, \\ z = 0, \end{cases}(0 \le \theta \le \dfrac{\pi}{2})\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_L x\D{l} & = \int_{L_1} x\D{l} + \int_{L_2} x\D{l} + \int_{L_3} x\D{l} \\ & = 0 + 2\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}2\cos\theta\cdot4\D{\theta} \\ & = 8 \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第4题}

曲线 \(y=\ln x\) 的线密度 \(\rho(x, y) = x^2\), 试求曲线在 \(x = \sqrt{3}\) 与 \(x = \sqrt{15}\) 之间的质量.

\paragraph{解}

\(M = \int_L\rho(x, y)\D{l}\), 其中 \(L\) 是 \(y=\ln x(\sqrt{3} \le x \le \sqrt{15})\). 而 \(\D{l} = \sqrt{(\D{x})^2+(\D{y})^2} = \sqrt{1 + \dfrac{1}{x^2}}\D{x}\), 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} M & = \int_L\rho(x, y)\D{l} \\ & = \int_{\sqrt{3}}^{\sqrt{15}}x^2\cdot \sqrt{1 + \dfrac{1}{x^2}}\D{x} \\ & = \int_{\sqrt{3}}^{\sqrt{15}}x\sqrt{x^2+1}\D{x} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{3}(x^2+1)^{\frac{3}{2}}\bigg\vert_{\sqrt{3}}^{\sqrt{15}} \\ & = \dfrac{56}{3} \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第5题}

求圆柱面 \(x^2+y^2=a^2\) 介于曲面 \(z = a+\dfrac{x^2}{a}\) 与 \(z=0\) 之间的面积 (\(a > 0\)).

\paragraph{解}

积分区域为 \(L = \{(x, y) | x^2+y^2=a^2\} = \{(x, y) | x = a\cos\theta, b=a\sin\theta, 0 \le \theta \le 2\pi\}\). 而 \(\D{l} = \sqrt{(\D{x})^2+(\D{y})^2} = \sqrt{(-a\sin\theta)^2 + (a\cos\theta)^2}\D{\theta} = a\D{\theta}\), 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} S & = \int_{L}z\D{l} \\ & = \int_{0}^{2\pi}(a+a\cos^2\theta)a\D{\theta} \\ & = \dfrac{1}{2}a^2\int_{0}^{2\pi}(3+\cos2\theta)\D{\theta} \\ & = 3\pi a^2 \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第6题}

求摆线 \(\begin{cases}x = a(t - \sin t), \\ y = a(1 - \cos t),\end{cases}0 \le t \le \pi\) 的形心.

\paragraph{解}

\(\D{l} = \sqrt{(\D{x})^2 + (\D{y})^2} = \sqrt{a^2(a-\cos t)^2 + (a\sin t)^2} = \sqrt{2}a\sin\dfrac{t}{2}\).

总质量

\[ \begin{aligned} M & = \int_{L}\D{l} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\pi}\sqrt{2}a\sin\dfrac{t}{2}\D{t} \\ & = \sqrt{2}a\int_{0}^{\pi}\sin\dfrac{t}{2}\D{t} \\ & = 2\sqrt{2}a\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin u\D{u} \\ & = 2\sqrt{2}a \end{aligned} \]

对 \(x\) 轴的静力矩

\[ \begin{aligned} M_{x} & = \int_{L}y\D{l} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\pi}a(1-\cos t)\cdot\sqrt{2}a\sin\dfrac{t}{2}\D{t} \\ & = 2\sqrt{2}a^2\int_{0}^{\pi}\sin^2\dfrac{t}{2}\cdot\sin\dfrac{t}{2}\D{t} \\ & = 4\sqrt{2}a^2\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin^3u\D{u} \\ & = 4\sqrt{2}a^2\cdot\dfrac{2}{3} \\ & = \dfrac{8\sqrt{2}a^2}{3} \end{aligned} \]

对 \(y\) 轴的静力矩

\[ \begin{aligned} M_y & = \int_{L}x\D{l} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\pi}a(t-\sin t)\cdot\sqrt{2}a\sin\dfrac{t}{2}\D{t} \\ & = \sqrt{2}a^2\int_{0}^{\pi}t\sin\dfrac{t}{2}\D{t} -\sqrt{2}a^2\int_{0}^{\pi}\sin t\sin\dfrac{t}{2}\D{t} \\ & = 4\sqrt{2}a^2\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}u\sin u\D{u} - 4\sqrt{2}a^2\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}sin^2u\cos u\D{u} \\ & = 4\sqrt{2}a^2(-u\cos u + \sin u)\bigg\vert_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}} - \dfrac{4\sqrt{2}a^2}{3}\sin^3u\bigg\vert_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}} \\ & = 4\sqrt{2}a^2 - \dfrac{4\sqrt{2}a^2}{3} \\ & = \dfrac{8\sqrt{2}a^2}{3} \end{aligned} \]

因此形心在 \(\left(\dfrac{M_x}{M}, \dfrac{M_y}{M}\right)\) 即 \((\dfrac{4a}{3}, \dfrac{4a}{3})\) 处.

\paragraph{第7题}

求螺线 \(x = a\cos t, y = a\sin t, z = \dfrac{b}{2\pi}t(0 \le t \le 2\pi)\) 绕 \(x\) 轴旋转的转动惯量 (线密度为 \(1\)).

\paragraph{解}

\(\D{l} = \sqrt{(\D{x})^2+(\D{y})^2+(\D{z})^2} = \sqrt{(a\sin t)^2+(a\cos t)^2 + \left(\dfrac{b}{2\pi}\right)^2}\D{t} = \dfrac{\sqrt{b^2+4\pi^2a^2}}{2\pi}\D{t}\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} J_{x} & = \int_{L}(y^2 + z^2)\D{l} \\ & = \int_{0}^{2\pi}\left(a^2\sin^2t + \left(\dfrac{b}{2\pi}t\right)^2\right)\dfrac{\sqrt{b^2+4\pi^2a^2}}{2\pi}\D{t} \\ & = \dfrac{\sqrt{b^2+4\pi^2a^2}}{2\pi}\int_{0}^{2\pi}\left(a^2\cdot\dfrac{1-2\cos2t}{2} + \dfrac{b^2}{4\pi^2}\cdot t^2\right)\D{t} \\ & = \dfrac{\sqrt{b^2+4\pi^2a^2}}{2\pi}\cdot\left(\pi a^2 + \dfrac{2\pi b^2}{3}\right) \\ & = \left(\dfrac{a^2}{2} + \dfrac{b^2}{3}\right)\sqrt{b^2+4\pi^2a^2} \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第8题}

圆周 \(L:x^2+y^2=-2y\) 上每点的质量线密度等于 \(\sqrt{x^2+y^2}\), 求曲线 \(L\) 的质量与曲线 \(L\) 对 \(x\) 轴的静力矩.

\paragraph{解}

设 \(\begin{cases}x = \cos\theta, \\ y = -1 + \sin\theta,\end{cases}(-\dfrac{3\pi}{2} \le \theta \le \dfrac{\pi}{2})\), 此时恒有 \(\cos\dfrac{\theta}{2} \ge \sin\dfrac{\theta}{2}\).

曲线 \(L\) 的质量为

\[ \begin{aligned} M & = \int_{L}\sqrt{x^2+y^2}\D{l} \\ & = \int_{-\frac{3\pi}{2}}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sqrt{2 - 2\sin\theta}\D{\theta} \\ & = \sqrt{2}\int_{-\frac{3\pi}{2}}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}(\cos\dfrac{\theta}{2} - \sin\dfrac{\theta}{2})\D{\theta} \\ & = 2\sqrt{2}\int_{-\frac{3\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{4}}(\cos\varphi - \sin\varphi)\D{\varphi} \\ & = 2\sqrt{2}(\sin\varphi + \cos\varphi)\bigg\vert_{-\frac{3\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{4}} \\ & = 8 \end{aligned} \]

对 \(x\) 轴的静力矩为

\[ \begin{aligned} M_{x} & = \int_{L}y\sqrt{x^2+y^2}\D{l} \\ & = \sqrt{2}\int_{-\frac{3\pi}{2}}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}(\sin\theta - 1)(\cos\dfrac{\theta}{2} - \sin\dfrac{\theta}{2})\D{\theta} \\ & = \sqrt{2}\int_{-\frac{3\pi}{2}}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}(2\cos^2\dfrac{\theta}{2}\sin\dfrac{\theta}{2} - 2\sin^2\dfrac{\theta}{2}\cos\dfrac{\theta}{2} + \sin\dfrac{\theta}{2} - \cos\dfrac{\theta}{2})\D{\theta} \\ & = 2\sqrt{2}\int_{-\frac{3\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{4}}(2\cos^2\varphi\sin\varphi - 2\sin^2\varphi\cos\varphi + \sin\varphi - \cos\varphi)\D{\varphi} \\ & = 2\sqrt{2}\left(-\dfrac{2}{3}\cos^2\varphi - \dfrac{2}{3}\sin^3\varphi - \cos\varphi - \sin\varphi\right)\bigg\vert_{-\frac{3\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{4}} \\ & = -\dfrac{32}{3} \end{aligned} \]

docs.title: 习题4.3
docs.text:
\subsection{习题4.3解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

计算下列第一类曲面积分.

(1) \(\iint\limits_{S}(x+y+z)\D{S}\), 其中 \(S\) 是上半球面 \(x^2 + y^2 + z^2 = a^2(z \ge 0)\);

(3) \(\iint\limits_{S}\dfrac{\D{S}}{(1 + x + y)^2}\), 其中 \(S\) 是四面体 \(x + y + z \le 1, x \ge 0, y \ge 0, z \ge 0\) 的边界面;

\paragraph{解}

(1) 做坐标变换 \(\begin{cases}x = a\sin\varphi\cos\theta, \\ y = a\sin\varphi\sin\theta, \\ z = a\cos\varphi\end{cases}\), 则积分区域变为 \(D = \{(a\sin\varphi\cos\theta, a\sin\varphi\sin\theta, a\cos\varphi) | 0 \le \varphi \le \dfrac{\pi}{2}, 0 \le \theta \le 2\pi\}\). \(\D{S} = a^2\sin\varphi\D{\varphi}\D{\theta}\). 由对称性知 \(\iint\limits_{S}(x+y)\D{S} = 0\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{S}(x+y+z)\D{S} & = \iint\limits_{S}z\D{S} \\ & = \iint\limits_{S}a\cos\varphi\cdot a^2\sin\varphi\D{\varphi}\D{\theta} \\ & = a^3\int_{0}^{2\pi}\D{\theta}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin\varphi\cos\varphi\D{\varphi} \\ & = 2\pi a^3\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin\varphi\cos\varphi\D{\varphi} \\ & = -\dfrac{\pi a^3}{2}\cos2\varphi \bigg\vert_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}} \\ & = \pi a^3 \end{aligned} \]

(3) 将 \(S\) 分解为

\[ \begin{aligned} S_1 & = \{(x, y, z) | x + y + z = 1 , x \ge 0, y \ge 0, z \ge 0\}, \\ S_2 & = \{(x, y, z) | x + y + z \le 1, x = 0, y \ge 0, z \ge 0\}, \\ S_3 & = \{(x, y, z) | x + y + z \le 1, x \ge 0, y = 0, z \ge 0\}, \\ S_4 & = \{(x, y, z) | x + y + z \le 1, x \ge 0, y \ge 0, z = 0\}. \end{aligned} \]

对于 \(S_1\), 由于 \(x + y + z = 1\), 所以 \(\D{S} = \sqrt{1 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}\right)^2 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}\right)^2}\D{x}\D{y} = \sqrt{3}\D{x}\D{y}\).

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{S_1}\dfrac{\D{S}}{(1 + x + y)^2} & = \iint\limits_{S_1}\dfrac{\sqrt{3}\D{x}\D{y}}{(1 + x + y)^2} \\ & = \sqrt{3}\int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1 - x}\dfrac{\D{y}}{(1 + x + y)^2} \\ & = \sqrt{3}\int_{0}^{1}\left(\dfrac{1}{1 + x} - \dfrac{1}{2}\right)\D{x} \\ & = \sqrt{3}\left(\ln(x + 1) - \dfrac{x}{2}\right)\bigg\vert_{0}^{1} \\ & = \sqrt{3}\left(\ln 2 - \dfrac{1}{2}\right) \end{aligned} \]

同理 \(\iint\limits_{S_4}\dfrac{\D{S}}{(1 + x + y)^2} = \ln2 - \dfrac{1}{2}\), 再考虑 \(S_2\):

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{S_2}\dfrac{\D{S}}{(1 + x + y)^2} & = \iint\limits_{S_2}\dfrac{\D{y}\D{z}}{(1 + y)^2} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}\D{y}\int_{0}^{1 - y}\dfrac{\D{z}}{(1 + y)^2} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}\dfrac{1 - x}{(1 + x)^2}\D{x} \\ & = -\left(\ln(1 +x) + \dfrac{2}{1 + x}\right)\bigg\vert_{0}^{1} \\ & = 1 - \ln 2 \end{aligned} \]

同理 \(\iint\limits_{S_3}\dfrac{\D{S}}{(1 + x + y)^2} = 1 - \ln 2\). 因此总和为

\[ \begin{aligned} S & = S_1 + S_2 + S_3 + S_4 \\ & = \sqrt{3}\left(\ln 2 - \dfrac{1}{2}\right) + (1 - \ln 2) + (1 - \ln 2) + \ln2 - \dfrac{1}{2} \\ & = \dfrac{3 - \sqrt{3}}{2} + (\sqrt{3} - 1)\ln 2 \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第2题}

计算圆柱面 \(x^2 + y^2 = ax\) 被球面 \(x^2 + y^2 + z^2 = a^2\) 所截部分的面积 \((a > 0)\).

\paragraph{解}

进行坐标变换 \(\begin{cases}x = \dfrac{a}{2} + \dfrac{a}{2}\cos\theta, \\ y = \dfrac{a}{2}\sin\theta,\end{cases}\) 则积分区域变为 \(L = \{(x, y) | x = \dfrac{a}{2} + \dfrac{a}{2}\cos\theta, y = \dfrac{a}{2}\sin\theta, 0 \le \theta \le 2\pi\}\). 同时 \(\D{l} = \dfrac{a}{2}\D{\theta},z^2 = a^2 - ax = \dfrac{a^2}{2}(1-\cos\theta)\). 不妨只考虑 \(z > 0\) 的部分.

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_{L}z\D{l} & = \int_{0}^{2\pi}\sqrt{\dfrac{a^2}{2}(1 - \cos\theta)}\cdot\dfrac{a}{2}\D{\theta} \\ & = \dfrac{a^2}{2}\int_{0}^{2\pi}\sin\dfrac{\theta}{2}\D{\theta} \\ & = -a^2\cos\dfrac{\theta}{2}\bigg\vert_{0}^{2\pi} \\ & = 2a^2 \end{aligned} \]

由对称性, \(z < 0\) 的区域所截面积也为 \(2a^2\), 因此全面积为 \(4a^2\).

\paragraph{第3题}

求抛物面 \(2z = x^2 + y^2\) 在 \(z \in [0, 1]\) 部分的质量, 其中质量面密度为 \(\sigma = z\).

\paragraph{解}

抛物面的面积元素为

\[ \begin{aligned} \D{S} & = \sqrt{1 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}\right)^2 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}\right)^2}\D{x}\D{y} \\ & = \sqrt{1 + x^2 + y^2}\D{x}\D{y} \\ \end{aligned} \]

进行坐标变换 \(\begin{cases}x = r\cos\theta, \\ y = r\sin\theta,\end{cases}\) 则有

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{0 \le x^2 + y^2 \le 2}\sigma\D{S} & = \iint\limits_{0 \le x^2 + y^2 \le 2}\dfrac{x^2 + y^2}{2}\cdot\sqrt{1 + x^2 + y^2}\D{x}\D{y} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\sqrt{2}}\D{r}\int_{0}^{2\pi}\dfrac{r^3}{2}\sqrt{1 + r^2}\D{r} \\ & = \pi\int_{0}^{\sqrt{2}}r^3\sqrt{1 + r^2}\D{r} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{2}\int_{0}^{2}u\sqrt{1 + u}\D{u} \\ & = \dfrac{\pi}{15}(3u-2)(u+1)^{\frac{3}{2}}\bigg\vert_{0}^{2} \\ & = \dfrac{12\sqrt{3} + 2}{15}\pi \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第8题}

求锥面 \(z = \sqrt{x^2 + y^2}\) 在柱面 \(z^2 = 2x\) 内的面积.

\paragraph{解}

锥面的面积元素为

\[ \begin{aligned} \D{S} & = \sqrt{1 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}\right)^2 + \left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}\right)^2}\D{x}\D{y} \\ & = \sqrt{2}\D{x}\D{y} \\ \end{aligned} \]

锥面被柱面所截部分记作 \(S\) (其面积也记为 \(S\)), 它在 \(xy\) 平面上的投影区域是圆域 \(D_{xy} = \{(x, y) | x^2 + y^2 \le 2x\}\), 所以

\[ S = \iint\limits_{S}1\D{S} = \iint_{D_{xy}}\sqrt{2}\D{x}\D{y} = \sqrt{2}\pi \]

docs.title: 习题4.4
docs.text:
\subsection{习题4.4解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

计算下列第二类曲线积分.

(1) \(\int_{L^{+}}\dfrac{x^2\D{y}-y^2\D{x}}{x^{\frac{5}{3}}+y^{\frac{5}{3}}}\), 其中 \(L^{+}\) 是星形线在第一象限中的弧段 \(\begin{cases}x = a\cos^3t, \\ y = a\sin^3t,\end{cases}0 \le t \le \dfrac{\pi}{2}\), 正向为 \((0, a)\) 到 \((a, 0)\);

(2) \(\int_{\bar{AB}}x\D{x}+y\D{y}+z\D{z}\), 其中路径是从点 \(A(1, 1, 1)\) 到 \(B(2, 3, 4)\) 的直线段;

(3) \(\int_{L^{+}}\dfrac{-y\D{x}+x\D{y}}{x^2+y^2}+b\D{z}\), 其中 \(L^{+}\) 是螺旋线 \(x=a\cos t, y=a\sin t, z = bt\) 上由参数 \(t=0\) 到 \(t=2\pi\) 的一段有向弧段.

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(\D{x} = -3a\cos^2t\sin t, \D{y} = 3a\sin^2t\cos t\), 正向参数值为 \(t\) 从 \(\dfrac{\pi}{2}\) 到 \(0\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_{L^{+}}\dfrac{x^2\D{y}-y^2\D{x}}{x^{\frac{5}{3}}+y^{\frac{5}{3}}} & = \int_{\frac{\pi}{2}}^{0}\dfrac{a^2\cos^6t\cdot 3a\sin^2t\cos t - a^2\sin^6t\cdot (-3a\cos^2t\sin t)}{a^{\frac{5}{3}}(\cos^5t + \sin^5t)}\D{t} \\ & = 3a^{\frac{4}{3}}\int_{\frac{\pi}{2}}^{0}\cos^2t\sin^2t\D{t} \\ & = 3a^{\frac{4}{3}}\cdot\dfrac{1}{8}\left(t - \dfrac{1}{4}\sin4t\right)\bigg\vert_{\frac{\pi}{2}}^{0} \\ & = -\dfrac{3\pi}{16}a^{\frac{4}{3}} \end{aligned} \]

(2) 设路径上的任意一点 \(P\) 可被表示为 \(P(1 + t, 1 + 2t, 1 + 3t)\), 正向参数值为 \(t\) 从 \(0\) 到 \(1\), 则

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_{\bar{AB}}x\D{x}+y\D{y}+z\D{z} & = \int_{0}^{1}[(1 + t) + 2(1 + 2t) + 3(1 + 3t)]\D{t} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}(14t + 6)\D{t} \\ & = (7t^2 + 6t)\bigg\vert_{0}^{1} \\ & = 13 \end{aligned} \]

(3) \(\D{x} = -a\sin t\D{t}, \D{y} = a\cos t\D{t}, \D{z} = b\d{t}\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_{L^{+}}\dfrac{-y\D{x}+x\D{y}}{x^2+y^2}+b\D{z} & = \int_{0}^{2\pi}\left(\dfrac{-a\sin t\cdot (-a\sin t) + a\cos t \cdot a\cos t}{(a\cos t)^2 + (a\sin t)^2} + b^2\right)\D{t} \\ & = \int_{0}^{2\pi}(1 + b^2)\D{t} \\ & = 2\pi(1 + b^2) \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第2题}

计算下列第二类曲线积分.

(1) \(\int_{L^{+}}(x^2-y^2)\D{x}\), 其中 \(L^{+}\) 是抛物线 \(y=x^2\) 从点 \((0, 0)\) 到点 \((2, 4)\) 的弧段;

(3) \(\oint_{L^{+}}\dfrac{\D{x} + \D{y}}{\left|x\right| + \left|y\right|}\), 其中 \(L^+\) 是 \(x^2+y^2=a^2\), 逆时针为正向;

(5) \(\int_{L^+}xyz\D{z}\), 其中 \(L\) 为 \(\begin{cases}x^2+y^2+z^2=1, \\ z=y,\end{cases}\) 从 \(z\) 轴正向看去是逆时针方向.

\paragraph{解}

(1) 将 \(y = x^2\) 代入, 有

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_{L^{+}}(x^2-y^2)\D{x} & = \int_{0}^{2}(x^2 - x^4)\D{x} \\ & = \left(\dfrac{1}{3}x^3 - \dfrac{1}{5}x^5\right)\bigg\vert_{0}^{2} \\ & = -\dfrac{56}{15} \end{aligned} \]

(3) 设 \(\begin{cases}x = a\cos t, \\ y = a\sin t, \end{cases}\), 正向参数值为 \(t\) 从 \(0\) 到 \(2\pi\), 则 \(\D{x} + \D{y} = -a\sin t + a\cos t\). 故

\[ \begin{aligned} \oint_{L^{+}}\dfrac{\D{x} + \D{y}}{\left|x\right| + \left|y\right|} & = \int_{0}^{2\pi}\dfrac{-a\sin t + a\cos t}{a\cos t + a\sin t}\D{t} \\ & = \int_{0}^{2\pi}\dfrac{\cos t - \sin t}{\cos t + \sin t}\D{t} \\ & = \ln\left|\cos x + \sin x\right|\bigg\vert_{0}^{2\pi} \\ & = 0 \end{aligned} \]

(5) 设 \(\begin{cases}x = \cos t, \\ y = z = \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2}\sin t, \end{cases}\), 正向参数值为 \(t\) 从 \(0\) 到 \(\dfrac{\pi}{2}\), 则 \(\D{z} = \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2}\cos t\D{t}\). 故

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_{L^+}xyz\D{z} & = \int_{0}^{2\pi}\left(\cos t\cdot \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2}\sin t\cdot\dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2}\sin t\right) \cdot \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2}\cos t\D{t} \\ & = \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{4}\int_{0}^{2\pi}\cos^2t\sin^2t\D{t} \\ & = \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{4}\cdot\dfrac{1}{8}\left(t - \dfrac{1}{4}\sin4t\right)\bigg\vert_{0}^{2\pi} \\ & = \dfrac{\sqrt{2}\pi}{16} \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第3题}

计算 \(\int_{L^+}\vct{F}\cdot\D{\vct{r}}\).

(1) \(\vct{F} = -y\vct{i}+x\vct{j}\), \(L\) 是由 \(x=y, x=1, y=0\) 围成的三角形的边界, 逆时针为正向;

(3) \(\vct{F} = F\vct{i}\), \(L\) 是由 \(\dfrac{x^2}{a^2}+\dfrac{y^2}{b^2}=1\) 在第一象限由点 \((0, b)\) 到点 \((a, 0)\) 的弧段;

\paragraph{解}

(1) 将 \(L^{+}\) 拆成 \(3\) 段: \(L_1^+ = \begin{cases}x = t, \\ y = 0,\end{cases} L_2^+ = \begin{cases}x = 1, \\ y = t,\end{cases} L_3^+ = \begin{cases}x = 1 - t, \\ y = 1 - t,\end{cases}\), 正向参数值均为 \(t\) 从 \(0\) 到 \(1\), 则

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_{L^+}\vct{F}\cdot\D{\vct{r}} & = \int_{L_1^+}\vct{F}\cdot\D{\vct{r}} + \int_{L_2^+}\vct{F}\cdot\D{\vct{r}} + \int_{L_3^+}\vct{F}\cdot\D{\vct{r}} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}(0, t)\cdot(1, 0)\D{t} + \int_{0}^{1}(-t, 1)\cdot(0, 1)\D{t} + \int_{0}^{1}(t - 1, 1 - t) \cdot (-1, -1)\D{t} \\ & = 0 + 1 + 0 \\ & = 1 \end{aligned} \]

(3) 设 \(\begin{cases}x = a\sin\theta, \\ y = b\cos\theta, \end{cases}\), 正向参数值为 \(\theta\) 从 \(0\) 到 \(\dfrac{\pi}{2}\), 则

\[ \begin{aligned} \int_{L^+}\vct{F}\cdot\D{\vct{r}} & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}(F, 0)\cdot(a\cos\theta, -b\sin\theta)\D{\theta} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}aF\cos\theta\D{\theta} \\ & = aF \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第4题}

今有一平面力场 \(\vct{F}\), 大小等于点 \((x, y)\) 到坐标原点的距离, 方向指向坐标原点.

(1) 计算单位质量的质点 \(P\) 沿椭圆 \(\dfrac{x^2}{a^2} + \dfrac{y^2}{b^2} = 1\) 在第一象限中的弧段从点 \((a, 0)\) 移动到点 \((0, b)\) 时, 力 \(\vct{F}\) 所做的功;

(2) 计算质点 \(P\) 沿上述椭圆逆时针绕一圈时, 力 \(\vct{F}\) 所做的功.

\paragraph{解}

(1) 设 \(\vct{r} = (a\cos\theta, b\sin\theta)\), 则 \(\vct{F} = (-a\cos\theta, -b\sin\theta)\). 所求的功

\[ \begin{aligned} W_1 & = \int_{L^+}\vct{F}\cdot\D{\vct{r}} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}(-a\cos\theta, -b\sin\theta)\cdot(-a\sin\theta, b\cos\theta)\D{\theta} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}(a^2\sin\theta\cos\theta - b^2\sin\theta\cos\theta)\D{\theta} \\ & = \dfrac{a^2-b^2}{2}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin2\theta\D{\theta} \\ & = \dfrac{b^2-a^2}{4}\cos2\theta\bigg\vert_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}} \\ & = \dfrac{a^2 - b^2}{2} \end{aligned} \]

(2) 同理可得

\[ \begin{aligned} W_2 & = \int_{L^+}\vct{F}\cdot\D{\vct{r}} \\ & = \int_{0}^{2\pi}(-a\cos\theta, -b\sin\theta)\cdot(-a\sin\theta, b\cos\theta)\D{\theta} \\ & = \int_{0}^{2\pi}(a^2\sin\theta\cos\theta - b^2\sin\theta\cos\theta)\D{\theta} \\ & = \dfrac{a^2-b^2}{2}\int_{0}^{2\pi}\sin2\theta\D{\theta} \\ & = 0 \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第5题}

解答下列各题.

(1) 设一力场的力的大小与作用点到 \(z\) 轴的距离成反比, 方向垂直 \(z\) 轴且指向 \(z\) 轴, 一质点沿圆周 \(\begin{cases}x^2 + z^2 = 1, \\ y = 1,\end{cases}\) 由点 \((1, 1, 0)\) 经四分之一圆弧到达点 \((0, 1, 1)\) 时, 求该力场所做的功;

\paragraph{解}

(1) 设 \(\vct{F} = k\left(-\dfrac{x}{x^2 + y^2}, -\dfrac{y}{x^2 + y^2}, 0\right)\). 设 \(\vct{r} = (\cos\theta, 1, \sin\theta)\), 则 \(\vct{F} = k\left(-\dfrac{\cos\theta}{1 + \cos^2\theta}, -\dfrac{1}{1 + \cos^2\theta}, 0\right)\).

因此总功

\[ \begin{aligned} W & = \int_{L^{+}}\vct{F}\cdot\D{\vct{r}} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}k\left(-\dfrac{\cos\theta}{1 + \cos^2\theta}, -\dfrac{1}{1 + \cos^2\theta}, 0\right)\cdot(-\sin\theta, 0, \cos\theta)\D{\theta} \\ & = k\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\dfrac{\sin\theta\cos\theta}{1 + \cos^2\theta}\D{\theta} \\ & = k\int{0}^{1}\dfrac{t}{1 + t^2}\D{t} \\ & = \dfrac{k}{2}\ln(1 + t^2)\bigg\vert_{0}^{1} \\ & = \dfrac{k\ln 2}{2} \end{aligned} \]

docs.title: 习题4.5
docs.text:
\subsection{习题4.5解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

计算下列第二类曲面积分, 其中 \(S^{+}\) 是球面 \(x^2 + y^2 + (z-R)^2 = R^2\) 的外侧.

(1) \(\oint\limits_{S^{+}} \D{x}\wedge\D{y}\); % 这里有问题, 应该是 \oiint

(2) \(\oint\limits_{S^{+}} z\D{x}\wedge\D{y}\); % 这里有问题, 应该是 \oiint

(3) \(\oint\limits_{S^{+}} z^2\D{x} \wedge \D{y}\). % 这里有问题, 应该是 \oiint

\paragraph{解}

(1) 由对称性知 \(\oint\limits_{S^{+}} \D{x}\wedge\D{y} = 0\). % 这里有问题, 应该是 \oiint

(2) 记上半球面为 \(S_1^{+}\), 满足 \(z = R + \sqrt{R^2 - x^2 - y^2}\), \(\D{x}\wedge\D{y} = \D{x}\D{y}\), 下半球面为 \(S_2^{+}\), 满足 \(z = R - \sqrt{R^2 - x^2 - y^2}\), \(\D{x} \wedge\D{y} = -\D{x}\D{y}\). 则 \(D_{xy} = \{(x, y) | x^2 + y^2 \le R^2\}\). 换元 \(\begin{cases}x = r\cos\theta, \\ y = r\sin\theta\end{cases}\), 则 \(D_{r\theta} = \{(r, \theta) | 0 \le r \le R, 0 \le \theta \le 2\pi\}\). 因此

\[ I_1 = \int_{0}^{R}r\D{r}\int_{0}^{2\pi}(R + \sqrt{R^2-r^2})\D{\theta} \] \[ I_2 = \int_{0}^{R}r\D{r}\int_{0}^{2\pi}(-R + \sqrt{R^2 - r^2})\D{\theta} \] \[ \begin{aligned} I & = I_1 + I_2 \\ & = 4\pi\int_{0}^{R}r\sqrt{R^2 -r^2}\D{r} \\ & = -\dfrac{4\pi}{3}(R^2 - r^2)^{\frac{3}{2}}\bigg\vert_{0}^{R} \\ & = \dfrac{4\pi R^3}{3} \end{aligned} \]

(3) 同 (2) 可知

\[ \begin{aligned} I & = I_1' + I_2' \\ & = 8\pi\int_{0}^{R}r\sqrt{R^2 -r^2}\D{r} \\ & = \dfrac{8\pi R^3}{3} \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第3题}

计算下列曲面积分.

(1) \(\iint_{S^{+}}x\D{y}\wedge\D{z} + y\D{z}\wedge\D{x} + z\D{x}\wedge\D{y}\), 其中 \(S^{+}\) 为平面 \(x = 0, y = 0, z = 0, x = 1, y = 1, z = 1\) 所围立方体表面的外侧;

(2) \(\iint\limits_{S^{+}} x^2\D{y} \wedge \D{z} + y^2\D{z}\wedge\D{x}+z^2\D{x}\wedge\D{y}\), 其中 \(S^{+}\) 是柱面 \(x^2 + y^2 = 1\) 被平面 \(z = 0, z = 3\) 所截部分的外侧;

\paragraph{解}

(1) 设 \(S_1 = \{(x, y, z) | 0 \le x, y \le 1, z = 0\}\). 由对称性知 \(\iint_{S^{+}}x\D{y}\wedge\D{z} + y\D{z}\wedge\D{x} + z\D{x}\wedge\D{y} = 3\iint\limits_{S_1}\D{x}\D{y} = 3\).

(2) 将 \(S^{+}\) 分为三个部分: \(S_1^{+}\) 上底面, \(S_2^{+}\) 下底面, \(S_3^{+}\) 侧面.

\[ \begin{aligned} \quad & \iint\limits_{S_1^{+}}x^2\D{y} \wedge \D{z} + y^2\D{z}\wedge\D{x}+z^2\D{x}\wedge\D{y} \\ & = \iint\limits_{S_1^{+}}z^2\D{x}\wedge\D{y} \\ & = \iint\limits_{S_1^{+}}9\D{x}\wedge\D{y} \\ & = 9\pi \end{aligned} \]

由对称性知 \(\iint\limits_{S_2^{+}}x^2\D{y} \wedge \D{z} + y^2\D{z}\wedge\D{x}+z^2\D{x}\wedge\D{y} = \iint\limits_{S_3^{+}}x^2\D{y} \wedge \D{z} + y^2\D{z}\wedge\D{x}+z^2\D{x}\wedge\D{y} = 0\).

故 \(\iint\limits_{S^{+}} x^2\D{y} \wedge \D{z} + y^2\D{z}\wedge\D{x}+z^2\D{x}\wedge\D{y} = 9\pi\).

\paragraph{第4题}

计算 \(\iint\limits_{S^{+}}\vct{A}\cdot\D{\vct{S}}\), 其中 \(\vct{A} = \dfrac{x\vct{i} + y\vct{j} + z\vct{k}}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2 + z^2}}\), \(S^{+}\) 是上半球面 \(z = \sqrt{R^2 - x^2 - y^2}\) 的下侧.

\paragraph{解}

做坐标变换 \(\begin{cases}x = R\sin\varphi\cos\theta, \\ y = R\sin\varphi\sin\theta, \\ z = R\cos\varphi, \end{cases}\) 则 \(A = \dfrac{D(y, z)}{D(\varphi, \theta)} = R^2\sin^2\varphi\cos\theta\), \(B = \dfrac{D(z, x)}{D(\varphi, \theta)} = R^2\sin^2\varphi\sin\theta\), \(C = \dfrac{D(x, y)}{D(\varphi, \theta)} = R^2\sin\varphi\cos\varphi\). 积分区域为 \(D_{\varphi\theta} = \{(\varphi, \theta) | -\dfrac{\pi}{2} \le \varphi \le 0, 0 \le \theta \le 2\pi\}\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{S^{+}}\vct{A}\cdot\D{\vct{S}} & = \iint\limits_{D_{\varphi\theta}}(\sin\varphi\cos\theta, \sin\varphi\sin\theta, \cos\varphi)\cdot(R^2\sin^2\varphi\cos\theta, R^2\sin^2\varphi\sin\theta, R^2\sin\varphi\cos\varphi)\D{\varphi}\D{\theta} \\ & = R^2\iint\limits_{D_{\varphi\theta}}(\sin^3\varphi\cos^2\theta + \sin^3\varphi\sin^2\theta+\sin\varphi\cos^2\varphi)\D{\varphi}\D{\theta} \\ & = R^2\int_{0}^{2\pi}\D{\theta}\int_{-\frac{\pi}{2}}^{0}\sin\varphi\D{\varphi} \\ & = -2\pi R^2 \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第5题}

求流速场 \(\vct{V} = xy\vct{i} + yz\vct{j} + zx\vct{k}\) 由里往外穿过球面 \(x^2 + y^2 + z^2 = 1\) 在第一象限部分的流量.

\paragraph{解}

做坐标变换 \(\begin{cases}x = \sin\varphi\cos\theta, \\ y = \sin\varphi\sin\theta, \\ z = \cos\varphi, \end{cases}\) 则 \(A = \dfrac{D(y, z)}{D(\varphi, \theta)} = \sin^2\varphi\cos\theta\), \(B = \dfrac{D(z, x)}{D(\varphi, \theta)} = \sin^2\varphi\sin\theta\), \(C = \dfrac{D(x, y)}{D(\varphi, \theta)} = \sin\varphi\cos\varphi\). 积分区域为 \(D_{\varphi\theta} = \{(\varphi, \theta) | 0 \le \varphi \le \dfrac{\pi}{2}, 0 \le \theta \le \dfrac{\pi}{2}\}\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \iint\limits_{S^{+}}\vct{V}\cdot\D{\vct{S}} & = \iint\limits_{D_{\varphi\theta}}(\sin^2\varphi\sin\theta\cos\theta, \sin\varphi\cos\varphi\sin\theta, \sin^2\varphi\cos^2\varphi\cos\varphi)\cdot(\sin^2\varphi\cos\theta, \sin^2\varphi\sin\theta, \sin\varphi\cos\varphi)\D{\varphi}\D{\theta} \\ & = \iint\limits_{D_{\varphi\theta}}(\sin^4\varphi\sin\theta\cos^2\theta + \sin^3\varphi\cos\varphi\sin^2\theta+\sin^2\varphi\cos^2\varphi\cos\theta)\D{\varphi}\D{\theta} \\ & = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin^4\varphi\D{\varphi}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\cos^2\theta\sin\theta\D{\theta} + \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin^3\varphi\cos\varphi\D{\varphi}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin^2\theta\D{\theta} + \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\sin^2\varphi\cos^2\varphi\D{\varphi}\int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{2}}\cos\theta\D{\theta} \\ & = \dfrac{3\cdot 1}{4\cdot 2}\cdot \dfrac{\pi}{2} \cdot \dfrac{1}{3} + \dfrac{1}{4} \cdot \dfrac{1}{2} \cdot \dfrac{\pi}{2} + 1\cdot\dfrac{\pi}{16} \\ & = \dfrac{3\pi}{16} \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第7题}

\(\iint\limits_{S^{+}}(x^2 + y^2)\D{x}\wedge\D{y} + y^2\D{y}\wedge\D{z}+z^2\D{z}\wedge\D{x}\), 其中 \(S\) 是螺旋面 \(x = u\cos v, y = u\sin v, z = av\) 在

\[ D_{uv} = \{(u, v) | 0 \le u \le 1, 0 \le v \le 2\pi\} \]

的部分, 上侧为正.

\paragraph{解}

\(A = \dfrac{D(y, z)}{D(u, v)} = a\sin v\), \(B = \dfrac{D(z, x)}{D(u, v)} = -a\cos v\), \(C = \dfrac{D(x, y)}{D(u, v)} = u\). 因此

\[ \begin{aligned} \quad & \iint\limits_{S^{+}}(x^2 + y^2)\D{x}\wedge\D{y} + y^2\D{y}\wedge\D{z}+z^2\D{z}\wedge\D{x} \\ & = \iint\limits_{D_{uv}}(u^2, u^2\sin^2v, a^2v^2)\cdot(a\sin v, -a\cos v, u)\D{u}\D{v} \\ & = \iint\limits_{D_{uv}}(au^2\sin v - au^2\sin^2v\cos v + a^2uv^2)\D{u}\D{v} \\ & = \int_{0}^{1}u^2\D{u}\int_{0}^{2\pi}a\sin v\D{v} + \int_{0}^{1}u^2\D{u}\int_{0}^{2\pi}\sin^2v\cos v\D{v} + \int_{0}^{1}u\D{u}\int_{0}^{2\pi}a^2v^2\D{v} \\ & = 0 + 0 + \dfrac{4\pi^3a^2}{3} \\ & = \dfrac{4\pi^3a^2}{3} \end{aligned} \]

docs.title: 习题4.6
docs.text:
\subsection{习题4.6解答}

\paragraph{第1题}

利用 Green 公式计算下列曲线积分.

(1) \(\oint_{L^{+}}(x+y)^2\D{x} - (x^2 + y^2)\D{y}\), 其中 \(L^{+}\) 是以 \((0, 0), (1, 0), (0, 1)\) 为顶点的三角形的边界, 逆时针为正;

(3) \(\oint_{L^{+}}(x^2+y)\D{x} - (x-y^2)\D{y}\), 其中 \(L\) 是椭圆 \(\dfrac{x^2}{a^2} + \dfrac{y^2}{b^2} = 1\) 的正向边界;

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(X = (x + y)^2, Y = -(x^2 + y^2)\), 因此由 Green 定理

\[ egin{aligned} \oint_{L^{+}}(x+y)^2\D{x} - (x^2 + y^2)\D{y} & = \oint_{L^{+}}X\D{x}+Y\D{y} \ & = \iint\limits_{D}\left(\dfrac{\partial Y}{\partial x} - \dfrac{\partial X}{\partial y} ight)\D{x}\D{y} \ & = \iint\limits_{D}(-2x - 2x - 2y)\D{x}\D{y} \ & = -\int_{0}^{1}\D{x}\int_{0}^{1 - x}(4x + 2y)\D{y} \ & = \int_{0}^{1}(3x^2 - 2x - 1)\D{x} \ & = -1 \end{aligned} \]

(3) \(X = x^2 + y, Y = y^2 - x\). 由 Green 定理知

\[ \oint_{L^{+}}(x^2+y)\D{x} - (x-y^2)\D{y} = \oint_{L^{+}}X\D{x} + Y\D{y} = \iint\limits_{D}\left(\dfrac{\partial Y}{\partial x} - \dfrac{\partial X}{\partial y} ight)\D{x}\D{y} = \iint\limits_{D}(-2)\D{x}\D{y} = -2\pi ab \]

\paragraph{第2题}

计算 \(\int_{L^{+}}\dfrac{(x+y)\D{x} + (y-x)\D{y}}{x^2 + y^2}\), 其中 \(L^{+}\) 为

(1) 区域 \(D = \{(x, y) | a^2 \le x^2 + y^2 \le b^2\}\) 的正向边界 \((b > a > 0)\);

(3) 正方形 \(D = \{(x, y) | \left|x ight| + \left|y ight| \le 1\}\) 的逆时针方向;

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(X = \dfrac{x + y}{x^2 + y^2}, Y = \dfrac{y - x}{x^2 + y^2}\), 因此 \(\dfrac{\partial Y}{\partial x} = \dfrac{x^2 - 2xy - y^2}{(x^2 + y^2)^2} = \dfrac{\partial X}{\partial y}\). 由 Green 定理知 \(\int_{L^{+}}\dfrac{(x+y)\D{x} + (y-x)\D{y}}{x^2 + y^2} = 0\).

(3) 考虑 \(D^* = \{(x, y) | x = \epsilon\cos heta, y = \epsilon\sin heta, 0 \le heta \le 2\pi\}\), 正方向为 \( heta\) 从 \(2\pi\) 到 \(0\). 因此 \(\int_{\partial D\cup D^{*}}\dfrac{(x+y)\D{x} + (y-x)\D{y}}{x^2 + y^2} = 0\). 而

\[ egin{aligned} \int_{\partial D^{*}}\dfrac{(x+y)\D{x} + (y-x)\D{y}}{x^2 + y^2} & = \int_{2\pi}^{0}\dfrac{\epsilon^2(\sin heta + \cos heta)\cdot(-\sin heta) + \epsilon^2(\sin heta - \cos heta)\cdot\cos heta}{\epsilon^2}\D{ heta} \ & = \int_{2\pi}^{0}\D{ heta} \ & = 2\pi \end{aligned} \]

因此

\[ \int_{L^{+}}\dfrac{(x+y)\D{x} + (y-x)\D{y}}{x^2 + y^2} = \int_{D\cup D^*}\dfrac{(x+y)\D{x} + (y-x)\D{y}}{x^2 + y^2} - \int_{D^*}\dfrac{(x+y)\D{x} + (y-x)\D{y}}{x^2 + y^2} = -2\pi \]

\paragraph{第3题}

计算下列曲线积分.

(1) \(\int_{L^{+}}(1+xe^{2y})\D{x} + (x^2e^{2y}-y^2)\D{y}\), 其中 \(L\) 是从点 \((0, 0)\) 经上半圆周 \((x - 2)^2 + y^2 = 4\) 到点 \((4, 0)\) 的弧段;

(3) \(\int_{L^{+}}\left(\ln\dfrac{y}{x} - 1 ight)\D{x} + \dfrac{x}{y}\D{y}\), 其中 \(L\) 是从点 \((1, 1)\) 出发到点 \((3, 3e)\) 的任何一条不与坐标轴相交的简单曲线.

\paragraph{解}

(1) \(X = 1 + xe^{2y}, Y = x^2e^{2y} - y^2\). 设 \(A(0, 0), B(4, 0)\), 正方向由 \(B\) 到 \(A\). 则 \(AB\) 和 \(L\) 围成的图形 \(D\) 满足: \(\iint\limits_{D}\left(\dfrac{\partial Y}{\partial x} - \dfrac{\partial X}{\partial y} ight)\D{x}\D{y} = \iint\limits_{D}(2xe^{2y} - 2xe^{2y})\D{x}\D{y} = 0\). 由于 \(\int_{BA}X\D{x} = \int_{4}^{0}(1 + x)\D{x} = -12\), 故由 Green 定理

\[ \int_{L^{+}}(1+xe^{2y})\D{x} + (x^2e^{2y}-y^2)\D{y} = \iint\limits_{D}\left(\dfrac{\partial Y}{\partial x} - \dfrac{\partial X}{\partial y} ight)\D{x}\D{y} - \int_{BA}X\D{x} = 12 \]

(3) \(X = \ln\dfrac{y}{x} - 1, Y = \dfrac{x}{y}\), 因此 \(\dfrac{\partial Y}{\partial x} = \dfrac{1}{y} = \dfrac{\partial X}{\partial y}\). 所以这个曲线积分与路径无关, 此时可以先沿着 \(x\) 轴正方向, 再沿着 \(y\) 轴正方向的路径来计算这个积分.

\[ egin{aligned} \int_{L^{+}}\left(\ln\dfrac{y}{x} - 1 ight)\D{x} + \dfrac{x}{y}\D{y} & = \int_{1}^{3}\left(\ln\dfrac{1}{x} - 1 ight)\D{x} + \int_{1}^{3e}\dfrac{3}{y}\D{y} \ & = -x\ln x igg\vert_{1}^{3} + 3\ln y igg\vert_{1}^{3e} \ & = 3 \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第4题}

计算下列区域的面积.

(1) 星形线 \( egin{cases}x = a\cos^3t, \ y = a\sin ^3t,\end{cases} 0 \le t \le 2\pi\) 所围区域 \((a > 0)\);

\paragraph{解}

\[ egin{aligned} S & = 4\int_{L}y\D{x} \ & = 4\int_{0}^{ rac{\pi}{2}}(a\sin^3t)\cdot(-3a^2\cos^2t\sin t)\D{t} \ & = 12a^2\left(\int_{0}^{ rac{\pi}{2}}\sin^4t\D{t} - \int_{0}^{ rac{\pi}{2}}\sin^6t\D{t} ight) \ & = 12a^2\cdot\left(\dfrac{3\cdot 1}{4\cdot 2} - \dfrac{5\cdot 3\cdot 1}{6\cdot 4\cdot 2} ight)\cdot\dfrac{\pi}{2} \ & = \dfrac{3}{8}\pi a^2 \end{aligned} \]

\paragraph{第5题}

已知 \(f(u)\) 连续可微, \(L\) 为任意一条分段光滑曲线, 证明:

(1) \(\oint_{L^{+}}f(xy)(y\D{x} + x\D{y}) = 0\);

(2) \(\oint_{L^{+}}f(x^2 + y^2)(x\D{x} + y\D{y}) = 0\).

\paragraph{证明}

(1) \(X = yf(xy), Y = xf(xy)\), 因此 \(\dfrac{\partial Y}{\partial x} = f(xy) + xyf'(xy) = \dfrac{\partial X}{\partial y}\). 由定理 4.6.3 和定理 4.6.4 得 \(\oint_{L^{+}}f(xy)(y\D{x} + x\D{y}) = 0\).

(2) \(X = xf(x^2 + y^2), Y = yf(x^2 + y^2)\), 因此 \(\dfrac{\partial Y}{\partial x} = 2xyf'(x^2 + y^2) = \dfrac{\partial X}{\partial y}\). 由定理 4.6.3 和定理 4.6.4 得 \(\oint_{L^{+}}f(x^2 + y^2)(x\D{x} + y\D{y}) = 0\).

\paragraph{第6题}

设 \(D\) 是平面区域, \(\partial D\) 为逐段光滑曲线, \(( ar{x}, ar{y})\) 为 \(D\) 的形心, \(\sigma(D)\) 是 \(D\) 的面积, 证明:

(1) \(\oint_{\partial D}x^2\D{y} = 2\sigma(D) ar{x}\);

(2) \(\oint_{\partial D}xy\D{y} = \sigma(D) ar{y}\).

\paragraph{证明}

(1) 由 Green 定理 \(\oint_{\partial D}x^2\D{y} = \iint\limits_{D}2x\D{x}\D{y}\). 由定义 \( ar{x} = \dfrac{\iint\limits_{D}x\D{x}\D{y}}{\iint\limits_{D}\D{x}\D{y}} = \dfrac{\iint\limits_{D}x\D{x}\D{y}}{\sigma(S)}\). 因此 \(\oint_{\partial D}x^2\D{y} = 2\sigma(D) ar{x}\).

(2) 由 Green 定理 \(\oint_{\partial D}xy\D{y} = \iint\limits_{D}y\D{x}\D{y}\). 由定义 \( ar{y} = \dfrac{\iint\limits_{D}y\D{x}\D{y}}{\iint\limits_{D}\D{x}\D{y}} = \dfrac{\iint\limits_{D}y\D{x}\D{y}}{\sigma(S)}\). 因此 \(\oint_{\partial D}xy\D{y} = \sigma(D) ar{y}\).

\paragraph{第8题}

设 \(D\) 是平面区域, \(\partial D\) 为逐段光滑曲线, \(\vct{n}\) 为 \(D\) 的单位外法向, \(u, v \in C^2(D)\), 证明:

(1) \(\oint_{\partial D}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial \vct{n}}\D{l} = \iint\limits_{D}\Delta u\D{x}\D{y}\);

(2) \(\oint_{\partial D}v\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial \vct{n}}\D{l} = \iint\limits_{D}v\Delta u\D{x}\D{y} + \iint\limits_{D} abla u\cdot abla v\D{x}\D{y}\);

(3) \(\oint_{\partial D} egin{vmatrix}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial \vct{n}} & \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial \vct{n}} \ u & v\end{vmatrix}\D{l} = \iint\limits_{D} egin{vmatrix}\Delta u & \Delta v \ u & v\end{vmatrix}\D{x}\D{y}\).

其中 \(\Delta = \dfrac{\partial^2}{\partial x^2} + \dfrac{\partial^2}{\partial y^2}, abla = \dfrac{\partial}{\partial x}\vct{i} + \dfrac{\partial}{\partial y}\vct{j}\).

\paragraph{证明}

\(\D{\vct{l}} = (\D{x}, \D{y}), \vct{n} = \left(\dfrac{\D{y}}{\left|\D{\vct{l}} ight|}, -\dfrac{\D{x}}{\left|\D{\vct{l}} ight|} ight)\).

(1) 由 Green 定理,

\[ egin{aligned} \oint_{\partial D}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial \vct{n}}\D{l} & = \oint_{\partial D}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x}\D{y} - \dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y}\D{x} \ & = \iint\limits_{D}\left(\dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial x^2} + \dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial y^2} ight)\D{x}\D{y} \ & = \iint\limits_{D}\Delta u\D{x}\D{y} \end{aligned} \]

(2) 由 Green 定理,

\[ egin{aligned} \oint_{\partial D}v\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial \vct{n}}\D{l} & = \oint_{\partial D}v\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x}\D{y} - v\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y}\D{x} \ & = \iint\limits_{D}\left(\dfrac{\partial v}{\partial x}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial x} + v\dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial x^2} + v\dfrac{\partial^2u}{\partial y^2} + \dfrac{\partial v}{\partial y}\dfrac{\partial u}{\partial y} ight)\D{x}\D{y} \ & = \iint\limits_{D}v\Delta u\D{x}\D{y} + \iint\limits_{D} abla u\cdot abla v\D{x}\D{y} \end{aligned} \]

(3) 由 (2) 知,
